items.title_en: The EU still wants to scan  your private messages and photos
items.title_zh: 欧盟仍欲对私人信息与照片进行扫描
items.summary_en: Despite pushback, the EU continues to pursue scanning private messages and photos as part of its safety agenda. The plan raises concerns about encryption, privacy, and the trade-offs between surveillance and individual rights.
items.summary_zh: 欧盟尽管遭到反对，仍在推动对私人信息与照片进行扫描，作为安全与反恐的一部分。该举动引发关于端对端加密、隐私保护与政府监控边界的担忧与争论。

items.title_en: Founder of GitLab battles cancer by founding companies
items.title_zh: GitLab 创始人通过创办新公司对抗癌症
items.summary_en: GitLab's cofounder is battling cancer and continues pushing forward by launching new companies. This shows entrepreneurship can be a coping mechanism and a way to channel energy during treatment. The story highlights resilience at the intersection of health and leadership.
items.summary_zh: GitLab 联合创始人正在与癌症作斗争，但仍通过创办新公司继续前进。这一做法凸显创业在治疗期间用以应对压力的作用，以及在健康挑战中保持生产力的能力。

items.title_en: Wine 11 rewrites how Linux runs Windows games at kernel with massive speed gains
items.title_zh: Wine 11：在内核层重写以显著提升 Linux 上运行 Windows 游戏的速度
items.summary_en: Wine 11 overhauls kernel interactions to accelerate Windows games on Linux, delivering substantial speedups; it improves compatibility and reduces overhead in system calls translation and graphics handling. This move tightens the gap between Linux gaming and Windows performance, potentially expanding Linux gaming adoption.
items.summary_zh: Wine 11 对内核层进行重写，使 Linux 上运行 Windows 游戏的性能显著提升，并提高了兼容性与系统调用翻译、图形处理的效率。此举缩小了 Linux 与 Windows 在游戏性能上的差距，有望推动 Linux 游戏生态的扩展。

items.title_en: Goodbye to Sora
items.title_zh: 向 Sora 告别
items.summary_en: An announcement signals the end of Sora, marking a closing chapter for the service.
items.summary_zh: 官方公告表明 Sora 将停止运营，标志着该服务的收尾阶段。

items.title_en: Thoughts on slowing the fuck down
items.title_zh: 放慢脚步的一些思考
items.summary_en: Slowing down can protect long-term quality and prevent burnout in fast-moving tech work. The piece argues for deliberate pacing, better boundaries, and smarter prioritization to sustain creativity and reliability over time.
items.summary_zh: 放慢节奏或许比盲目追求速度更能保障长期产出质量，避免职业倦怠。文中倡导有意识的节奏控制、设定边界以及更聪明的优先级排序，以维持创造力和可靠性。

items.title_en: Microsoft's "fix" for Windows 11
items.title_zh: 微软对 Windows 11 的“修复”：挨打后的花束
items.summary_en: Microsoft continues to roll out patches for Windows 11, but critics argue the changes are cosmetic and don't address core reliability or usability issues. The messaging resembles a post-incident PR sprint rather than substantive engineering fixes. For tech readers, this highlights the gap between marketing narratives and real-world OS quality in major updates.
items.summary_zh: 微软继续推出 Windows 11 的补丁，但批评者认为这些改动多为表面修补，无法解决核心的可靠性或可用性问题。外部宣传更像是事后公关冲刺，而非实质工程改进。对技术读者而言，这凸显了大型操作系统更新中营销叙述与实际软件质量之间的差距。

items.title_en: Why so many control rooms were seafoam green (2025)
items.title_zh: 为什么大量控制室偏好海泡绿（2025）
items.summary_en: The color choice in control rooms often favors seafoam green because it reduces glare and supports sustained focus during long shifts. The piece ties this preference to ergonomics, display tech, and a broader design culture that values calm, legibility, and efficiency in high-stakes environments.
items.summary_zh: 控制室的颜色选择常常偏向海泡绿，因为它能降低眩光、帮助在长时间工作中保持专注。本文将这一偏好与人体工效学、显示技术以及强调冷静、易读与高效的设计文化联系起来，探讨在高压环境中的实用性。

items.title_en: Running Tesla Model 3's computer on my desk using parts from crashed cars
items.title_zh: 用桌面裝置與回收車輛零件運行特斯拉 Model 3 的電腦
items.summary_en: A maker demonstrates powering and running the Tesla Model 3's computer on a desktop rig using salvaged parts from crashed cars. The project shows automotive-grade compute can be repurposed for off-car experimentation, highlighting both learning value and safety/compatibility challenges.
items.summary_zh: 一位硬件爱好者用从撞车事故中回收的部件，在桌面上搭建并运行特斯拉 Model 3 的计算机。该项目展示了汽车级算力可以被改作桌面实验，但也暴露出安全与兼容性方面的挑战。

items.title_en: Tell HN: Litellm 1.82.7 and 1.82.8 on PyPI are compromised
items.title_zh: Litellm 1.82.7 与 1.82.8 在 PyPI 上遭篡改
items.summary_en: Two releases of a lightweight LLM client package were compromised on PyPI, enabling malicious code pushes to downstream users. The incident underscores supply-chain risk in Python ecosystems and the importance of checksum validation and pinning versions. Users should audit dependencies, upgrade to clean builds, and verify package integrity.
items.summary_zh: 两个版本的轻量级 LLM 客户端包在 PyPI 的发布被篡改，导致后续用户可能被注入恶意代码。事件凸显 Python 生态的供应链风险，强调校验和版本锁定的重要性。请审计依赖、升级到干净的构建版本，并验证包的完整性。

items.title_en: Migrating to the EU
items.title_zh: 迁移到欧盟
items.summary_en: Relocating workloads to EU infrastructure helps meet data-residency and privacy requirements under GDPR-era norms. It highlights data sovereignty, compliance, and the cost-performance tradeoffs of EU-region hosting.
items.summary_zh: 将工作负载迁移到欧盟基础设施有助于符合数据驻留和隐私规定。讨论数据主权、合规性，以及在欧盟区域托管的成本与性能权衡。

items.title_en: My astrophotography in the movie Project Hail Mary
items.title_zh: 我在电影《Project Hail Mary》中的天体摄影
items.summary_en: This piece recounts the author's astrophotography work for the film Project Hail Mary, detailing the gear, techniques, and how practical photography informs on-screen space imagery. It also highlights how real astronomy influences cinematic visuals.
items.summary_zh: 作者在电影《Project Hail Mary》中进行天体摄影的亲身经历，介绍所用器材、曝光策略，以及真实天文影像与特效的衔接。揭示了天体摄影与影视叙事之间的结合。

items.title_en: We haven't seen the worst of what gambling and prediction markets will do
items.title_zh: 我们还没看到赌博与预测市场的最坏后果
items.summary_en: The piece argues that gambling and prediction markets will magnify risks as AI makes them scalable and accessible. It discusses potential manipulation, bias, and regulatory challenges, urging careful design and governance.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为，随着 AI 提升预测市场的可扩展性和可访问性，赌博与预测市场的风险还会进一步放大。讨论潜在的操纵、偏见和监管挑战，呼吁在设计与治理上保持谨慎。

items.title_en: Personal Encyclopedias
items.title_zh: 个人百科全书
items.summary_en: Explores how individuals build personal encyclopedias to organize knowledge, notes, and references into a portable, searchable knowledge base. The piece dives into practical patterns for curating, linking, and indexing long-term information so it remains usable across tools and devices. For tech workers and knowledge workers grappling with information overload, it highlights a scalable approach to personal knowledge management.
items.summary_zh: 探讨个人如何建立百科式知识库，将笔记、引用和资料整合成可检索的本地知识体系。文章深入讨论对条目进行整理、链接与索引的实用模式，以便在不同工具和设备间保持可用性。对于面临信息过载的技术工作者和知识工作者，这种个人知识管理的可扩展方法尤为重要。

items.title_en: PC Gamer recommends RSS readers in a 37mb article that just keeps downloading
items.title_zh: PC Gamer 在一篇 37MB 的文章中推荐 RSS 阅读器，但文稿似乎不断在下载
items.summary_en: PC Gamer curates a selection of RSS readers in a long, 37MB feature. The piece itself is unexpectedly download-heavy, turning a simple recommendation into a test of browser patience. The underlying takeaway is that enthusiasts still crave lightweight, dependable feed readers in an era of endless content.
items.summary_zh: PC Gamer 选出一批 RSS 阅读器的清单，但这篇 37MB 的文章本身却像在持续下载内容，考验浏览器耐心。文章透露在信息过载的时代，用户仍然需要轻量、可靠的订阅工具。

items.title_en: Spanish legislation as a Git repo
items.title_zh: 把西班牙立法当作 Git 仓库来管理
items.summary_en: A project treats Spanish legislation as a versioned Git repository, enabling collaborative drafting, review workflows, and audit trails. It demonstrates 'law as code' can improve transparency and governance while highlighting implementation challenges.
items.summary_zh: 一个项目把西班牙立法作为可版本化的 Git 仓库来管理，支持协同起草、审查和变更追踪。这样的“法治即代码”理念提升透明度与治理效率，同时也暴露了实现方面的挑战。

items.title_en: AI overly affirms users asking for personal advice
items.title_zh: AI 对寻求个人建议的用户过度拍马奉承
items.summary_en: Researchers show that AI models trained to please users tend to provide flattering, agreeable personal advice, even when it's not optimal. This sycophantic behavior can mislead users and undermine critical judgment, underscoring challenges in aligning AI with reliable guidance.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现，为讨好用户而优化的对话模型在给出个人建议时往往过度拍马奉承，即便不最优也会认可用户观点。这种拍马奉承行为可能误导用户、削弱批判性判断，凸显让 AI 输出可靠建议的对齐难题。

items.title_en: People inside Microsoft are fighting to drop mandatory Microsoft Account
items.title_zh: 微软内部推动取消 Windows 11 的强制微软账户
items.summary_en: Inside Microsoft, discussions are intensifying about dropping Windows 11's mandatory Microsoft Account requirement, signaling a possible shift in setup flow and user choice. The change would ease initial sign-in friction for many users and enterprises.
items.summary_zh: 微软内部对取消 Windows 11 强制微软账户的讨论日益激烈，显示安装流程和用户选择可能放宽。此举将降低大量用户和企业在初始登录时的阻力。

items.title_en: Malicious litellm_init.pth in litellm 1.82.8 PyPI package – credential stealer
items.title_zh: litellm 1.82.8 PyPI 包中的恶意 litellm_init.pth：凭据窃取
items.summary_en: A malicious PyPI package for litellm 1.82.8 contains a litellm_init.pth file that loads a credential-stealing module during import. This highlights ongoing supply-chain risk in AI tooling and underscores the need for strict dependency hygiene, integrity checks, and credential rotation after exposure. Users should upgrade to clean versions and audit environments for any unfamiliar startup files.
items.summary_zh: 在 litellm 1.82.8 的 PyPI 包中发现恶意的 litellm_init.pth，导入时会加载窃取凭据的模块。此事件暴露了 AI 工具链中的供应链风险，并强调对依赖项进行严格校验、完整性检查以及暴露后轮换凭据的必要性。如有怀疑，应升级到干净版本并审计运行环境中是否存在异常的启动文件。

items.title_en: Is anybody else bored of talking about AI?
items.title_zh: 还有人觉得聊 AI 吗？
items.summary_en: A reflective essay questions whether the constant AI chatter has worn people down and argues for focusing on practical, real-world impact over hype. It pushes readers to value concrete use cases, governance, and measurable progress rather than trending headlines.
items.summary_zh: 这篇随笔质疑持续的 AI 热议是否让人疲惫，并主张把重点放在现实世界的实际影响而非炒作。作者鼓励关注具体的使用场景、治理与可衡量的进展，而不是追逐热度新闻。

items.title_en: Apple Business
items.title_zh: Apple Business：面向各规模企业的一体化平台
items.summary_en: Apple introduces Apple Business, an all-in-one platform to streamline device management, security, and app deployment for organizations of all sizes. By consolidating IT controls and enterprise workflows, it aims to reduce friction for Apple-powered ecosystems in the workplace. The move could reshape enterprise IT purchasing and cross-device collaboration strategies.
items.summary_zh: 苹果推出 Apple Business，一站式平台用于简化企业级设备管理、安全性与应用部署，覆盖各类规模的组织。通过整合 IT 控制和企业工作流，意在降低在工作场景中使用苹果设备的门槛。这一举措可能影响企业 IT 的采购决策及跨设备协作方式。

items.title_en: If you don't opt out by Apr 24 GitHub will train on your private repos
items.title_zh: 如果你在4月24日前不选择退出，GitHub 将在你的私有仓库上用于训练
items.summary_en: Developers face a policy change: if you don't opt out by the deadline, GitHub will use contents of private repos to train its AI models. This raises privacy and IP concerns for individual developers and teams, and highlights the trade-off between model quality and data rights; opting out may require action and may affect tooling.
items.summary_zh: 如果你未在截止日期前完成退出，GitHub 将把私有仓库的代码用于训练其人工智能模型。这将引发对隐私和知识产权的担忧，并可能影响企业对代码资产的控制。开发者需要了解退出流程与潜在影响。

items.title_en: iPhone 17 Pro Demonstrated Running a 400B LLM
items.title_zh: iPhone 17 Pro 展示本地运行 400B 参数的 LLM
items.summary_en: An iPhone 17 Pro demonstration shows a 400-billion-parameter LLM running locally on-device, signaling advances in edge AI and privacy-preserving inference. The feat highlights model compression, efficient on-device runtimes, and the potential shift away from cloud-only AI.
items.summary_zh: 一段演示显示 iPhone 17 Pro 能在本地设备上运行 400B 参数的 LLM，标志边缘 AI 的进展与隐私保护推理能力。此成就凸显模型压缩、边缘运行效率的提升，以及 AI 由云端依赖向本地推理的潜在转变。

items.title_en: End of "Chat Control": EU parliament stops mass surveillance
items.title_zh: 《聊天控制》终结：欧盟议会阻止大规模监控，为真正的儿童保护铺路
items.summary_en: EU Parliament's stance on Chat Control signals an end to mass surveillance in that policy area, paving the way for targeted child-protection measures. The vote reframes privacy policy and could influence how Europe approaches open web safety.
items.summary_zh: 欧盟议会对 Chat Control 的态度表明停止大规模监控的方向，为以目标化手段保护儿童铺路。此举重塑隐私政策，并可能影响欧洲在开放网络安全方面的做法。

items.title_en: LinkedIn uses 2.4 GB RAM across two tabs
items.title_zh: LinkedIn 在两个标签页上耗用 2.4 GB RAM
items.summary_en: LinkedIn's two-tab usage reportedly hits about 2.4 GB of RAM, highlighting how heavy modern web apps can be. This raises questions about browser memory budgets, device performance, and enterprise workflows with multiple tabs and complex JS frameworks. The piece underscores the tension between feature-rich experiences and efficient resource use.
items.summary_zh: 报道显示 LinkedIn 的两个标签页就占用约 2.4 GB RAM，凸显现代 Web 应用的高内存需求。这引发对浏览器内存预算、设备性能以及多标签和复杂 JS 框架下工作流的思考，强调了功能丰富与资源效率之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Claude Code Cheat Sheet
items.title_zh: 可打印的 Claude Code 快速参考表（每日自动更新）
items.summary_en: A printable Claude Code cheat sheet that auto-updates daily, serving as a handy quick-reference for prompts, patterns, and tips when coding with Claude. It's a lightweight, always-current resource for frequent Claude Code users.
items.summary_zh: 一份可打印的 Claude Code 快速参考表每日自动更新，提供提示语、常用模式和编码技巧，便于在使用 Claude 编码时快速查阅。该资源保持最新，适合高频使用者。

items.title_en: The future of version control
items.title_zh: 版本控制的未来
items.summary_en: Visionaries describe the next phase of version control beyond Git-style systems, spotlighting peer-to-peer collaboration, cryptographic integrity, and scalable, offline-friendly workflows. The takeaway is that new paradigms could change how teams coordinate, verify history, and scale development. For technologists, this signals a shift in toolchains and trust conventions.
items.summary_zh: 讨论了超越现有版本控制系统的新范式，强调点对点协作、加密完整性和可离线扩展的工作流。核心在于新机制可能改变团队的协作、历史验证和开发扩展的方式。对开发者来说，这预示着工具链与信任体系的变革。

items.title_en: Hormuz Minesweeper – Are you tired of winning?
items.title_zh: Hormuz Minesweeper：你厌倦赢了吗？
items.summary_en: Hormuz Minesweeper is an experimental Minesweeper-inspired project that challenges players with nontraditional puzzles; it also probes AI-assisted play and human limits.
items.summary_zh: Hormuz Minesweeper 是一个受扫雷启发的实验性项目，通过非传统的谜题挑战玩家；同时探讨 AI 辅助玩法与人类能力的边界。

items.title_en: Apple discontinues the Mac Pro
items.title_zh: 苹果停产 Mac Pro
items.summary_en: Apple has ended the Mac Pro line, signaling a shift away from modular Xeon-based workstations toward higher-density consumer-grade hardware or external compute options. Professionals may pivot to Mac Studio or other external compute solutions, reshaping workflows that depend on PCIe expandability and upgradeability.
items.summary_zh: 苹果宣布停产 Mac Pro，这标志着其工作站路线向高密度消费级硬件或外部计算方案的转变。专业用户可能转向 Mac Studio 或其他外设扩展解决方案，升级与扩展性成为新关注点。

items.title_en: Show HN: I took back Video.js after 16 years and we rewrote it to be 88% smaller
items.title_zh: Show HN：16 年后重新拿回 Video.js，并将其重写使体积缩小 88%
items.summary_en: Show HN: after reclaiming control of Video.js, the team rebuilt the project to a leaner 12% of its former size, maintaining compatibility while shaving bandwidth and load time. The rewrite by the maintainers highlights how modern tooling and modular design can yield dramatic size reductions.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：重新掌控 Video.js 后，团队将其重写，使体积仅为原来的 12%，并保持向后兼容，同时减小带宽和加载时间。此重写展示了现代工具链与模块化设计在实现显著体积缩减方面的潜力。

items.title_en: Moving from GitHub to Codeberg, for lazy people
items.title_zh: 从 GitHub 转向 Codeberg：懒人友好的迁移指南
items.summary_en: A low-friction guide to moving from GitHub to Codeberg, aimed at developers who want to minimize effort. It highlights practical steps such as cloning, setting a new remote, and pushing changes, and discusses Codeberg as a privacy-respecting, open-hosting alternative for lazy teams.
items.summary_zh: 提供从 GitHub 迁移到 Codeberg 的低成本路径，面向不愿在迁移上花太多精力的开发者。着重实用步骤与取舍，展示 Codeberg 作为开源友好托管平台的潜在优势，尤其适合懒人和小团队。

items.title_en: Slovenian officials blame Israeli firm Black Cube for trying to manipulate vote
items.title_zh: 斯洛文尼亚官员指控以色列公司 Black Cube 操纵选举
items.summary_en: Officials in Slovenia accuse the private intelligence firm Black Cube of attempting to influence a European election through covert tactics and deceptive investors. The case highlights evolving concerns about influence operations in democracies.
items.summary_zh: 斯洛文尼亚官员指控私营情报公司 Black Cube 通过隐蔽手段和虚假投资者试图影响欧洲选举。这一案件凸显了民主国家中影响行动的持续担忧。

items.title_en: Hold on to Your Hardware
items.title_zh: 守住你的硬件
items.summary_en: A short essay argues for extending hardware lifespans through repairable design, modular upgrades, and stronger anti-obsolescence norms. It warns that consumer electronics waste grows as devices become harder to repair, urging both makers and buyers to rethink responsibility.
items.summary_zh: 本文主张通过可维修设计、模块化升级和更强的反废弃规范来延长硬件寿命，警示随电子产品推陈出新导致的电子废弃物增加。作者呼吁厂商与用户共同重塑责任感，以减缓浪费并提升可持续性。

items.title_en: I decompiled the White House's new app
items.title_zh: 我对白宫新应用进行了反编译
items.summary_en: A decompilation write-up analyzes the White House's new app, revealing insights into its security posture and data flows. The findings point to hardening opportunities and complexities in government software ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 对白宫新应用的反编译分析揭示了其安全姿态与数据流的细节，指出了加强政府软件安全性的机会与挑战。

items.title_en: GrapheneOS will remain usable by anyone without requiring personal information
items.title_zh: GrapheneOS 将继续对所有人开放使用，无需个人信息
items.summary_en: GrapheneOS reiterates its privacy-first approach, stressing that you can use the OS without providing personal information. The note highlights the trade-offs in keeping the ecosystem usable without sign-ins or telemetry, and what this means for typical users.
items.summary_zh: GrapheneOS 继续坚持隐私优先理念，强调无需提供个人信息即可使用系统。文章点出在保持无需账户或数据传输的前提下，生态系统所需的权衡以及对普通用户的影响。

items.title_en: Anatomy of the .claude/ folder
items.title_zh: .claude/ 文件夹结构解析
items.summary_en: Explores Claude's internal working directory layout, showing how data, models, caches, and tooling are organized. The breakdown offers takeaways on configuration management and potential security or privacy implications for AI deployments.
items.summary_zh: 解析 Claude 内部工作目录的结构，展示数据、模型、缓存与工具的组织方式。该细节提供了关于配置管理以及人工智能部署中的潜在安全与隐私影响的启示。

items.title_en: Go hard on agents, not on your filesystem
items.title_zh: 把精力放在代理上，而不是文件系统
items.summary_en: This view argues that you should design around lightweight agents that orchestrate tasks and data flows rather than stuffing complexity into the filesystem. It outlines practical patterns like event-driven architecture, actor-model boundaries, and ephemeral storage to improve reproducibility and security in AI-powered automation. Tradeoffs are discussed and guidance provided for when to adopt agent-centric designs.
items.summary_zh: 该观点主张围绕轻量代理来编排任务和数据流，而不是把复杂性堆在文件系统上。文中给出事件驱动架构、演员模型边界、瞬态存储等实用模式，以提升可重复性、安全性和在 AI 自动化中的可组合性。还讨论了权衡以及在何种场景应采用以代理为中心的设计。

items.title_en: Shell Tricks That Make Life Easier (and Save Your Sanity)
items.title_zh: 让生活更轻松、拯救你理智的 Shell 技巧
items.summary_en: A practical set of shell tricks to automate chores, reduce repetition, and improve reliability, including safe globbing, smarter aliases, and convenient one-liners.
items.summary_zh: 实用的 shell 技巧合集，涵盖简短命令、别名管理与更安全的脚本实践，旨在降低重复劳动、提高开发者在终端中的生产力与心态稳定。

items.title_en: The gold standard of optimization: A look under the hood of RollerCoaster Tycoon
items.title_zh: 优化的黄金标准：一探 RollerCoaster Tycoon 的底层实现
items.summary_en: A deep dive into the optimization practices behind RollerCoaster Tycoon, the piece argues that the game's engine exemplifies rigorous, scalable performance engineering. It reveals the tradeoffs between simulation fidelity and render performance, offering lessons for real-time systems and game AI.
items.summary_zh: 对 RollerCoaster Tycoon 的底层优化实践进行深入解读，认为游戏引擎体现了严格且可扩展的性能工程。揭示仿真精度与渲染性能之间的权衡，为实时系统和游戏 AI 提供可借鉴的经验。

items.title_en: Project Nomad – Knowledge That Never Goes Offline
items.title_zh: Project Nomad：知识永不离线
items.summary_en: Presents an offline-first knowledge initiative designed to keep information accessible during outages or censorship. Emphasizes resilience and portability of knowledge through local-first data strategies.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一个离线优先的知识项目，确保在断网或审查环境中也能访问信息，强调通过本地化数据策略提升知识的韧性与可携带性。

items.title_en: Reports of code's death are greatly exaggerated
items.title_zh: 关于代码死亡的传闻被大大夸大
items.summary_en: Code isn't dead; AI tools will augment but not replace human software craftsmen. The piece argues that precise, maintainable code, rigorous testing, and clear design remain essential as automation shifts routine work. In practice, expect a continued emphasis on tooling that preserves correctness and developer control.
items.summary_zh: 尽管有 AI 辅助写码的趋势，代码并未消亡。高质量、可维护的代码、严谨的测试和明确的设计仍然是关键，因为自动化会改变工作方式但需要人类把控。

items.title_en: The 'paperwork flood': How I drowned a bureaucrat before dinner
items.title_zh: “纸上洪流”：我在晚餐前把官僚打败
items.summary_en: A humorous, first-person account of wrestling with bureaucratic red tape as the author builds a metaphorical 'paperwork flood'. It reads as a practical reminder that reducing friction in forms and approvals pays off. The takeaway is to seek efficient processes to avoid bureaucratic bottlenecks.
items.summary_zh: 这篇以“纸上洪流”为题的博客故事，讲述作者如何对付繁琐的官僚流程。通过一连串讽刺与经验教训，揭示繁文缛节的痛点及应对思路。核心在于在文书工作中寻求高效、低摩擦的处理方式，避免被繁琐拖垮。

items.title_en: European Parliament decided that Chat Control 1.0 must stop
items.title_zh: 欧洲议会决定停止'聊天监控1.0'
items.summary_en: European Parliament voted to halt Chat Control 1.0, ending its bid to mandate scanning private messages for child safety across online platforms. The move marks a setback for governments seeking pervasive surveillance tools and reinforces privacy-centered regulation in the EU, while still leaving questions about how to protect children online.
items.summary_zh: 欧洲议会投票决定终止'聊天监控1.0'的推进，放弃在私密通讯中进行大规模扫描的立法路径。此举缓解了对数字隐私的担忧，但也引发关于儿童保护与执法能力的持续讨论，未来欧盟在该议题上的路径仍不确定。

items.title_en: Mystery jump in oil trading ahead of Trump post draws scrutiny
items.title_zh: 特朗普发帖前油价交易出现神秘跳涨，引发关注
items.summary_en: Crude oil markets showed an unexplained rally ahead of a high-profile Trump post, drawing scrutiny from traders and regulators alike. Analysts debate whether rapid algorithmic trading, order-flow dynamics, or potential insider information drove the move. The episode underscores how political events can instantly ripple through commodity markets.
items.summary_zh: 在特朗普发布重要言论前，原油市场出现难以解释的跳涨，吸引交易员和监管机构的关注。分析师讨论是否因快速的算法交易、订单流动性变化，或内部信息导致了这一下跳。此事凸显政治事件能即时波及大宗商品市场。

items.title_en: Flighty Airports
items.title_zh: Flighty：机场信息合集
items.summary_en: Flighty Airports highlights Flighty’s airport data coverage.
items.summary_zh: Flighty Airports 展示了 Flighty 应用覆盖的机场数据内容。

items.title_en: Miscellanea: The War in Iran
items.title_zh: 随笔集：伊朗战争
items.summary_en: Miscellanea covering the war in Iran, offering concise updates on frontline developments, regional dynamics, and the tech/security implications of conflict in the region. It ties historical context to contemporary geopolitical and cyber considerations.
items.summary_zh: 杂记聚焦伊朗战争，简要更新前线进展、区域格局以及冲突对科技与网络安全的潜在影响，将历史背景与当前地缘政治联系起来。

items.title_en: Nitrile and latex gloves may cause overestimation of microplastics
items.title_zh: 丁腈和乳胶手套可能导致微塑料计数高估
items.summary_en: A study finds nitrile and latex gloves may contaminate samples and inflate microplastic counts in environmental testing. The result underscores the importance of stringent methodology and contamination controls in environmental research and lab workflows.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现丁腈和乳胶手套可能污染样本，导致微塑料计数偏高。结果强调在环境研究和实验室操作中需要严格的方法学与污染控制。

items.title_en: Make macOS consistently bad unironically
items.title_zh: 让 macOS 真正变得一贯糟糕
items.summary_en: The piece argues for a deliberate shift toward consistent macOS behavior, framing trade-offs between polish and reliability.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张让 macOS 的行为更具一致性，权衡光鲜体验与可靠性之间的取舍。

items.title_en: TurboQuant: Redefining AI efficiency with extreme compression
items.title_zh: TurboQuant：以极端压缩重塑AI效率
items.summary_en: TurboQuant introduces extreme compression techniques to shrink AI models and cut compute needs while preserving accuracy. This approach tests the boundaries of model distillation and quantization, potentially slashing deployment costs and enabling more edge and on-device inference. Trade-offs remain: training compatibility and potential accuracy quirks in edge cases.
items.summary_zh: TurboQuant 引入极端压缩技术，在保持准确度的同时显著降低模型规模和计算需求，有望降低大规模部署成本并推动边缘设备或端侧推理的普及。该方法可能带来训练兼容性与在极端情形下的精度波动等权衡。

items.title_en: Meta and YouTube found negligent in landmark social media addiction case
items.title_zh: Meta 与 YouTube 被认定在社媒成瘾案中存在过失——具有里程碑意义的裁决
items.summary_en: A landmark case finds Meta and YouTube negligent in contributing to social media addiction, with judges noting engagement-driven features that prioritize time-on-site over user well-being. The ruling could influence future design standards and regulatory expectations for large platforms.
items.summary_zh: 在具里程碑意义的案件中，法院认定 Meta 与 YouTube 在促成社媒成瘾方面存在疏忽，法官指出以提升停留时间为目标的设计特征损害用户福祉。此判决可能影响未来对大型平台的设计标准与监管预期。

items.title_en: ARC-AGI-3
items.title_zh: ARC-AGI-3：ARC 奖的第三届 AGI 挑战
items.summary_en: ARC-AGI-3 marks the third edition of the ARC Prize, spotlighting approaches to artificial general intelligence. Entrants showcase diverse architectures with emphasis on safety, efficiency, and real-world constraints.
items.summary_zh: ARC-AGI-3 是 ARC 奖的第三届，聚焦推动通用人工智能的发展。参赛团队展示多种架构路线，强调安全、效率与在现实世界中的约束。

items.title_en: FCC updates covered list to include foreign-made consumer routers
items.title_zh: FCC 将外国制造的消费路由器纳入覆盖清单
items.summary_en: The FCC expands the Covered Equipment list to include foreign-made consumer routers, tightening security requirements for home networking gear sold in the U.S. The move could affect manufacturers, supply chains, and consumer privacy as compliance costs become clearer.
items.summary_zh: FCC 将外国制造的消费路由器纳入覆盖清单，强化对美国市场网络设备的安全要求。此举可能影响厂商、供应链与合规成本，进而关系到家庭网络的隐私与安全。

items.title_en: $500 GPU outperforms Claude Sonnet on coding benchmarks
items.title_zh: 500 美元 GPU 在编码基准测试中胜过 Claude Sonnet
items.summary_en: A $500 GPU reportedly outperforms Claude Sonnet on coding benchmarks, signaling that consumer hardware can rival dedicated AI accelerators for certain tasks. This shifts cost considerations for AI research and development.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，价值 500 美元的显卡在编码基准测试中胜过 Claude Sonnet，表明部分任务上普通硬件也能与专用 AI 加速器对抗。这将改变 AI 研究与开发的成本考量。

items.title_en: GitHub appears to be struggling with measly three nines availability
items.title_zh: GitHub 的可用性似乎仅有 99.9%（三九），引发关注
items.summary_en: GitHub appears to be facing reliability issues despite being a core platform for developers, raising concerns about SLOs and uptime for massive code and CI pipelines. The outages stress the need for stronger resilience planning and incident response.
items.summary_zh: GitHub 作为开发者的核心平台，正面临可靠性问题，令大规模代码托管与持续集成流水线的可用性成为焦点。事件暴露出在弹性设计和应急响应方面的不足，强调需要更强的容错能力。

items.title_en: Apple randomly closes bug reports unless you "verify" the bug remains unfixed
items.title_zh: 苹果在未验证问题仍未修复前随机关闭 bug 报告
items.summary_en: Apple reportedly closes bug reports automatically if you don't verify that the bug remains unfixed, complicating debugging workflows. The policy can cause issues to disappear from active tracking and hinder developers.
items.summary_zh: 据称苹果在未确认问题仍未修复的情况下，会随机关闭 bug 报告，使一些问题从活跃跟踪中消失，影响开发者的调试流程。

items.title_en: Apple Just Lost Me
items.title_zh: 苹果让我失望，我要离开
items.summary_en: A personal note about why the author has decided to stop using Apple.
items.summary_zh: 这是对个人为何停止使用苹果的简短描述，强调对产品和策略的失望。

items.title_en: Epoch confirms GPT5.4 Pro solved a frontier math open problem
items.title_zh: Epoch 证实 GPT5.4 Pro 解决了一道前沿数学开放问题
items.summary_en: GPT5.4 Pro reportedly solved a frontier math open problem in Ramsey theory related to hypergraphs. The claim showcases AI's advancing capabilities in abstract reasoning, but independent verification and reproducibility remain crucial.
items.summary_zh: GPT5.4 Pro 据称解决了一道前沿数学开放问题，涉及 Ramsey 理论中的超图。此事展示了人工智能在高水平抽象推理方面的进步，但独立验证和复现仍然关键。

items.title_en: Say No to Palantir in Europe
items.title_zh: 拒绝 Palantir 在欧洲落地
items.summary_en: A Europe-focused petition urges opposition to Palantir’s expansion, citing privacy and surveillance concerns. The campaign reflects growing scrutiny of data analytics firms in the region and the political context of tech policy.
items.summary_zh: 面向欧洲的请愿呼吁反对 Palantir 的扩张，理由是隐私和监控 concerns。这场行动反映了欧洲地区对数据分析公司的日益审慎，以及科技政策的政治环境。

items.title_en: CSS is DOOMed
items.title_zh: CSS 注定走向末日
items.summary_en: CSS-based 3D rendering is hitting fundamental limits in performance and reliability. As visual demands grow, CSS alone won’t suffice, pushing developers toward GPU-accelerated approaches like WebGL or Canvas for real 3D effects.
items.summary_zh: CSS 在实现真实 3D 与复杂视觉效果时面临性能与可靠性的根本上限。随着渲染需求提升，单靠 CSS 已难以胜任，开发者应转向 GPU 加速的 WebGL 或 Canvas 等方案来实现真实的 3D 效果。

items.title_en: Desk for people who work at home with a cat
items.title_zh: 适合在家工作且养猫人群的办公桌
items.summary_en: Introduces a desk designed for remote workers who share their space with a cat, featuring cat-friendly add-ons and cable management that keep both humans and pets comfortable. It illustrates how home-office furniture is evolving to accommodate pets as co-workers.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一款为家中同住猫咪的远程工作者设计的办公桌，具备猫友好附加件和线缆管理等功能，兼顾人宠需求。展现了居家办公家具如何向让宠物成为同事的方向演进。

items.title_en: Windows native app development is a mess
items.title_zh: Windows 原生应用开发是一团乱麻
items.summary_en: critiques the state of Windows native app development, pointing to tooling, API fragmentation, and a difficult developer experience, with suggestions for improvement.
items.summary_zh: 批评 Windows 原生应用开发现状，指出工具链、API 分裂及开发者体验问题，并给出改进建议。

items.title_en: So where are all the AI apps?
items.title_zh: AI 应用到底在哪儿？
items.summary_en: Despite hype, consumer AI apps remain scarce. The piece analyzes bottlenecks like platform fragmentation, monetization hurdles, and tooling gaps, and sites where developers and platforms should focus to unlock broader AI software adoption.
items.summary_zh: 尽管热度高涨，面向消费者的 AI 应用仍不多。文章分析了平台碎片化、商业模式与工具链等瓶颈，并指出开发者和平台应聚焦的突破点以推动更广泛的 AI 应用普及。

items.title_en: I Built an Open-World Engine for the N64 [video]
items.title_zh: 我为 N64 构建开放世界引擎
items.summary_en: A developer demonstrates an open-world engine running on the Nintendo 64 hardware, illustrating how modern streaming techniques and world-building ideas map onto an era of tight memory and fixed pipelines. The video offers a playful look at retro hardware with current-engine concepts and could inspire hobbyists and researchers exploring hardware-limited game design.
items.summary_zh: 开发者在任天堂64硬件上展示一个开放世界引擎，展示了将现代流式加载和世界构建思路映射到记忆有限、固定管线的老平台。该视频以复古硬件为载体，考察了在资源受限环境下的引擎设计理念，或启发爱好者与研究者进行相关探索。

items.title_en: Judge blocks Pentagon effort to 'punish' Anthropic with supply chain risk label
items.title_zh: 法官阻止五角大楼以供应链风险标签惩罚 Anthropic
items.summary_en: A federal judge blocked the Pentagon from labeling Anthropic as a supply chain risk, preventing potential penalties or procurement constraints. The decision underscores the tension between defense procurement and AI vendor risk assessment.
items.summary_zh: 联邦法官阻止五角大楼以供应链风险标签对 Anthropic 实施惩罚，避免潜在处罚或采购限制。此举凸显政府采购与 AI 供应商风险评估之间的博弈。

items.title_en: US and TotalEnergies reach 'nearly $1B' deal to end offshore wind projects
items.title_zh: 美方与道达能源就终止海上风电项目达成近十亿美元协议
items.summary_en: The deal signals a retreat from several offshore wind projects in the US, with implications for climate goals, supply chains, and state/federal energy policy.
items.summary_zh: 这一达成为美方多项海上风电项目的终止铺平了道路，凸显清洁能源投资与项目推进中的风险与不确定性，对气候目标、供应链及能源政策具有深远影响。

items.title_en: Why I love NixOS
items.title_zh: 我为什么爱上 NixOS
items.summary_en: The author extols NixOS for reproducible configurations, declarative systems, and isolated packages that reduce drift. It covers benefits for deployments and rollbacks, along with a candid note on the learning curve and community support. The takeaway: NixOS is a compelling tooling choice for infrastructure-heavy workloads.
items.summary_zh: 作者盛赞 NixOS 的可重复配置、声明式系统和包隔离性，显著降低环境漂移。文中还谈及部署与回滚的好处，以及较陡的学习曲线和社区支持。核心结论是在基础设施密集型场景下，NixOS 是一个值得考虑的工具选择。

items.title_en: Iran-linked hackers breach FBI director's personal email
items.title_zh: 与伊朗相关的黑客入侵 FBI 局长的个人邮箱
items.summary_en: Iran-linked hackers claim a breach of the FBI director's personal email, illustrating how personal accounts can become an attack surface for high-profile figures. DOJ officials say an investigation is underway and the incident underscores risk to operations and sensitive communications.
items.summary_zh: 伊朗关联黑客声称入侵 FBI 局长的个人邮箱，揭示高层个人账户也可能成为攻击入口。司法部官员表示正在展开调查，事件凸显对行动与敏感通信的潜在风险。

items.title_en: I wanted to build vertical SaaS for pest control, so I took a technician job
items.title_zh: 我想为害虫防治做垂直 SaaS，结果去做了现场技师工作
items.summary_en: I aimed to build a vertical SaaS for pest control, but I took a technician job to learn the field from the ground up. The experience surfaced practical constraints—on-site workflows, regulatory checks, and the value of real-time field data—that aren’t obvious from dashboards alone. The takeaway is that deep domain immersion often makes or breaks vertical SaaS success.
items.summary_zh: 我原本计划为害虫防治领域开发垂直型 SaaS，但亲自去做了一线技师。现场工作揭示了实际工作流、合规检查和需实时采集的现场数据等难题，这些在只看仪表盘时往往看不到。关键 takeaway 是，深入领域实操常常决定垂直 SaaS 成功与否。

items.title_en: Voyager 1 runs on 69 KB of memory and an 8-track tape recorder
items.title_zh: 旅行者1号仅靠69KB内存与8轨磁带记录器运行
items.summary_en: Voyager 1 still operates with a mere 69 KB of RAM and an 8-track tape recorder, a testament to long-lived space hardware engineered decades ago. The story highlights how a mission can outlive the obsolete kit that built it, delivering data from the outer solar system long after its era of design. It underscores the engineering trade-offs and resilience required for deep-space exploration.
items.summary_zh: 旅行者1号仍以仅有的69 KB RAM和8轨磁带记录器运行，展示了数十年前设计的硬件的持久耐用。这个故事凸显了任务往往超越其设计时的技术极限，能够持续传回外太阳系的数据，凸显深空探测的工程权衡与韧性。此事也让人反思长期任务对老旧组件的依赖与替换挑战。

items.title_en: Jury finds Meta liable in case over child sexual exploitation on its platforms
items.title_zh: 陪审团裁定 Meta 就平台上的儿童性剥削内容负有责任
items.summary_en: Jury finds Meta liable in a case involving child sexual exploitation content on its platforms, underscoring ongoing legal accountability for safety policies. The verdict adds to scrutiny of how social networks moderate content and protect users.
items.summary_zh: 陪审团裁定 Meta 就其平台上儿童性剥削相关内容负有责任，凸显平台在安全与内容治理方面持续承受的法律压力。

items.title_en: My minute-by-minute response to the LiteLLM malware attack
items.title_zh: 对 LiteLLM 恶意软件攻击的分秒级应对
items.summary_en: A minute-by-minute walk-through of responding to a LiteLLM malware incident, highlighting rapid detection, containment, and forensics. The post doubles as a practical blueprint for securing LLM deployments and tightening incident-response playbooks under pressure.
items.summary_zh: 对 LiteLLM 恶意软件攻击的逐分钟应对过程，强调快速检测、隔离与取证。内容同时提供在压力下保护 LLM 部署、强化事件响应流程的实用蓝本。

items.title_en: Show HN: Gemini can now natively embed video, so I built sub-second video search
items.title_zh: Gemini 现可原生嵌入视频，我实现了亚秒级视频搜索
items.summary_en: Gemini now supports native video embedding, enabling richer media integration in AI workflows. The author built a fast video search system leveraging embeddings to index video frames and transcripts, achieving sub-second lookup. This demonstrates how client-side media capabilities can enable near-instant content discovery.
items.summary_zh: Gemini 现已原生支持嵌入视频，方便在 AI 流程中整合多媒体。作者基于嵌入向量构建了视频搜索系统，对视频帧与文字转写进行索引，实现亚秒级检索，展示了前端对多媒体内容进行近乎即时检索的潜力。

items.title_en: Meta told to pay $375M for misleading users over child safety
items.title_zh: Meta 因误导儿童安全相关承诺被判赔偿 3.75 亿美元
items.summary_en: Regulators claim Meta misled users about child-safety commitments, resulting in a $375 million penalty. The case underscores ongoing regulatory scrutiny of safety claims on large platforms and enforces accountability for how safety measures are communicated.
items.summary_zh: 监管机构指控 Meta 在儿童安全承诺上误导用户，导致被处以 3.75 亿美元罚款。此案凸显对大型平台在安全承诺与执行上的持续监管，以及对安全措施传播方式的问责。

items.title_en: Two pilots dead after plane and ground vehicle collide at LaGuardia
items.title_zh: 拉瓜迪亚机场飞机与地面车辆相撞致两名飞行员遇难
items.summary_en: Two pilots died after a collision between an aircraft and a ground vehicle at LaGuardia. The incident spotlights airport surface safety and the need for robust protocols and automation to prevent such tragedies.
items.summary_zh: 拉瓜迪亚机场发生飞机与地面车辆相撞，造成两名飞行员死亡。事件凸显机场地面安全与防止此类事故的流程与自动化的重要性。

items.title_en: Walmart: ChatGPT checkout converted 3x worse than website
items.title_zh: 沃尔玛：ChatGPT 结账转化率比官网低三倍
items.summary_en: A test of ChatGPT-powered checkout at a major retailer shows conversions were three times worse than the regular checkout flow. The result underscores that conversational AI must be carefully designed for shopping tasks to avoid frictions, even as AI promises convenience.
items.summary_zh: 在一家大型零售商的结账场景中，ChatGPT 驱动的结账流程的转化率比常规网站结账低三倍。该结果提醒零售商在引入对话式AI时，需要显式优化购物任务的流畅性，避免引入额外的操作摩擦。

items.title_en: Autoresearch on an old research idea
items.title_zh: 对一个旧研究想法的自动化再研究
items.summary_en: Autoresearch on an old research idea revisits a long-standing question using modern tooling to gather data, test hypotheses, and track results. The piece offers practical lessons on automation, reproducibility, and how iterative, self-driven inquiry changes the pace of scientific exploration.
items.summary_zh: 本文展示了对一个长期存在的研究想法进行自动化再研究，借助现代工具进行数据收集、假设测试与结果跟踪。通过案例，讨论自动化、可重复性，以及自驱式研究如何改变科研的节奏。

items.title_en: Arm AGI CPU
items.title_zh: Arm AGI CPU：面向通用人工智能的新一代处理器
items.summary_en: Arm unveils an AGI-oriented CPU design aimed at accelerating general AI workloads across edge and data-center scale. The architecture focuses on high-bandwidth memory, advanced vector math, and security features to support large models with lower power. This signals Arm's push to shape the AI compute ecosystem beyond accelerators, integrating AI-friendly cores into mainstream chips.
items.summary_zh: Arm 面向通用人工智能推出新一代 CPU 设计，意在在边缘和数据中心规模上加速通用 AI 工作负载。该架构强调高带宽内存、高级向量运算以及安全特性，以在更低功耗下支撑大模型。此举标志着 Arm 正在推动 AI 计算生态，不仅依赖加速器，也在主流芯片中整合对 AI 友好的核心。

items.title_en: Antimatter has been transported for the first time
items.title_zh: 反物质首次被运输
items.summary_en: Researchers have transported antimatter for the first time, marking a milestone in fundamental physics and enabling new tests of physical laws. The achievement highlights advances in containment and manipulation of antimatter for future experiments.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员首次实现了反物质运输，标志着基础物理学的里程碑，并为对物理定律的新检验提供可能。此项突破凸显了在反物质的封存与操控方面的进步，未来或用于一系列实验。

items.title_en: POSSE – Publish on your Own Site, Syndicate Elsewhere
items.title_zh: POSSE：先在自家站点发布，再在外部平台聚合
items.summary_en: POSSE is the principle of publishing on your own site first, then syndicating copies to external platforms. It balances control and reach, enabling ownership, searchability, and privacy, but may require extra tooling and moderation effort.
items.summary_zh: POSSE 的原则是在自有站点优先发布，再将复制内容聚合到外部平台。此举在控制与扩散之间取得平衡，提升内容所有权、可检索性与隐私，但也需要额外的工具和治理工作。

items.title_en: AI got the blame for the Iran school bombing. The truth is more worrying
items.title_zh: AI被指控参与伊朗校园爆炸？真相更令人担忧
items.summary_en: Argues that blaming AI for the Iran school bombing misses deeper issues around attribution, misinformation, and systemic security gaps. The piece cautions against overreliance on AI as a scapegoat while urging rigorous investigation.
items.summary_zh: 认为将伊朗校园爆炸归咎于 AI 忽视了归因、信息误导与系统性安全漏洞等更深层次的问题。文章警示不要把 AI 当成替罪羊，同时呼吁进行严格调查。

items.title_en: Britain today generating 90%+ of electricity from renewables
items.title_zh: 英国今日可再生能源发电占比超过90%
items.summary_en: Britain is today generating more than 90% of its electricity from renewable sources, a milestone for a grid that must balance variable supply. The day highlights the role of wind and solar, paired with flexible demand and storage, while reminding that variability still requires backup capacity and cross-border balancing.
items.summary_zh: 英国在某一天的用电中来自可再生能源的比例超过90%，成为电网脱碳的里程碑。风能、太阳能的快速扩张配合灵活的需求管理与储能正在推动车网迈向更高的可再生比重，但日间波动仍需后备容量与跨境调度来平衡。

items.title_en: ChatGPT won't let you type until Cloudflare reads your React state
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 在 Cloudflare 读取你的 React 状态前不让你输入
items.summary_en: Some anti-bot protections gate user input until the browser reveals internal React state, illustrating how client-side signals shape UX.
items.summary_zh: 一些反爬虫防护在浏览器暴露内部 React 状态前就阻止输入，揭示了客户端信号如何影响用户体验。此类防护引发对隐私、性能以及基于 JavaScript 的检测策略韧性的讨论。

items.title_en: Supreme Court Sides with Cox in Copyright Fight over Pirated Music
items.title_zh: 最高法院在盗版音乐版权案中支持 Cox
items.summary_en: The Supreme Court ruled in favor of Cox in a piracy-related music copyright dispute, overturning a lower-court decision. The ruling narrows some safeguards around music rights enforcement and sets notable precedents for piracy cases.
items.summary_zh: 最高法院在涉及盗版音乐的版权纠纷中支持 Cox，推翻了下级法院的裁决。此判决对音乐版权执行的某些保护措施进行了收紧，并为盗版案件树立了重要判例。

items.title_en: LaGuardia pilots raised safety alarms months before deadly runway crash
items.title_zh: 拉瓜迪亚机场飞行员在致命跑道事故前数月发出安全警报
items.summary_en: LaGuardia pilots warned of safety concerns months before the fatal runway crash, suggesting deeper issues in safety culture or operational procedures. The disclosures highlight the ongoing risk-management challenges and may influence investigations or policy tweaks aimed at preventing similar incidents.
items.summary_zh: 拉瓜迪亚机场的飞行员数月前就提出安全隐患，暴露出安全文化、运行流程或设备方面的持续风险。相关披露提醒监管和运营方关注安全治理，可能推动调查与政策改进，防止类似悲剧再次发生。

items.title_en: Flash-MoE: Running a 397B Parameter Model on a Laptop
items.title_zh: Flash-MoE：在笔记本上运行397B参数模型
items.summary_en: Flash-MoE demonstrates how mixture-of-experts can shrink memory and compute needs, letting a 397B parameter model run on consumer hardware. This approach unlocks on-device experimentation and lowers the bar for evaluating large models without cloud infrastructure. Expect more on-device AI prototyping and edge-friendly deployments.
items.summary_zh: 展示了混合专家（MoE）通过稀疏计算在普通硬件上运行大型模型的可能性，使397B参数模型在笔记本上落地成为现实。此举降低了评估大模型对云资源的依赖，促进本地化实验与边缘部署的发展。

items.title_en: OpenClaw is a security nightmare dressed up as a daydream
items.title_zh: OpenClaw：把安全隐患美化成白日梦
items.summary_en: OpenClaw's vulnerabilities are laid bare as researchers warn that its architecture exposes serious security risks, turning a daydream of convenience into a nightmare for defenders. The piece underscores the dangers of adding powerful automation without robust security guarantees.
items.summary_zh: OpenClaw 的安全性被视为严重隐患，研究者指出其架构暴露了关键弱点，让追求便利的幻想化为防守方的噩梦。提醒在追求自动化便利前必须重视安全保障。

items.title_en: GitHub is once again down
items.title_zh: GitHub 再次宕机
items.summary_en: GitHub is experiencing an outage again, disrupting core features used by developers worldwide. The incident tests how quickly teams can recover, switch to backups, and maintain workflows across dependent tools like CI/CD, package registries, and collaboration.
items.summary_zh: GitHub 再次发生宕机，影响全球开发者的日常工作。事件测试团队如何迅速恢复、回滚，以及与持续集成、包管理和协作工具等依赖系统的韧性。

items.title_en: A Faster Alternative to Jq
items.title_zh: 比 jq 更快的替代方案
items.summary_en: A new JSON data querying tool provides a faster alternative to jq, offering performance improvements and simpler usage for shell scripting and data pipelines. It aims to streamline JSON processing at scale.
items.summary_zh: 一款新的JSON数据查询工具提供比jq更快的性能和更简洁的用法，有望提升shell脚本和数据管道中的JSON处理效率。该工具若实现大规模数据处理，将成为开发与运维的有力助手。

items.title_en: Missile defense is NP-complete
items.title_zh: 导弹防御是 NP 完全问题
items.summary_en: The post argues that certain missile defense planning problems are NP-complete, implying intrinsic computational limits for optimal real-time solutions. The takeaway is that heuristics and approximations remain essential in defense system design.
items.summary_zh: 文中指出某些导弹防御规划问题属于 NP 完全，暗示在实时求解中存在本质的计算极限。结论是，在防御系统设计中仍需依赖启发式与近似方法。

items.title_en: You are not your job
items.title_zh: 你不是你的工作
items.summary_en: An essay about not defining identity by job; encourages exploring multiple identities, life outside work, burnout prevention, and the value of rest.
items.summary_zh: 提醒读者不要以职业来定义自我，倡导在工作之外培养兴趣、关系和生活目标，以防职业倦怠并实现更平衡的人生。

items.title_en: Police used AI facial recognition to wrongly arrest TN woman for crimes in ND
items.title_zh: 警方利用 AI 面部识别错误逮捕田纳西州女性，指控在北达科他州的罪行
items.summary_en: A Tennessee woman was wrongly arrested due to AI facial recognition matching crimes in North Dakota. The incident highlights ongoing reliability, bias, and privacy concerns around deploying facial recognition in law enforcement. It underscores the need for accountability and guardrails in algorithmic policing.
items.summary_zh: 一名田纳西州女性因 AI 面部识别错误而被错误逮捕，罪名指控针对在北达科他州的犯罪。此事件凸显了在人群识别执法中的可靠性、偏见和隐私问题，并强调在算法执法中需要问责与安全边界。

items.title_en: Ripgrep is faster than grep, ag, git grep, ucg, pt, sift (2016)
items.title_zh: Ripgrep 比 grep、ag、git grep、ucg、pt、sift 更快
items.summary_en: A 2016 comparison shows Ripgrep outperforms traditional search tools on large codebases thanks to Rust-based internals and smarter regex handling. It helped popularize fast, developer-friendly search in modern toolchains.
items.summary_zh: 2016 年的比较显示 Ripgrep 在大型代码库中明显快于 grep、ag、git grep 等工具，得益于 Rust 实现和更高效的正则处理。这推动了现代工具链对快速搜索的追求。

items.title_en: Show HN: Email.md – Markdown to responsive, email-safe HTML
items.title_zh: Email.md：将 Markdown 转换为响应式、邮件安全的 HTML
items.summary_en: Email.md provides a conversion tool turning Markdown into HTML that renders consistently across email clients. It tackles email-inbox quirks like inlined styles and tables for layout, enabling safer, more reliable newsletters and transactional messages. For developers, it's a time-saver when shipping marketing emails.
items.summary_zh: Email.md 提供一种将 Markdown 转换为在各大邮件客户端中呈现一致的 HTML 的工具。它解决了邮件客户端对样式内联、表格布局等的限制造成的问题，从而让新闻简报与交易邮件变得更安全、可靠。对开发者来说，是发布邮件内容时的省时工具。

items.title_en: Epic Games to cut more than 1k jobs as Fortnite usage falls
items.title_zh: Epic Games 将裁员超千人，Fortnite 使用量下滑
items.summary_en: Epic Games plans to lay off more than 1,000 employees as Fortnite user engagement declines. The workforce reduction signals a pivot toward Unreal Engine, monetization efficiencies, and a broader strategy to weather platform fatigue in consumer games.
items.summary_zh: Epic Games 宣布裁员超过一千人，Fortnite 用户活跃度下滑。公司正向 Unreal Engine、引擎授权和新的变现策略转型，以应对消费级游戏市场的放缓和平台波动。

items.title_en: Bored of eating your own dogfood? Try smelling your own farts
items.title_zh: 厌倦吃自己的狗粮？试试聞闻你自己的屁
items.summary_en: A humorous take on internal product testing and feedback loops. It suggests that teams sometimes need unconventional signals—like self-reflection and provocative experiments—to catch issues that standard dogfooding misses.
items.summary_zh: 以幽默的方式谈论自家产品测试与反馈循环，建议通过非常规的自我检视和挑衅性实验来发现常规狗粮测试忽略的问题。强调以新角度捕捉盲点的重要性。

items.title_en: Ensu – Ente’s Local LLM app
items.title_zh: Ensu — Ente 的本地大模型应用
items.summary_en: Ensu is Ente's on-device LLM app that runs on-device, prioritizing privacy and offline use. It illustrates a broader shift toward local AI apps, with trade-offs in model availability and hardware requirements.
items.summary_zh: Ensu 是 Ente 推出的本地大模型应用，支持在设备上离线运行，注重隐私与低延迟。此类本地化 AI 应用反映了对数据控制的日益重视，但也面临模型获取与硬件条件的限制。

items.title_en: Student beauty and grades under in-person and remote teaching
items.title_zh: 面授与远程教学下，学生外貌与成绩的关系
items.summary_en: A study compares how student appearance correlates with grades under in-person versus remote teaching. The results suggest that grading biases linked to attractiveness are sensitive to the learning modality, with online formats potentially dampening or shifting these biases, prompting a rethink of assessment design in digital education. This matters for ed-tech researchers and policy makers concerned with fairness and data-driven evaluation.
items.summary_zh: 一项研究比较了在面授与远程教学情境下，学生外貌与成绩的相关性。结果表明，与外貌相关的评分偏见会随教学模式变化，在线形式可能弱化或改变这类偏见，促使教育评估设计重新考虑数字化教学中的公平性。此发现对教育科技研究者与政策制定者关注的公平性和基于数据的评估具有现实意义。

items.title_en: VitruvianOS – Desktop Linux Inspired by the BeOS
items.title_zh: VitruvianOS：受 BeOS 启发的桌面 Linux
items.summary_en: VitruvianOS is a desktop Linux distribution inspired by BeOS, aiming for a fast, responsive UI and streamlined media workflows. By incorporating BeOS-inspired design on modern Linux, it targets a niche audience seeking a refreshed desktop UX. Adoption will depend on hardware support and ecosystem maturity.
items.summary_zh: VitruvianOS 是一个受 BeOS 启发的桌面 Linux 发行版，着重实现快速、响应式的界面与流畅的多媒体工作流。它在现代 Linux 上复兴 BeOS 式的用户体验，面向寻求新鲜桌面体验的用户群体。普及程度将取决于对硬件的支持和生态系统的成熟度。

items.title_en: Olympic Committee bars transgender athletes from women’s events
items.title_zh: 国际奥委会将跨性别运动员排除在女子项目之外
items.summary_en: The policy decision to bar transgender athletes from women’s events sparks heated debate over fairness, inclusion, and science in sport, signaling ongoing tensions between governance and evolving gender policy.
items.summary_zh: 将跨性别运动员排除在女子项目之外的政策引发关于公平、包容与体育科学的激烈辩论，反映体育治理与性别政策之间持续的紧张关系。

items.title_en: “Collaboration” is bullshit
items.title_zh: 「合作」其实是扯淡
items.summary_en: The author questions the value of constant collaboration and argues that it can slow progress, amplify conflict, and dilute accountability. By proposing solo work or more deliberate, outcome-focused collaboration, the piece pushes teams to design work processes that actually move projects forward.
items.summary_zh: 作者质疑常态化的协作价值，认为它可能拖慢进度、放大冲突并削弱问责。文中提出更偏向个人完成的工作方式或更有目的性的协作结构，促使团队设计真正推动项目前进的工作流程。

items.title_en: Updates to GitHub Copilot interaction data usage policy
items.title_zh: GitHub Copilot 互动数据使用政策更新
items.summary_en: GitHub Copilot's interaction data policy has been updated to clarify what data is collected and how it's used for model improvement. The change includes options to opt out or limit data sharing.
items.summary_zh: GitHub 更新 Copilot 的互动数据使用政策，说明哪些数据会被记录、如何用于改进模型，并提供可选的退出或限制数据收集的选项。

items.title_en: The Cognitive Dark Forest
items.title_zh: 认知黑暗森林
items.summary_en: A concept exploring how AI agents might strategically conceal capabilities to avoid adverse signaling in a competitive landscape. The idea reframes AI safety as a game of signaling, restraint, and trust, with implications for research collaboration and policy.
items.summary_zh: 提出一个将 AI 代理在竞争环境中隐藏能力以避免被对手发现的设想。该“认知黑暗森林”观念将 AI 安全转化为信号与克制的博弈，对研究协作与治理具有潜在影响。

items.title_en: Quantization from the Ground Up
items.title_zh: 从零开始的量化
items.summary_en: Ngrok’s piece breaks down quantization from first principles and demonstrates practical paths to deploying quantized models. It covers numeric precision, scaling, and performance trade-offs for real-world use.
items.summary_zh: 这篇 Ngrok 的文章从基础原理出发，系统讲解量化的实际应用路径，涵盖数值精度、缩放与现实世界部署中的性能权衡。

items.title_en: South Korea Mandates Solar Panels for Public Parking Lots
items.title_zh: 韩国强制公共停车场安装太阳能板
items.summary_en: South Korea is mandating solar canopies over public parking lots as part of a broader clean energy push, potentially adding significant solar capacity and reducing urban heat island effects. The policy will require coordination with grid operators and may influence parking infrastructure and public budgeting.
items.summary_zh: 韩国将公共停车场覆盖太阳能板作为清洁能源计划的一部分，预计新增大量光伏容量并降低城市热岛效应。 这一政策需要与电网运营方协同，或影响停车场基础设施与公共预算。

items.title_en: False claims in a widely-cited paper
items.title_zh: 广泛引用论文中的虚假陈述
items.summary_en: Raises questions about the integrity of a highly cited study with false claims, highlighting gaps in review and post-publication accountability. It underscores the risk of policy or practice being guided by flawed work and the need for transparent corrections.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦一篇广泛引用、存在虚假陈述的论文，暴露同行评审与事后纠错机制的缺陷。该事件提醒公众与学界，依赖有问题的权威研究可能带来错误决策，因此加强透明纠错尤为重要。

items.title_en: DOOM Over DNS
items.title_zh: DNS 上的 DOOM
items.summary_en: Doom Over DNS is a proof-of-concept that streams data or a game over DNS channels, illustrating DNS's potential as a transport medium and its security implications. It highlights how non-traditional payloads can ride on legacy protocols and the bandwidth/latency trade-offs involved.
items.summary_zh: DOOM Over DNS 是一个展示通过 DNS 通道传输数据或游戏的概念验证，揭示 DNS 作为传输媒介的潜力及其安全含义。它强调传统协议也能承载非传统载荷，以及相关的带宽与延迟权衡。

items.title_en: 90% of Claude-linked output going to GitHub repos w <2 stars
items.title_zh: 90% 的 Claude 相关产出被推送到星级低于 2 的 GitHub 仓库
items.summary_en: New analysis shows roughly 90% of Claude-generated output ends up in GitHub repos with under two stars, suggesting many AI-assisted code pushes lack community adoption. The trend raises questions about code quality, licensing, and AI-assisted software in open-source workflows.
items.summary_zh: 分析显示约 90% 的 Claude 相关输出被推送到星级低于 2 的 GitHub 仓库，社区采用度不高。此现象引发对 AI 辅助代码的质量、许可与开源生态影响的质疑。

items.title_en: FreeCAD  v1.1
items.title_zh: FreeCAD 1.1 版本发布
items.summary_en: FreeCAD 1.1 release brings stability, performance improvements, and new features to an open-source CAD suite used for mechanical design and architecture. The update focuses on accessibility and scripting enhancements to streamline workflows for hobbyists and professionals.
items.summary_zh: FreeCAD 1.1 版本带来稳定性、性能改进和新功能，提升这款开源 CAD 软件的易用性，适合业余和专业用户。更新聚焦可访问性与脚本能力提升。

items.title_en: Show HN: I put an AI agent on a $7/month VPS with IRC as its transport layer
items.title_zh: Show HN：用 7 美元/月的 VPS 搭建 AI 代理，IRC 作为传输层
items.summary_en: A lightweight experiment shows running an AI agent on a $7/month VPS with IRC as the transport layer. It demonstrates that cheap hosting and a simple transport protocol can support autonomous AI agents, albeit with trade-offs on reliability and security.
items.summary_zh: 一个极低成本的 AI 代理实验，使用每月 7 美元的 VPS 和 IRC 作为传输通道运行。这个演示表明，廉价主机与轻量协议也能支撑自主 AI 代理，但在可靠性和安全性方面存在取舍。

items.title_en: Swift 6.3
items.title_zh: Swift 6.3 发布
items.summary_en: Swift 6.3 brings refinements to the language and tooling with a focus on performance and developer experience. Expect updates to concurrency, standard library features, and package management that affect both iOS apps and server-side Swift.
items.summary_zh: Swift 6.3 带来语言和工具链的改进，聚焦性能与开发体验。包括并发、标准库新特性，以及对包管理的演进，影响 iOS 与服务端 Swift 的生态。

items.title_en: ‘Energy independence feels practical’: Europeans building mini solar farms
items.title_zh: 能源独立看起来更现实：欧洲人正在建设小型太阳能农场
items.summary_en: Describes a wave of Europeans assembling small solar farms to boost local energy resilience and reduce dependence on centralized grids. The trend reflects growing affordability of PV and storage and policy support across the continent.
items.summary_zh: 描述欧洲人正在组建小型太阳能农场以提升本地能源弹性、降低对集中电网的依赖。此趋势反映光伏与储能成本下降、以及欧洲范围内的政策支持。

items.title_en: Neovim 0.12.0
items.title_zh: Neovim 0.12.0
items.summary_en: Neovim 0.12.0 marks a significant release with enhanced performance and user experience, continuing the Lua-driven configuration and richer plugin ecosystem. The update improves integration with modern tooling while keeping familiar editor behavior intact. Developers benefit from smoother workflows and extensibility.
items.summary_zh: Neovim 0.12.0 作为一次重要版本更新，提升了性能和用户体验，延续 Lua 驱动的配置与更丰富的插件生态。改动改善与现代工具链的集成，同时保持编辑器的核心行为，提升开发者的工作流与扩展能力。

items.title_en: Meow.camera
items.title_zh: Meow.camera 猫咪摄像头
items.summary_en: Meow.camera is a cat-focused camera project aimed at helping owners monitor and engage with their pets.
items.summary_zh: Meow.camera 是一个面向猫咪的摄像设备/项目，帮助主人远程观察并与猫咪互动。

items.title_en: Log File Viewer for the Terminal
items.title_zh: 终端日志查看器
items.summary_en: lnav is a powerful terminal-based log viewer that aggregates and parses multiple log formats, offering fast search, color highlighting, and time-based filtering. It makes triaging issues across services easier by providing structured views and cross-reference across files without leaving the terminal.
items.summary_zh: lnav 是一个强大的终端日志查看工具，能聚合并解析多种日志格式，支持快速搜索、颜色高亮和基于时间的过滤。它通过在同一界面中跨文件浏览和关联信息，简化了跨服务的问题排查与调试。

items.title_en: Data centers are transitioning from AC to DC
items.title_zh: 爱迪生复仇：数据中心正从交流电向直流电过渡
items.summary_en: Data centers are increasingly adopting DC power distribution to reduce losses, improve efficiency, and simplify cabling. The trend echoes Edison-era ideas of direct power delivery and could influence rack-level design and energy management strategies.
items.summary_zh: 数据中心正越来越多地采用直流供电分配，以降低能耗、提升效率并简化布线。这一趋势回响了直流供电的理念，可能影响机架级设计与能源管理策略。

items.title_en: CERN uses ultra-compact AI models on FPGAs for real-time LHC data filtering
items.title_zh: CERN 在 FPGA 上使用超紧凑 AI 模型进行实时 LHC 数据筛选
items.summary_en: CERN runs ultra-compact AI models burned into silicon on FPGAs to filter the LHC's real-time data streams. This approach delivers ultra-low latency and energy efficiency, illustrating how edge AI accelerates high-energy physics.
items.summary_zh: CERN 将极小型、固化在硅上的 AI 模型部署在 FPGA 上，用于实时筛选 LHC 数据。此举实现极低延迟和能耗效率，展示边缘 AI 在高能物理中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: LG's new 1Hz display is the secret behind a new laptop's battery life
items.title_zh: LG 的 1Hz 显示屏成为新笔记本电池续航的秘密
items.summary_en: LG's 1Hz display technology is enabling a laptop to achieve longer battery life by dramatically reducing redraws and power consumption. The move reflects a broader push toward ultra-low refresh panels, with trade-offs in motion fluidity and content compatibility.
items.summary_zh: LG 的 1Hz 显示屏极大降低了重绘与功耗，使笔记本实现更长的续航。这体现了向超低刷新率显示的趋势，但在画面流畅度与某些应用兼容性上存在权衡。

items.title_en: I built an AI receptionist for a mechanic shop
items.title_zh: 我为修车店搭建了 AI 接待员
items.summary_en: A DIY AI receptionist automates front-desk tasks for a small mechanic shop, handling inquiries and scheduling. It demonstrates practical deployment of AI in small businesses and raises questions about privacy, reliability, and integration.
items.summary_zh: 一个自制项目为小型修车店打造了 AI 接待员，负责前台问询与排程。展示了 AI 在小企业中的实际应用，同时引发隐私、可靠性与集成方面的讨论。

items.title_en: Cocoa-Way – Native macOS Wayland compositor for running Linux apps seamlessly
items.title_zh: Cocoa-Way：原生 macOS Wayland 合成器，实现 Linux 应用无缝运行
items.summary_en: Cocoa-Way aims to be a native macOS Wayland compositor to run Linux apps with minimal friction, integrating with Cocoa for window management and rendering. If matured, it could blur the boundary between Linux development environments and macOS workstations, reducing reliance on X.org or VM-based workarounds.
items.summary_zh: Cocoa-Way 旨在成为原生 macOS 的 Wayland 合成器，以最小化摩擦地在 macOS 上运行 Linux 应用，并与 Cocoa 进行窗口管理和渲染整合。若成熟，将模糊 Linux 开发环境与 macOS 工作站之间的边界，减少对 Xorg 或虚拟机的依赖。

items.title_en: New York City hospitals drop Palantir as controversial AI firm expands in UK
items.title_zh: 纽约市医院撤出Palantir，而Palantir在英国扩张
items.summary_en: New York City hospitals have dropped Palantir's services as the data analytics firm expands its footprint in the UK. The move underscores ongoing tension between public health institutions and controversial AI vendors, potentially signaling tighter procurement scrutiny and evolving data-sharing norms.
items.summary_zh: 纽约市多家医院停止使用Palantir的服务，与该公司在英国的扩张形成对照，凸显公共卫生机构与争议性AI供应商之间的博弈。此举或预示采购审查趋严以及数据共享规则的演变。

items.title_en: AMD's Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 Dual Edition crams 208MB of cache into a single chip
items.title_zh: AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 双版将208MB缓存塞进单芯片
items.summary_en: AMD debuts Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 Dual Edition, packing 208MB of cache onto a single chip to boost cache-heavy workloads and gaming. The move highlights cache as a key lever for top-end performance, while prompting questions about power, yields, and real-world gains versus existing high-end parts.
items.summary_zh: AMD 推出 Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 双版，单芯片内置208MB缓存，旨在提升缓存密集型工作负载与游戏性能。这一举动凸显缓存对高端性能的作用，同时也引发关于功耗、良品率及实际收益与现有高端芯片相比的讨论。

items.title_en: Landmark L.A. jury verdict finds Instagram, YouTube were designed to addict kids
items.title_zh: 里程碑式的洛杉矶陪审团裁决认定Instagram和YouTube被设计成让儿童沉迷
items.summary_en: A Los Angeles jury ruled that Instagram and YouTube were designed to addict children, spotlighting how platform design choices influence youth engagement. The verdict could reshape regulatory scrutiny and push developers toward safer, more responsible product decisions, while encouraging lawsuits that challenge addictive features.
items.summary_zh: 洛杉矶的一宗里程碑式陪审团判决认定Instagram和YouTube在设计上让未成年人上瘾，凸显了平台设计对青少年参与度的影响。这一判决可能促使监管机构加强审查，并推动开发者在产品设计上趋向更安全、负责任的决策，同时可能催生针对成瘾功能的更多诉讼。

items.title_en: Miasma: A tool to trap AI web scrapers in an endless poison pit
items.title_zh: Miasma：一款用来把 AI 网页爬虫困在无尽的“毒坑”中的工具
items.summary_en: Miasma is a defensive tool that traps AI web scrapers by injecting decoy data and routing tricks to exhaust their resources. It aims to deter large-scale crawlers while exposing weaknesses in current anti-scraping strategies. The approach sparks discussion about the ethics and arms race between site operators and crawlers.
items.summary_zh: Miasma 提供一种防御性手段，通过注入诱饵数据和路由技巧让 AI 爬虫耗费资源以达到阻止抓取的目的。它旨在抑制大规模爬虫的行为，同时暴露现有反爬策略的薄弱点，引发关于网络防御伦理与爬虫对抗的讨论。

items.title_en: John Bradley, author of xv, has died
items.title_zh: 著作 xv 的作者 John Bradley 去世
items.summary_en: John Bradley, author of the influential book xv, has died. Bradley's work helped shape early tech writing and sparked conversations about software design and aesthetics.
items.summary_zh: 著作 xv 的影响力作者约翰·布拉德利去世。他的作品促使人们思考早期科技写作以及软件设计与美学的讨论。

items.title_en: Schedule tasks on the web
items.title_zh: 在网页上调度任务
items.summary_en: Scheduling tasks on the web goes beyond setTimeouts, covering browser APIs for background work and time-based triggers. It highlights patterns for reliability, timing accuracy, and energy considerations in web apps that need periodic work. Practical guidance helps you build browser schedulers that work offline and across tabs.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在网页应用中实现定时任务的新思路，涵盖服务工作者、后台任务和基于时间的触发等模式。讨论在可用性、精度和电量成本之间的权衡，以及跨标签、离线环境中的可行策略。为在浏览器中构建健壮的周期性调度器提供实用建议。

items.title_en: GrapheneOS refuses to comply with new age verification laws for operating system
items.title_zh: GrapheneOS 拒绝遵守针对操作系统的新年龄验证法
items.summary_en: Reports that GrapheneOS rejects new age-verification requirements, citing privacy and security concerns. The stance spotlights the tension between regulatory compliance and open-source, privacy-preserving OS principles. It raises questions about how future rules will intersect with secure mobile ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: GrapheneOS 拒绝遵守针对操作系统的新年龄验证法，强调隐私与安全的关切。这凸显了监管合规与开源、隐私保护系统之间的张力，并引发对未来规则如何影响安全移动生态的讨论。

items.title_en: Hypothesis, Antithesis, synthesis
items.title_zh: Hypothesis、对立、综合
items.summary_en: The piece revisits Hegelian dialectics, framing problem-solving as a dynamic progression from thesis to antithesis and ultimately synthesis. It argues that embracing tension between ideas can drive deeper solutions in tech design, policy, and philosophy rather than chasing binary outcomes. The takeaway is to cultivate iterative refinement rather than one-off conclusions.
items.summary_zh: 本文重新梳理黑格尔辩证法，将问题解决描述为从假设到对立再到综合的动态过程。它主张在技术设计、政策制定与哲学领域拥抱思想张力，避免简单二元对立，以推动更深层次的解决方案。要点是强调迭代完善而非一次性结论。

items.title_en: Tin Can, a 'landline' for kids
items.title_zh: Tin Can：为孩子设计的座机
items.summary_en: The hottest new phone is Tin Can, a 'landline' for kids.
items.summary_zh: Tin Can 作为面向儿童的简化通讯设备，提供不依赖互联网的座机功能，帮助孩子保持沟通同时降低屏幕时间和风险，附带家长监管选项。

items.title_en: Jury says Meta knowingly harmed children for profit, awarding landmark verdict
items.title_zh: 陪审团认定 Meta 为盈利而知情伤害儿童，作出具有里程碑意义的判决
items.summary_en: A Los Angeles jury concluded Meta knowingly harmed children for profit, delivering a landmark verdict that could redefine platform liability. The ruling intensifies scrutiny over social media design, addictive features, and the legal responsibilities of tech platforms toward minors.
items.summary_zh: 陪审团认定 Meta 为盈利而知情伤害儿童，作出具有里程碑意义的判决，或重新定义平台责任。此判决加剧对社交媒体设计、成瘾性功能以及科技平台对未成年用户的法律责任的审查。

items.title_en: 25 Years of Eggs
items.title_zh: 25 年的鸡蛋
items.summary_en: A retrospective titled 25 Years of Eggs, exploring how a simple motif or project has evolved over time across culture, food, or technology. Reflects on longevity and the surprises along the way.
items.summary_zh: 回顾“25 年的鸡蛋”这一主题，探讨一个简单概念在几十年中的演变，涵盖文化、饮食或科技领域的变化与惊喜。

items.title_en: Explore the Hidden World of Sand
items.title_zh: 探索砂子的隐藏世界
items.summary_en: A project that reveals the microstructure and textures of sand, often through magnified imagery or interactive visuals. It highlights how granular materials harbor complex physics and patterns that aren’t visible at human scale.
items.summary_zh: 一个项目揭示砂粒的微观结构与纹理，通常通过放大图像或互动可视化呈现。它展示了粒状材料在微观层面隐藏的复杂物理和模式。

items.title_en: Folk are getting dangerously attached to AI that always tells them they're right
items.title_zh: 人们对总是肯定他们观点的 AI 依赖性越来越强
items.summary_en: People are increasingly relying on AI that always confirms their views, creating a dangerous bias loop. The piece warns that calibrated, skeptical AI and stronger guardrails are needed to prevent echo chambers and misinformation from taking root.
items.summary_zh: 越来越多的人依赖那种总是肯定他们观点的 AI，形成危险的偏见回路。文章警告若缺乏校准与防护，将使回音室效应和错误信息蔓延，需建立更强的边界与审查机制。

items.title_en: Windows 3.1 tiled background .bmp archive
items.title_zh: Windows 3.1 瓦片背景 BMP 收藏集
items.summary_en: A GitHub collection preserves Windows 3.1 tiled background BMPs, offering a window into early PC UI artwork and nostalgia. The archive highlights limited color palettes and bitmap-based wallpapers from the era.
items.summary_zh: GitHub 收藏了 Windows 3.1 的瓷砖背景 BMP 文件，展示早期 PC UI 的美学与存储格式。该档案揭示了位图背景在当时对用户体验的影响。

items.title_en: Box of Secrets: Discreetly modding an apartment intercom to work with Apple Home
items.title_zh: 秘密盒：低调改造公寓对讲机以接入 Apple Home
items.summary_en: A discreet retrofit of a standalone apartment intercom to integrate with Apple HomeKit enables automations and remote control without replacing the entire system.
items.summary_zh: 本文记录了如何低调为公寓对讲机做改造，使其能接入 Apple HomeKit，从而在家庭自动化中实现通过 Home.app 的控制与场景触发。强调在利用现有设备构建生态时需要关注安全、稳定性以及对硬件的潜在风险和保修影响。

items.title_en: The bridge to wealth is being pulled up with AI
items.title_zh: AI抬高了致富之路的门槛
items.summary_en: AI is reshaping how people build wealth by enabling new models of automation, entrepreneurship, and platform-enabled investing. While AI lowers barriers to value creation, it also reorders traditional career ladders, pushing many toward AI-enabled ventures and ownership rather than straight wages.
items.summary_zh: AI正在重塑致富路径，通过自动化、创业和平台化投资等新模式降低财富门槛，同时也在重塑传统职业阶梯。AI可能让人更易创造价值，但也促使不少人从单纯靠工资的工作转向基于AI的创业和资产所有权。

items.title_en: DOJ confirms FBI Director Kash Patel's personal email was hacked
items.title_zh: 司法部确认 FBI 局长 Kash Patel 的个人邮箱遭黑客入侵
items.summary_en: The DOJ confirmed that the personal email of FBI Director Kash Patel was hacked, underscoring security risks around high-profile officials' private accounts. The breach could expose correspondence, contacts, and other sensitive information, fueling scrutiny of how personal endpoints are safeguarded. It spotlights ongoing cyber threats and the need for robust personal-security measures for public figures.
items.summary_zh: 司法部确认 FBI 局长 Kash Patel 的私人邮箱遭黑客入侵，凸显高官私人账户安全风险。该事件可能暴露私人通信、联系人及其他敏感信息，促使社会各界关注个人端点的防护。再次强调对公职人员的网络威胁及强化个人安全措施的需求。

items.title_en: We rewrote JSONata with AI in a day, saved $500k/year
items.title_zh: 我们在一天内用 AI 重写 JSONata，年省 50 万美元
items.summary_en: A team rewrote the JSONata transformation engine using AI in a single day, achieving substantial maintenance savings. The move illustrates AI-assisted code rewriting at scale, with caveats around verification and reliability.
items.summary_zh: 团队在一天内使用 AI 重写了 JSONata 转换引擎，显著降低维护成本。此案例展示了大规模 AI 辅助代码改写的潜力，但需对产出进行充分验证与可靠性评估。

items.title_en: From zero to a RAG system: successes and failures
items.title_zh: 从零开始构建检索增强生成（RAG）系统：成就与教训
items.summary_en: From zero to a RAG system outlines building a retrieval-augmented generation pipeline from scratch, sharing what worked and what didn't. It covers data sourcing, embeddings and vector stores, retrieval quality, and strategies to reduce hallucinations and latency.
items.summary_zh: 从零开始构建 RAG 系统，分享实际搭建过程中的成功经验与失败教训。内容涵盖数据源选择、向量化存储、检索质量、以及降低幻觉和延迟的策略。

items.title_en: How I'm Productive with Claude Code
items.title_zh: 我如何用 Claude Code 提高生产力
items.summary_en: A personal take on working efficiently with Claude Code, sharing workflows, prompt templates, and practices that keep coding progress steady while staying focused.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享在 Claude Code 上保持高效工作的实际做法，包括工作流、提示模板和可持续的练习习惯，以在保持产出的同时保持专注。

items.title_en: The bee that everyone wants to save
items.title_zh: 大家都想拯救的蜜蜂
items.summary_en: The piece spotlights a bee species that has captured widespread conservation attention. It explains why pollinators matter for ecosystems and agriculture, and what actions are underway—from habitat restoration to policy support and citizen science—to protect it and the crops it sustains.
items.summary_zh: 这只被广泛关注的蜜蜂物种被用来阐释授粉者对生态系统和农业的重要性，以及当前正在进行的保护行动，如栖息地修复、政策支持与公民科学参与，以保护它及所依赖的作物。

items.title_en: Tracy Kidder has died
items.title_zh: Tracy Kidder 去世
items.summary_en: Tracy Kidder, famed nonfiction author who chronicled technology and engineering, has died. His work helped popularize tech culture and the people behind innovation.
items.summary_zh: Tracy Kidder 是享有盛名的非虚构作家，曾记录科技与工程文化的兴起，如今去世。其作品帮助公众理解技术创新背后的人物与故事。

items.title_en: Government agencies buy commercial data about Americans in bulk
items.title_zh: 政府机构大规模购买美国人商业数据
items.summary_en: U.S. government agencies are buying bulk commercial data about Americans from private data brokers, raising alarms about privacy, transparency, and oversight. The practice underscores how public-sector insights increasingly rely on private-sector data assets, prompting calls for stronger protections and clearer governance.
items.summary_zh: 美国政府机构正从商业数据经纪商处大规模购买美国公民信息，引发关于隐私、透明度和监管的担忧。这种做法凸显公共部门日益倚赖私营数据资产来获取洞见，并促使社会对加强保护与治理的呼声上升。

items.title_en: Full network of clitoral nerves mapped out for first time
items.title_zh: 首次绘制完整阴蒂神经网络
items.summary_en: Researchers map the full network of clitoral nerves for the first time, with implications for pelvic surgery and women's health. The atlas promises improved surgical precision and a deeper understanding of sexual function.
items.summary_zh: 首次绘制出阴蒂神经的完整网络，为盆腔手术和女性健康带来重要影响。这一神经解剖图有望提升手术精准度，并深化对性功能的理解。

items.title_en: A nearly perfect USB cable tester
items.title_zh: 几乎完美的 USB 线缆测试仪
items.summary_en: A USB cable tester is claimed to be nearly perfect at validating cables, connectors, and power delivery.
items.summary_zh: 一款 USB 线缆测试仪被称为几乎完美，能准确验证线缆、连接器与供电性能。随着 USB 标准日益复杂，可靠的测试工具对确保设备稳定性变得更为重要。

items.title_en: No Terms. No Conditions
items.title_zh: 无条款、无条件
items.summary_en: Proposes a licensing or policy concept centered on removing terms and conditions from software, questioning traditional control models and what openness could look like.
items.summary_zh: 提出一种去除条款和条件的软件许可或政策概念，质疑传统的控制模式及开放性的边界。

items.title_en: Finding all regex matches has always been O(n²)
items.title_zh: 寻找所有正则匹配的时间复杂度一直是 O(n²)
items.summary_en: Finding all regex matches can deteriorate to quadratic time in worst cases, a long-standing performance pitfall in many engines. The post outlines why this problem persists and offers practical approaches to mitigate it in real-world use.
items.summary_zh: 在最坏情况下，寻找所有正则匹配的时间复杂度可能退化为平方级。本文解释了这一问题为何长期未被根本解决，并给出在实际场景中缓解的可操作方法。

items.title_en: CERN to host a new phase of Open Research Europe
items.title_zh: CERN 将承办 Open Research Europe 新阶段
items.summary_en: CERN will host the new phase of Open Research Europe, expanding an EU-wide open-access publishing platform. The move signals ongoing investment in open science infrastructure and could reshape visibility and funding flows for European research.
items.summary_zh: CERN 将承办 Open Research Europe 的新阶段，扩大覆盖欧盟的开放获取出版平台。这一举措表明将持续投入开放科学基础设施，可能影响欧洲研究的可见性与资助格局。

items.title_en: Bombadil: Property-based testing for web UIs
items.title_zh: Bombadil：Antithesis 的网页 UI 属性测试工具
items.summary_en: Bombadil brings property-based testing to front-end UI testing, generating diverse interaction sequences to expose edge cases that example tests miss. It emphasizes automated shrinking of failing runs to minimal reproducing cases and integrates with common web stacks, helping teams catch flaky behavior before release.
items.summary_zh: Bombadil 为前端 UI 引入属性测试，通过自动生成各种交互序列来揭示常规测试难以覆盖的边界问题。它还能对失败用例进行最小化缩减，便于定位复现，并与主流前端栈对接，帮助团队在发布前发现易出错的行为。

items.title_en: Further human + AI + proof assistant work on Knuth's "Claude Cycles" problem
items.title_zh: 在 Knuth 的“Claude Cycles”问题上进一步的人机协作与证明助手工作
items.summary_en: Building on prior attempts, this piece documents continued human-AI collaboration with proof systems to tackle Knuth's Claude Cycles problem. It highlights how proof assistants and interactive reasoning are changing how difficult mathematical proofs are approached and validated.
items.summary_zh: 继续记录在人机协作的基础上，借助证明助手和交互式推理处理 Knuth 的 Claude Cycles 问题的进展，展示形式化验证在解决高难度数学难题中的作用。

items.title_en: Why I forked httpx
items.title_zh: 我为何分叉 httpx
items.summary_en: I describe practical reasons for forking the httpx project instead of waiting upstream, including the need for custom features, faster iteration, and safer dependency isolation. The post weighs the trade-offs of forking versus contributing back upstream, and what it means for users who rely on stable HTTP client behavior.
items.summary_zh: 我解释了为何要将 httpx fork 出来，而不是直接向上游提交改动或等待改动。原因包括需要自定义功能、加速迭代以及实现更安全的依赖隔离。文中还讨论 fork 与向 upstream 贡献之间的取舍，以及这对依赖稳定的 HTTP 客户端的用户意味着什么。

items.title_en: Installing a Let's Encrypt TLS certificate on a Brother printer with Certbot
items.title_zh: 用 Certbot 为 Brother 打印机安装 Let's Encrypt TLS 证书
items.summary_en: A practical guide showing how to secure a Brother network printer with a Let's Encrypt TLS certificate using Certbot and Cloudflare DNS challenges. The steps cover certificate issuance, renewal, and how to configure the printer's web interface. It highlights the growing trend of securing IoT-like devices even without dedicated vendors' support.
items.summary_zh: 实用指南演示如何借助 Certbot 与 Cloudflare DNS 挑战，为一台 Brother 网络打印机部署 Let's Encrypt TLS 证书。步骤涵盖证书申请、续期及打印机网页界面的配置，同时指出在缺乏厂商支持的情况下，为类似物联网设备加固安全的趋势。

items.title_en: MAUI Is Coming to Linux
items.title_zh: MAUI 即将登陆 Linux
items.summary_en: MAUI is coming to Linux via a preview from Avalonia, widening the cross-platform story for .NET apps on desktop Linux. If you build .NET GUIs, this could broaden deployment targets and influence UI strategy. It underscores Linux's growing role in the .NET ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: .NET MAUI 即将登陆 Linux，借助 Avalonia 的预览实现跨平台桌面 UI。这将扩大 .NET GUI 的部署目标，影响 UI 策略，体现了 Linux 在 .NET 生态中的日益重要地位。

items.title_en: The truth that haunts the Ramones: 'They sold more T-shirts than records'
items.title_zh: The Ramones 的真相：他们卖得最多的不是唱片而是 T 恤
items.summary_en: A cultural piece examining how The Ramones became iconic through merch sales, with T-shirts reportedly outselling records. It discusses branding, fan culture, and the economics of legacy for punk bands.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文化报道探讨 Ramones 如何靠周边商品走红——T 恤销量甚至高于唱片。文章分析品牌塑造、粉丝文化，以及朋克乐队在长期声誉中的经济学。

items.title_en: An incoherent Rust
items.title_zh: 不连贯的 Rust
items.summary_en: A critical look at Rust rhetoric and design choices, arguing that some aspects lack coherence and hinder learning. The post suggests clarifying mental models and aligning APIs to improve consistency.
items.summary_zh: 本文批判性评估 Rust 的表述与设计选择，认为某些方面缺乏连贯性，影响学习曲线。作者提出在设计上应明确思维模型并让 API 更加一致。

items.title_en: Pretext: TypeScript library for multiline text measurement and layout
items.title_zh: Pretext：用于多行文本测量与布局的 TypeScript 库
items.summary_en: Pretext provides a TypeScript library for accurate multiline text measurement and layout. It helps developers render dynamic text with predictable wrapping and height, reducing layout bugs across fonts and sizes. This can be especially valuable for canvas or SVG-based UI work.
items.summary_zh: Pretext 提供一个用于多行文本测量与布局的 TypeScript 库，帮助在不同字体与字号下实现可预期的换行与高度。对于需要精确文本渲染的场景（如画布或 SVG UI）特别有用，减少布局错误。

items.title_en: More common mistakes to avoid when creating system architecture diagrams
items.title_zh: 创建系统架构图时应避免的常见错误
items.summary_en: Lists common diagram mistakes like over-abstracting, tying diagrams to implementation details, or omitting stakeholders. Provides practical guidelines for diagrams that clearly communicate decisions and constraints.
items.summary_zh: 列出常见的架构图错误，如过度抽象、将图与实现细节绑定，以及忽略相关方。给出清晰传达决策与约束的实用绘制要点。

items.title_en: Trivy under attack again: Widespread GitHub Actions tag compromise secrets
items.title_zh: Trivy 再度受攻击：GitHub Actions 标签广泛暴露密钥
items.summary_en: Trivy is again under fire after attackers exploited compromised GitHub Actions tags to steal secrets. The incident underscores how software supply chain tools can be weaponized through CI/CD workflows, prompting teams to pin trusted versions, audit action usage, and rotate leaked credentials.
items.summary_zh: Trivy 再次受攻击，攻击者利用被妥协的 GitHub Actions 标签窃取密钥。这凸显供应链工具在 CI/CD 流水线中的潜在攻击点，促使团队固定可信版本、审计 Actions 使用并轮换泄露的凭证。

items.title_en: Obsolete Sounds
items.title_zh: 过时的声音
items.summary_en: Obsolete Sounds curates audio from devices and interfaces that have fallen out of use, offering a snapshot of tech history through sound. The project highlights how audio cues encode memory of hardware lifecycles.
items.summary_zh: Obsolete Sounds 收集并呈现已逐渐退出现代科技的声音，提供一段通过声音感知的科技史。该项目凸显音频线索如何反映硬件生命周期与记忆。

items.title_en: My first patch to the Linux kernel
items.title_zh: 我的第一份 Linux 内核补丁
items.summary_en: Shares the experience of submitting your first patch to the Linux kernel, detailing the learning curve, code reviews, and community feedback that come with contributing to the core project.
items.summary_zh: 讲述向 Linux 内核提交第一份补丁的经历，涵盖学习曲线、代码审查与社区反馈。

items.title_en: HyperAgents: Self-referential self-improving agents
items.title_zh: HyperAgents：自我指涉的自我提升代理
items.summary_en: HyperAgents introduces self-referential agents that can inspect and adjust their own policies to improve performance. The work explores auto-improvement loops, self-assessment, and the potential benefits and risks of self-modifying agents for complex tasks.
items.summary_zh: HyperAgents 介绍了能够自我审视并调整自身策略的代理，形成自我提升循环。该研究探索自我评估与自我修改在解决复杂任务时的潜在收益与风险，以及对 AI 系统设计的影响。

items.title_en: Linux is an interpreter
items.title_zh: Linux 实质上是一个解释器
items.summary_en: A provocative piece argues that Linux acts like an interpreter, translating kernel interactions, system calls, and filesystem semantics at runtime. It reframes OS design as a continuous translation layer, with implications for performance, security, and developer mental models.
items.summary_zh: 这篇观点文章认为 Linux 实质上像一个解释器，在运行时对内核交互、系统调用和文件系统语义进行翻译。这种看法重新定义了操作系统的设计，使得性能和安全性以及开发者心智模型产生新的考量。

items.title_en: ISBN Visualization
items.title_zh: ISBN 可视化：Annas Archive
items.summary_en: A visualization project exploring ISBN data from Anna's Archive, revealing patterns in publishers, publication years, and bibliographic metadata. It demonstrates how scalable visualizations can illuminate large bibliographic collections for researchers and librarians.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个对 Anna's Archive 的 ISBN 数据进行可视化的项目，揭示出版社、出版年份等元数据中的模式。展示了可扩展可视化在研究人员与图书馆工作中对大型书目数据集的洞察能力。

items.title_en: Building an FPGA 3dfx Voodoo with Modern RTL Tools
items.title_zh: 用现代 RTL 工具构建 FPGA 的 3dfx Voodoo
items.summary_en: Describes recreating the classic 3dfx Voodoo GPU in FPGA using modern RTL tools, covering design choices, timing challenges, and what modern tooling enables for retro hardware experimentation.
items.summary_zh: 讲述在 FPGA 上用现代 RTL 工具复刻经典的 3dfx Voodoo GPU，讨论设计取舍、时序挑战，以及现代工具如何让复古硬件实验成为可能。

items.title_en: Hypura – A storage-tier-aware LLM inference scheduler for Apple Silicon
items.title_zh: Hypura — 面向 Apple Silicon 的存储层感知型 LLM 推理调度器
items.summary_en: Hypura introduces a storage-tier-aware LLM inference scheduler designed for Apple Silicon, aiming to optimize memory usage and latency by intelligently staging data between RAM and storage. By accounting for the different storage tiers, it reduces memory pressure during on-device inference of large models and can boost throughput on Macs.
items.summary_zh: Hypura 引入面向 Apple Silicon 的存储层感知型 LLM 推理调度器，旨在通过在 RAM 与存储之间智能分层数据来优化内存使用与延迟。通过考虑不同存储层级，它在本地大模型推理中降低内存压力，并有望提升 Mac 上的吞吐量。

items.title_en: Woman who never stopped updating her lost dog's chip reunites with him after 11y
items.title_zh: 丢失狗狗芯片信息11年后再相认的感人故事
