items.summary_en: A woman keeps updating her dog's microchip data over the years, enabling a reunion after 11 years. The story highlights the role of persistent, centralized data records in reuniting pets across long spans.
items.summary_zh: 一位女子长期持续更新自己爱犬的芯片信息，11年后终于与受困动物重逢。此事凸显持续维护的数据记录在跨多年时间内帮助动物寻家的作用。

items.title_en: Nanobrew: The fastest macOS package manager compatible with brew
items.title_zh: Nanobrew：与 brew 兼容的最快 macOS 包管理器
items.summary_en: Nanobrew promises blazing-fast package installs on macOS while staying fully compatible with Homebrew formulae, reducing install times without forking the ecosystem. It targets developers who want speed with seamless compatibility.
items.summary_zh: Nanobrew 声称在 macOS 上实现最快的包安装速度，同时与 Homebrew 公式完全兼容，避免分叉生态。面向追求高效开发的用户。

items.title_en: What young workers are doing to AI-proof themselves
items.title_zh: 年轻工作者如何在 AI 时代提升竞争力
items.summary_en: Young workers are reshaping their careers to stay AI-ready—prioritizing skills that machines won’t easily replicate, adopting AI-augmented workflows, and focusing on collaboration with AI. The piece emphasized adaptability and domain expertise as still crucial in an AI-enabled job market.
items.summary_zh: 年轻工作者在 AI 时代寻求自我提升以抵御冲击，聚焦机器难以替代的领域、采用 AI 辅助的工作流，以及与 AI 协作的能力。文章强调适应性和领域专长在 AI 助力下依旧重要。

items.title_en: AI users whose lives were wrecked by delusion
items.title_zh: 因错觉而受损的AI用户
items.summary_en: People harmed by convincing but deceptive AI chatbots illustrate the real-world risks of AI-generated delusions. The stories underscore the need for safeguards, transparency, and accountability for developers and platforms whose systems influence daily life.
items.summary_zh: 被似是而非、极具说服力的AI聊天机器人误导导致生活受损的用户案例，揭示了AI生成内容的现实风险。报道强调需要更多安全机制、透明度以及对开发者和平台的问责。

items.title_en: Dune3d: A parametric 3D CAD application
items.title_zh: Dune3d：一个参数化的3D CAD应用
items.summary_en: Dune3d is an open-source parametric 3D CAD project that lets users define and modify geometry with parameters and constraints. The project exemplifies how modular, scriptable CAD tooling could complement or challenge heavyweight CAD suites.
items.summary_zh: Dune3d 是一个开源的参数化3D CAD项目，允许通过参数和约束来定义和修改几何形状。该项目展示了轻量、可脚本化的 CAD 工具如何挑战主流工具并实现更快速的试验。

items.title_en: My DIY FPGA board can run Quake II
items.title_zh: 我的 DIY FPGA 板可以运行 Quake II
items.summary_en: A hobbyist demonstrates running Quake II on a custom FPGA board, illustrating how reconfigurable hardware can support classic game emulation. The project highlights practical limits of FPGA toolchains, RAM, and performance, while showing affordable paths to hardware experimentation.
items.summary_zh: 一位爱好者在自制 FPGA 板上实现 Quake II，展示了可重配置硬件在经典游戏仿真中的潜力。项目也揭示了 FPGA 工具链、内存与性能的实际限制，以及开展硬件实验的低成本路径。

items.title_en: Claude Code runs Git reset –hard origin/main against project repo every 10 mins
items.title_zh: Claude Code 每十分钟对项目仓库执行 git reset --hard origin/main
items.summary_en: Claude Code appears to run git reset --hard origin/main on a project every 10 minutes, wiping local changes and history. This illustrates the risks of high-frequency automation in code workflows and underscores the need for safeguards, review gates, and strict version-control discipline. The episode serves as a cautionary tale for AI-assisted coding tools.
items.summary_zh: Claude Code 每 10 分钟就对一个项目执行 git reset --hard origin/main，导致本地改动与历史被清空。这揭示了高频自动化在代码工作流中的风险，强调需要设定保护措施、审查机制和严格的版本控制纪律。此事为 AI 辅助编码工具敲响警钟。

items.title_en: Earthquake scientists reveal how overplowing weakens soil at experimental farm
items.title_zh: 地震学家揭示过度耕作如何削弱试验农场土壤
items.summary_en: Earthquake scientists studying an experimental farm show that overplowing weakens soil structure, potentially increasing ground vulnerability during earthquakes. The finding highlights the link between agricultural practices and seismic resilience, with implications for land-use policies and farming productivity.
items.summary_zh: 在一个示范农场的研究中，地震学家发现过度耕作削弱了土壤的结构与稳定性，可能在地震发生时增加地表变形和震感风险。该发现把农业做法与地震韧性联系起来，对土地利用政策与农作效率都具有重要启示。

items.title_en: LibreOffice and the art of overreacting
items.title_zh: LibreOffice与过度反应的艺术
items.summary_en: The post critiques how LibreOffice handles controversy, arguing that overreactive communications can undermine trust in open-source projects. It advocates steadier, data-driven responses and better governance to maintain community confidence.
items.summary_zh: 文章批评LibreOffice在面对争议时的过度反应，认为此类沟通方式可能削弱对开源项目的信任。建议以更克制、基于事实的回应和更有效的治理来维护社区信心。

items.title_en: Everything old is new again: memory optimization
items.title_zh: 往日的内存优化再次成为新潮：内存优化
items.summary_en: A blog post argues memory optimization is timeless: many old tricks remain relevant as hardware evolves. It discusses data locality, caching strategies, and allocator choices that impact performance in modern workloads.
items.summary_zh: 博客重新强调内存优化的长久性：在硬件演进的背景下，许多经典技巧仍然有效。讨论数据本地性、缓存策略与分配器选择等对现代工作负载性能的影响。

items.title_en: If DSPy is so great, why isn't anyone using it?
items.title_zh: 如果 DSPy 真这么棒，为什么没有人使用？
items.summary_en: The post critiques DSPy—a dataflow/engine concept—arguing that practical adoption remains scarce due to complexity, integration hurdles, or performance concerns.
items.summary_zh: 文章质疑 DSPy 的实际落地能力，认为现实使用率偏低的原因可能是复杂性、集成困难或性能顾虑。

items.title_en: Disney Exits OpenAI Deal After AI Giant Shutters Sora
items.title_zh: 迪士尼在 Sora 停止运营后退出与 OpenAI 的交易
items.summary_en: Disney ends its OpenAI deal after OpenAI shuts down Sora, signaling the fragility of AI partnerships tied to specific product initiatives. The move underscores how platform-level decisions can abruptly affect enterprise collaborations and the pace of AI-driven content workflows in big media.
items.summary_zh: 迪士尼在 Sora 停止运营后退出与 OpenAI 的交易，显示出依赖特定产品的 AI 合作关系的脆弱性。此举凸显了平台级决策如何突然影响企业合作，以及大媒体在 AI 驱动内容工作流中的推进速度。

items.title_en: An unsolicited guide to being a researcher [pdf]
items.title_zh: 成为研究者的随手指南（PDF）
items.summary_en: An Unsolicited Guide to Being a Researcher offers practical, no-nonsense advice on conducting robust, ethical research, from formulating questions to documenting methods and sharing results. It emphasizes reproducibility, critical thinking, and the social dynamics of collaboration for lasting impact.
items.summary_zh: 这份《成为研究者的随手指南》给出务实、无废话的研究建议，覆盖从如何提出研究问题到记录方法、分享结果的全过程。强调可重复性、批判性思维，以及在协作和学术共同体中的伦理与责任，帮助研究者提升长期影响力。

items.title_en: Local Stack Archived their GitHub repo and requires an account to run
items.title_zh: LocalStack 将仓库归档，运行需账户
items.summary_en: LocalStack has archived its GitHub repository and now requires you to sign in to run the software locally. This marks a shift from open development toward a gated model, potentially affecting developers who rely on a free, self-hosted AWS-like environment. The move invites questions about accessibility and sustainability of community-focused open-source projects.
items.summary_zh: LocalStack 已将其 GitHub 仓库归档，现在运行需要账户登录。这标志着从开放开发向受限访问的转变，可能影响依赖免费本地 AWS 模拟环境的开发者。此举也引发关于社区开源项目可访问性与可持续性的讨论。

items.title_en: DeployTarot.com – Tarot card reading for deployments
items.title_zh: 部署时的塔罗牌占卜
items.summary_en: A playful DeployTarot tool offers tarot-style readings to guide deployments, framing checks and risks as light-hearted rituals. It highlights how teams use creative rituals to manage deployment risk and improve communication under pressure.
items.summary_zh: DeployTarot.com 将塔罗牌阅读融入部署流程，为发布前的检查与风险提供轻松的仪式化指引。它反映出团队在高压发布周期中通过创造性仪式来管理风险与沟通。

items.title_en: Sodium-ion EV battery breakthrough delivers 11-min charging and 450 km range
items.title_zh: 钠离子电动车电池突破：11分钟充电、450公里续航
items.summary_en: A sodium-ion battery breakthrough promises fast charging (around 11 minutes) and 450 km range, offering a potential alternative to lithium-ion with different supply chains. The development could diversify battery markets, but commercialization, cycle life, and safety remain key hurdles.
items.summary_zh: 钠离子电池实现11分钟快充与450公里续航，为锂离子以外的电池路线带来可能的供应链多元化。若量产，这项技术将改变电动车产业格局，但在量产、循环寿命与安全性等方面仍需克服挑战。

items.title_en: Debunking Zswap and Zram Myths
items.title_zh: 破解 Zswap 与 Zram 的误区
items.summary_en: The article dispels common myths about Zswap and Zram, clarifying their roles in swap and compressed RAM, and giving practical guidance on when each is beneficial and how to configure them.
items.summary_zh: 文章澄清了关于 Zswap 与 Zram 的常见误解，解释它们在内存管理中的作用，并给出在不同工作负载下的选用建议与配置要点。

items.title_en: Apple's intentional crippling of Mobile Safari
items.title_zh: 苹果故意削弱移动端 Safari
items.summary_en: Apple's intentional crippling of Mobile Safari.
items.summary_zh: 质疑苹果有意削弱 Mobile Safari 的能力，讨论对网页开发者和用户的影响，以及对网页应用、性能和隐私的潜在权衡。

items.title_en: OpenTelemetry profiles enters public alpha
items.title_zh: OpenTelemetry Profiles 公共 Alpha 版上线
items.summary_en: OpenTelemetry has released a public alpha for Profiles, a feature to standardize and share instrumentation configurations across services. Early access lets teams experiment with pre-built telemetry profiles to reduce setup time and improve cross-service observability, potentially boosting performance.
items.summary_zh: OpenTelemetry 推出 Profiles 的公共 Alpha，旨在标准化并复用跨服务的观测配置。早期体验让团队尝试预设的观测配置以缩短集成时间、提升跨服务可观测性，并可能提升性能和一致性。

items.title_en: Algorithm Visualizer
items.title_zh: 算法可视化工具
items.summary_en: Algorithm Visualizer provides interactive demonstrations of classic algorithms, helping learners and engineers reason about complexity and behavior. The project lowers the barrier to understanding data structures and algorithms through visual intuition.
items.summary_zh: Algorithm Visualizer 提供互动式的经典算法演示，帮助学习者和工程师直观理解复杂度与行为。该工具通过可视化降低理解数据结构与算法的门槛。

items.title_en: Five years of running a systems reading group at Microsoft
items.title_zh: 微软系统读书会五周年回顾
items.summary_en: Microsoft's systems reading group marks five years of structured knowledge sharing among engineers. It highlights how curated reading lists and discussions accelerate collective expertise and cross-team collaboration. The takeaway: formalized learning communities can compound technical growth inside large orgs.
items.summary_zh: 微软的系统读书会已成立五年，系统化的知识分享和讨论推动工程师集体成长与跨团队协作。通过精心挑选的阅读清单和讨论，学习成果在大型组织中呈现出倍增效应。

items.title_en: Show HN: Cq – Stack Overflow for AI coding agents
items.title_zh: Show HN：Cq——AI 编码代理的 Stack Overflow
items.summary_en: Show HN introduces Cq, pitched as Stack Overflow for AI coding agents. It aims to centralize code Q&A for AI copilots, potentially accelerating development and sharing best practices.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 介绍 Cq，被称为 AI 编码代理的 Stack Overflow。它为 AI 代码代理提供问答与知识库，帮助开发者共享工具、模式与经验教训，可能提升协作效率。

items.title_en: The first 40 months of the AI era
items.title_zh: AI 时代的前40个月
items.summary_en: A reflective overview of what the first 40 months since AI's breakout have delivered: rapid productization, surging compute for models, and new platform dynamics, alongside safety and governance concerns. The piece argues AI is reshaping competitive strategy and infrastructure choices across tech ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 回顾自 AI 崛起以来的前40个月：产品化速度加快、模型计算需求飙升，以及新兴的平台生态，同时伴随安全与治理的挑战。 AI 正在重塑技术生态中的竞争策略与基础设施选择。

items.title_en: Alzheimer's disease mortality among taxi and ambulance drivers (2024)
items.title_zh: 出租车与救护车司机的阿尔茨海默病死亡率（2024）
items.summary_en: A 2024 BMJ study examines mortality from Alzheimer's disease among taxi and ambulance drivers. It highlights possible occupational risk factors, such as long-term exposure to stress, shift work, and sleep disruption, underscoring broader implications for workforce health and aging drivers. It suggests targeted prevention and screening strategies for high-risk professions.
items.summary_zh: 2024 年 BMJ 的研究聚焦出租车与救护车司机中阿尔茨海默病的死亡率。研究指向职业因素（如长期高压、轮班制与睡眠干扰）可能与风险增加相关，强调对高风险行业的健康监护与早筛的重要性，并提出针对性的预防策略。

items.title_en: Slovenia becomes first EU country to introduce fuel rationing
items.title_zh: 斯洛文尼亚成为欧盟首个实施燃料配给的国家
items.summary_en: Slovenia has become the first EU member to impose fuel rationing, signaling a new lever governments may use to manage energy supply. The move could affect logistics, transportation, and price dynamics, and may influence how tech and industrial sectors plan operations under energy constraints.
items.summary_zh: 斯洛文尼亚成为欧盟首个实施燃料配给的成员国。这一举措将影响物流和交通、改变燃料价格结构，也可能改变高科技与工业部门在能源紧张时期的运营计划。

items.title_en: C++26 is done ISO C++ standards meeting, Trip Report
items.title_zh: C++26 完成 ISO C++ 标准会议：现场报道
items.summary_en: The London ISO C++ meeting wraps up C++26 decisions, laying out features, timelines, and implementation expectations for the next standard cycle. For developers and toolchains, the trip report signals what may land in compilers and libraries in the coming years. It helps technologists gauge compatibility and roadmap planning.
items.summary_zh: 伦敦的 ISO C++ 会议完成对 C++26 的决策，勾勒未来版本的特性、时间表与实现预期。对开发者和工具链来说，这份现场报道指明了未来几年编译器与库可能新增的内容，便于制定兼容性与路线图。

items.title_en: Velxio 2.0 – Emulate Arduino, ESP32, and Raspberry Pi 3 in the Browser
items.title_zh: Velxio 2.0：在浏览器中模拟 Arduino、ESP32 与 Raspberry Pi 3
items.summary_en: Velxio 2.0 is a browser-based emulation tool that lets you run Arduino, ESP32, and Raspberry Pi 3 environments directly in the browser. It enables rapid prototyping, offline testing, and education, while highlighting current limitations of browser emulation.
items.summary_zh: Velxio 2.0 是一个基于浏览器的仿真工具，允许在浏览器中直接运行 Arduino、ESP32 和 Raspberry Pi 3 的环境。它加速原型设计、离线测试与教学，同时也揭示了浏览器仿真的局限性。

items.title_en: China is mass-producing hypersonic missiles for $99,000
items.title_zh: 中国以9.9万美元规模化生产高超音速导弹
items.summary_en: China is mass-producing hypersonic missiles at about $99,000 each, signaling a potential shift in regional security and arms competition. The move raises concerns about export controls, proliferation, and strategic stability.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，中国正以约9.9万美元的单价大规模生产高超音速导弹，可能改变区域安全格局与军备竞赛。此举引发对出口管制、军事扩散与区域战略稳定性的忧虑。

items.title_en: VNDB founder Yorhel has died
items.title_zh: VNDB 创始人 Yorhel 去世
items.summary_en: The death of Yorhel, founder of Visual Novel Database, marks the end of an influential project that centralizes metadata for visual novels and supports fans with an open, community-driven resource.
items.summary_zh: Visual Novel Database 创始人 Yorhel 去世，社区对他在推动视觉小说元数据汇总和开源数据项目方面的贡献表示缅怀，他的影响仍在持续。

items.title_en: Nashville library launches Memory Lab for digitizing home movies
items.title_zh: 纳什维尔图书馆推出 Memory Lab，用于数字化家庭影片
items.summary_en: A local library launches a Memory Lab to help residents digitize home movies, preserving personal histories and improving access to archival-quality media. The program exemplifies community-driven digital preservation and the role libraries play in safeguarding cultural memory.
items.summary_zh: 本地图书馆推出 Memory Lab，帮助居民将家庭影片数字化，保存个人记忆并提升档案质量的访问性。这体现了以社区为导向的数字保存，以及公共机构在保护文化记忆方面的作用。

items.title_en: The bot situation on the internet is worse than you could imagine
items.title_zh: 互联网上的机器人现象比你想象的更糟
items.summary_en: The piece argues that bot activity online is worse than commonly acknowledged, with automated content, manipulation, and fraud shaping discourse and security. It calls for stronger provenance, verification, and defensive measures.
items.summary_zh: 文章声称网络上的机器人活动比人们普遍认知的更糟，自动化内容、操纵和欺诈正在影响话语与安全。呼吁加强溯源、验证与防御措施。

items.title_en: Can you get root with only a cigarette lighter? (2024)
items.title_zh: 只用打火机就能拿到 root 吗？（2024）
items.summary_en: Researchers revisit a surprising hardware attack vector and show that a common cigarette lighter can act as a crude fault-injection tool to gain root access on a device. The write-up highlights how small, inexpensive hardware can create power transients or other disturbances that undermine security, underscoring the ongoing risk to embedded systems.
items.summary_zh: 研究者重新探讨了一个出人意料的硬件攻击路径，展示了常见打火机也可作为粗糙的故障注入工具，从而在某些设备上获得 root 权限。该文章强调廉价小型硬件也会造成电源瞬变等干扰，暴露嵌入式系统安全的脆弱性。

items.title_en: Newly purchased Vizio TVs now require Walmart accounts to use smart features
items.title_zh: 新买的Vizio电视现在需要Walmart账户才能使用智能功能
items.summary_en: New Vizio TVs require a Walmart account to access smart features, illustrating how device-maker partnerships with retailers can gate functionality and gather data. The change raises privacy concerns, user friction for non-Walmart shoppers, and questions about consumer choice in smart-home devices.
items.summary_zh: 新购买的Vizio电视现在必须绑定Walmart账户才能使用智能功能，体现了设备厂商与零售商的合作如何对功能访问和数据收集进行‘锁定’。此举引发隐私担忧、非沃尔玛用户的使用难度增加，以及对智能家居产品中消费者选择权的质疑。

items.title_en: Opera: Rewind The Web to 1996 (Opera at 30)
items.title_zh: Opera：让网络回到1996年（Opera 三十周年）
items.summary_en: Opera's 30th anniversary piece reflects on the browser's early innovations—speed dial, compression, and lightweight features—and how they shaped today’s UX. It draws lessons for building lean, privacy-conscious, feature-rich browsers.
items.summary_zh: Opera 三十周年纪念文章回顾了早期创新（如速度拨号、压缩等）如何影响现代网页体验，并提出面向轻量、隐私友好但功能丰富浏览器的启示。

items.title_en: OpenCiv1 – open-source rewrite of Civ1
items.title_zh: OpenCiv1：Civ1 的开源重写
items.summary_en: OpenCiv1 is an open-source rewrite of Civilization I, reimplementing its mechanics with modern code. It serves as a case study in retro game preservation and how modern tooling can re-create classics with improved modability and portability.
items.summary_zh: OpenCiv1 是 Civilization I 的开源重写，使用现代代码重新实现其机制。它展示了通过现代工具对经典游戏进行保存与再创作，并提升了可修改性与跨平台性。

items.title_en: Is it a pint?
items.title_zh: 到底是一品脱吗？
items.summary_en: An online tool that clarifies whether something is a pint, helping users navigate common measurement ambiguities. It showcases how unit confusion can creep into design and everyday decisions, with practical implications for product specs and UI.
items.summary_zh: 一个在线工具帮助用户区分品脱等常见体积单位，澄清日常尺寸上的混淆。该站点揭示单位误解在产品规格和用户界面设计中的实际影响。

items.title_en: Interoperability Can Save the Open Web (2023)
items.title_zh: 互操作性能拯救开放网络（2023）
items.summary_en: Interoperability is a key to preserving an open web by preventing walled gardens and enabling cross-platform data exchange. The piece outlines practical steps like shared standards and design that favors user agency, highlighting why interoperability remains central to a healthy online ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 互操作性是维持开放网络的关键，能防止“墙式”生态并促进跨平台数据互换。文章提出共享标准等具体做法，强调以用户自主为导向的设计，对健康的线上生态至关重要。

items.title_en: Show HN: Twitch Roulette – Find live streamers who need views the most
items.title_zh: Show HN：Twitch Roulette——发现最需要曝光的直播主
items.summary_en: Show HN: Twitch Roulette surfaces under-viewed streams to boost visibility, aggregating stream data to help creators reach new audiences. It reshapes discovery by highlighting creators who could benefit most from additional views.
items.summary_zh: Show HN: Twitch Roulette 将曝光度不足的直播间推向前台，帮助创作者接触新观众并提升可见度。该工具通过聚合数据来发现最需要曝光的主播，改变了观众的发现方式。

items.title_en: Order Granting Preliminary Injunction – Anthropic vs. U.S. Department of War [pdf]
items.title_zh: Anthropic 对美政府的初步禁令裁定（PDF）
items.summary_en: A court has granted a preliminary injunction in the Anthropic v. U.S. Department of War case, setting interim terms that will shape how the dispute proceeds.
items.summary_zh: 法院就 Anthropic 与美国战争部之诉发出初步禁令，规定了案件进展中的临时条款。

items.title_en: Show HN: Turbolite – a SQLite VFS serving sub-250ms cold JOIN queries from S3
items.title_zh: Show HN：Turbolite——将 SQLite VFS 与 S3 集成，实现冷数据下子 250ms 的 JOIN 查询
items.summary_en: Turbolite demonstrates a SQLite VFS that serves JOIN queries directly from S3 with sub-250ms cold-start latency. This approach enables fast analytical queries on object storage without a traditional DBMS, hinting at cost-efficient serverless data workflows and new caching strategies.
items.summary_zh: Turbolite 展示了一个将 SQLite VFS 与 S3 直接结合的方案，在冷启动下实现子 250ms 的 JOIN 查询。该思路为对象存储上的快速分析查询提供了新路径，可能推动无服务器数据工作流和缓存策略的发展。

items.title_en: BIO: The Bao I/O Coprocessor
items.title_zh: BIO：Bao I/O 协处理器
items.summary_en: An in-depth look at the Bao I/O coprocessor, a tiny accelerator designed to offload I/O tasks and increase efficiency in embedded systems. It examines architecture choices, potential uses, and what such a dedicated co-processor could mean for hobbyist and professional hardware.
items.summary_zh: 对 Bao I/O 协处理器的深入解读，介绍其用于分担 I/O 任务、提升嵌入式系统性能与安全的设计思路。文章探讨架构选型、潜在应用，以及这类专用协处理器对硬件爱好者与专业领域的影响。

items.title_en: Last gasps of the rent seeking class?
items.title_zh: 租金寻租阶层的最后喘息？
items.summary_en: This provocative piece argues that a segment of the tech-policy ecosystem is in decline as regulation and market dynamics shift, suggesting the era of rent-seeking may be ending and outlining potential implications for the industry.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章对科技行业中的租金寻租现象提出质疑，认为随着监管和市场格局的变化，这类获利方式正走向尾声。作者强调这会影响行业的商业模式和创新生态，并促使业界反思治理路径。

items.title_en: New Apple Silicon M4 and M5 HiDPI Limitation on 4K External Displays
items.title_zh: 新款 Apple Silicon M4 与 M5 在 4K 外接显示器上的 HiDPI 限制
items.summary_en: Apple's M4 and M5 chips reportedly limit HiDPI rendering on 4K external monitors, forcing the UI to render at a lower internal scale. This affects developers and designers who rely on crisp UI across 4K workflows, and may drive workarounds or deferred optimizations in OS and driver software. The issue highlights the tradeoffs of unified silicon design across internal and external displays.
items.summary_zh: 传闻称 Apple 的 M4 与 M5 芯片在 4K 外接显示器上对 HiDPI 渲染存在限制，导致界面以较低的内部比例渲染。这对依赖 4K 场景中清晰 UI 的开发者与设计师影响较大，或推动系统/驱动层面的变通办法与优化延期。此问题折射出统一芯片设计在内外显示的取舍。

items.title_en: Private equity turned vulnerable elderly people into human ATMs
items.title_zh: 私募股权把脆弱老人变成现金提款机
items.summary_en: Private equity ownership of care homes is laid bare as debt-fueled, profit-driven strategies degrade care and transfer costs to residents and public purse. The piece links financial engineering to deteriorating outcomes for elderly residents and staff, highlighting governance gaps in essential services.
items.summary_zh: 私募股权对养老护理机构的收购以债务驱动、以利润为导向的策略削弱护理质量，并将成本转嫁给居民与公共资金。文章将金融工程与老人护理结果恶化联系起来，凸显关键公共服务治理中的漏洞。

items.title_en: Ball Pit
items.title_zh: Ball Pit（球坑）
items.summary_en: Ball Pit is a playful browser-based 3D demo showcasing a ball-filled pit with interactive lighting and physics, illustrating how lightweight WebGL-like ideas can create immersive visuals.
items.summary_zh: Ball Pit 是一个有趣的浏览器 3D 演示，展示球坑的物理与光影效果，证明简单的网页技术也能带来沉浸式视觉体验。

items.title_en: Fear and denial in Silicon Valley over social media addiction trial
items.title_zh: 硅谷对社交媒体成瘾试验的恐惧与否认
items.summary_en: The BBC piece examines how Silicon Valley players respond to looming social media addiction trials, often framing them as political overreach or timing misalignment. It discusses industry concerns about regulation, public health labeling, and potential impacts on product design and revenue models.
items.summary_zh: BBC 报道探讨硅谷对即将到来的社交媒体成瘾相关试验的恐惧与否认，揭示行业对监管、公共卫生标签及其对产品设计与商业模式的潜在影响的担忧。

items.title_en: Improved Git Diffs with Delta, Fzf and a Little Shell Scripting
items.title_zh: 用 Delta、Fzf 和一点点 Shell 脚本提升 Git diffs
items.summary_en: A method to enhance Git diffs by combining Delta, FZF, and light shell scripting. The setup yields cleaner, more navigable diffs and a smoother workflow for code reviews.
items.summary_zh: 通过将 Delta、FZF 与简短的 Shell 脚本组合，改进 Git 的对比输出。该组合带来更清晰、易导航的差异查看，提升代码审阅过程的效率。

items.title_en: How and why to take a logarithm of an image [video]
items.title_zh: 如何对图像取对数（以及为什么）[视频]
items.summary_en: Demonstrates how and why to apply a logarithmic transform to images, explaining its use for dynamic-range compression and better visualization in certain pipelines. The walkthrough covers practical steps and common pitfalls.
items.summary_zh: 演示了对图像应用对数变换的原理与用途，解释其在动态范围压缩和特定处理流程中带来的可视化优势。讲解包含实操步骤与常见陷阱。

items.title_en: Intel Announces Arc Pro B70 and Arc Pro B65 GPUs
items.title_zh: 英特尔宣布 Arc Pro B70 与 Arc Pro B65 专业显卡
items.summary_en: Intel expands its Arc Pro line with B70 and B65 GPUs, targeting workstation workflows and AI-augmented tasks. The move signals Intel's push into higher-end GPUs amid competitive pressure from Nvidia and AMD, with implications for professionals in visualization, CAD, and AI workloads.
items.summary_zh: 英特尔推出 Arc Pro B70 与 B65 专业显卡，面向工作站级工作负载与 AI 加速任务。此举标志着英特尔在高端显卡市场的扩张，与 Nvidia/AMD 的竞争态势密切相关，或影响可视化、CAD 与 AI 工作流的专业用户。

items.title_en: I tried to prove I'm not AI. My aunt wasn't convinced
items.title_zh: 我试图证明自己不是 AI，但姑妈不信
items.summary_en: A first-person account of trying to prove human authorship amid AI, contrasted with a skeptical family member; the piece weighs the practical and philosophical challenges of distinguishing human versus machine-generated content.
items.summary_zh: 作者尝试在 AI 盛行的背景下证明自己是人的经历，突显真实性的挑战以及家人对人类创作的怀疑。讨论如何验证创作的来源以及 AI 的伪造能力的局限性。

items.title_en: curl > /dev/sda: How I made a Linux distro that runs wget | dd
items.title_zh: curl > /dev/sda：我如何做出能跑 wget | dd 的 Linux 发行版
items.summary_en: A provocative demonstration of bootstrapping a Linux distro by using curl to write to /dev/sda and dd, highlighting the fragility of ad-hoc bootstrap workflows and the need for verifiable images and secure boot.
items.summary_zh: 通过 curl 将输出写入 /dev/sda 再结合 dd，展示了用网络自举一个 Linux 发行版的极端做法，暴露了引导链的脆弱性。强调镜像签名与安全启动在实际部署中的重要性。

items.title_en: Iran-linked hackers have breached FBI director's personal emails
items.title_zh: 与伊朗相关的黑客入侵了 FBI 局长的个人邮箱
items.summary_en: Iran-linked hackers breached the FBI director's personal emails, illustrating persistent risks from state-backed cyber actors and prompting renewed emphasis on secure personal accounts and separation from official work channels.
items.summary_zh: 与伊朗相关的黑客入侵了 FBI 局长的私人邮箱，凸显来自国家级网络行为者的持续风险，并促使加强对个人账户的安全防护与与工作邮箱分离的政策考量。

items.title_en: Abusing Customizable Selects
items.title_zh: 滥用可定制的下拉选择框
items.summary_en: An examination of how customizable select controls can be misused in web apps, highlighting potential accessibility and security pitfalls. It offers safer alternatives and practical patterns for building robust, accessible UI.
items.summary_zh: 文章分析了可自定义的下拉框控件在实现中的滥用风险，揭示了可访问性与安全性方面的潜在漏洞。它提供更安全的实现模式与实践范式，帮助开发者构建鲁棒且易访问的界面。

items.title_en: How to attract AI bots to your open source project
items.title_zh: 如何吸引 AI 代理加入你的开源项目
items.summary_en: A practical guide on attracting AI bots to open source projects, covering API design, documentation, testability, and governance that make codebases scan-friendly for agents. It highlights the growing intersection of OSS and AI tooling.
items.summary_zh: 给开源项目吸引 AI 代理的实用指南，强调设计友好 API、完善文档、良好的测试性与治理结构等要素，以便 AI 代理可以更容易扫描和参与代码库。凸显 OSS 与 AI 工具日益交叉的趋势。

items.title_en: Overcoming the friendship recession
items.title_zh: 应对友谊衰退
items.summary_en: Opinion piece on the decline of everyday social connections and practical tips to rebuild meaningful friendships in a digitally saturated era.
items.summary_zh: 对日常社交关系下降的观点性文章，给出在数字化高密度环境中重建有意义友谊的实用建议。

items.title_en: Diverse perspectives on AI from Rust contributors and maintainers
items.title_zh: 来自 Rust 贡献者与维护者的 AI 观点多样性
items.summary_en: Rust maintainers discuss AI's impact on the language ecosystem, balancing excitement about AI tooling with concerns over safety, licensing, and governance.
items.summary_zh: Rust 社区的维护者们就 AI 对语言生态的影响展开讨论，在对 AI 工具带来生产力提升的同时，也担忧安全、许可和治理等问题。强调治理与社区共识在塑造 Rust 与 AI 未来中的作用。

items.title_en: A Review of Dice that came with The White Castle (2025)
items.title_zh: 随 White Castle 附带的骰子评测
items.summary_en: A discussion thread reviewing a dice set that came with a White Castle promotion, focusing on design, randomness, and nostalgia. Explores how promotional items intersect with gaming culture.
items.summary_zh: 评测随 White Castle 推广活动附赠的骰子，讨论设计、随机性与情感记忆，以及促销品如何与游戏文化交汇。

items.title_en: Looking at Unity made me understand the point of C++ coroutines
items.title_zh: 看 Unity 让我理解 C++ 协程的要点
items.summary_en: A reflection sparked by inspecting Unity's coroutine approach, clarifying why C++-style coroutines matter and how their design affects asynchronous programming and performance.
items.summary_zh: 通过研究 Unity 的实现，文章阐明了 C++ 协程的核心思想，并对比了 Unity 协程与原生协程的差异，强调异步工作流和性能优化的要点。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Founders of estonian e-businesses – is it worth it?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：在爱沙尼亚创办电子商务企业值得吗？
items.summary_en: A discussion on whether starting an e-commerce business in Estonia is worthwhile, covering factors like the e-Residency program, tax environment, regulatory ease, and access to talent and infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 讨论在爱沙尼亚创办电子商务企业是否值得，涉及如电子居留、税制、监管环境、人才与基础设施等因素。

items.title_en: America tells private firms to “hack back”
items.title_zh: 美国敦促私企对网络攻击者实施攻回
items.summary_en: The US urges private firms to hack back against cyber threats, a controversial stance that raises questions about legality, risk of collateral damage, and the need for coordinated defense.
items.summary_zh: 美国敦促私企对网络攻击者实施攻击回击的做法引发争议，涉及法律性、潜在的附带损害与需要协调防御的问题。

items.title_en: OpenBSD on Motorola 88000 Processors
items.title_zh: OpenBSD 在 Motorola 88000 处理器上的移植
items.summary_en: OpenBSD has an experimental port to the Motorola 88000 (M88000) architecture, a retro RISC design from the 1990s. The effort showcases how modern cryptography and security features can be exercised on legacy hardware, and it reflects the ongoing interest in supporting obscure architectures for research and preservation. The port also highlights challenges in toolchains and drivers for this vintage CPU.
items.summary_zh: OpenBSD 在 Motorola 88000 架构上完成实验性移植，这颗来自1990年代的老牌 RISC 处理器仍具研究与保留价值。此工作展示了在老硬件上实现现代安全特性与工具链的可行性，同时揭示了古老 CPU 在驱动和工具链方面的挑战。

items.title_en: Paper Tape Is All You Need – Training a Transformer on a 1976 Minicomputer
items.title_zh: 纸带就够用——在1976年迷你计算机上训练 Transformer
items.summary_en: A demonstration of training a Transformer on a 1976 minicomputer using paper tape and extremely limited memory. The project highlights how far AI tooling has evolved and what it takes to run modern models on vintage hardware, challenging assumptions about sets of resources required.
items.summary_zh: 在1976年的迷你计算机上，靠纸带等极端受限的资源训练 Transformer。这个演示凸显了 AI 工具与基础设施的飞跃，以及在复古硬件上运行现代模型所需的极端资源挑战。

items.title_en: Cyberattack on vehicle breathalyzer company leaves drivers stranded in the US
items.title_zh: 车辆呼气测试设备公司遭网络攻击，致多地司机滞留
items.summary_en: A cyberattack disrupted a vendor supplying vehicle breathalyzer hardware/software, leaving drivers stranded across the US. The incident underscores cybersecurity risks in connected-car ecosystems and how service outages can disrupt daily mobility and compliance with ignition-lock policies.
items.summary_zh: 一次针对供应车辆呼气式酒精检测设备厂商的网络攻击，导致美国多地司机被困。事件凸显了连接车生态系统的网络安全风险，以及服务中断对日常出行和防控合规的影响。

items.title_en: A Verilog to Factorio Compiler and Simulator (Working RISC-V CPU)
items.title_zh: Verilog 转 Factorio 的编译器与模拟器（可工作的 RISC-V CPU）
items.summary_en: A Verilog to Factorio compiler translates digital hardware descriptions into Factorio logic, enabling a working RISC-V CPU to be simulated inside the game. This opens up a playful yet educational avenue for hardware prototyping, reveals performance constraints of software simulators, and demonstrates creative cross-domain tooling.
items.summary_zh: Verilog 转 Factorio 的编译器把数字硬件描述转为 Factorio 逻辑，使游戏中的 RISC-V CPU 可被仿真。这为硬件原型设计提供了一种有趣且具教育意义的方式，也揭示了软件仿真在性能上的限制，同时展示跨领域工具的创造力。

items.title_en: I turned my Kindle into my own personal newspaper
items.title_zh: 我把 Kindle 打造成我的个人新闻报纸
items.summary_en: A reader describes turning a Kindle into a personalized newspaper by piping in RSS feeds and curated sections, delivering a distraction-free, bespoke flow of news. The setup demonstrates how consumer devices can be repurposed for lightweight information workflows with minimal tooling. It offers practical tactics for staying informed in a focused way.
items.summary_zh: 作者将 Kindle 改造成个性化新闻报纸，通过订阅 RSS 源和自定义栏目，打造无干扰、量身定制的新闻流。该做法展示了如何用常见设备和简单工具实现高效的信息工作流。为在信息泛滥环境中保持专注提供了实用方法。

items.title_en: Health NZ staff told to stop using ChatGPT to write clinical notes
items.title_zh: 新西兰卫生部提醒员工停止使用 ChatGPT 撰写临床笔记
items.summary_en: Health NZ staff are instructed to stop using ChatGPT for writing clinical notes, citing concerns about accuracy and patient privacy. The move reflects growing caution around AI-assisted medical documentation and governance needs.
items.summary_zh: 新西兰卫生部要求员工停止使用 ChatGPT 编写临床笔记，原因是准确性与患者隐私方面的担忧。此举反映出对 AI 医学文档的治理需求日益迫切。

items.title_en: Colibri – chat platform built on the AT Protocol for communities big and small
items.title_zh: Colibri — 基于 AT Protocol 的社区聊天平台，面向大小社区
items.summary_en: Colibri builds a chat platform on the AT Protocol to support federated communities of all sizes, highlighting the growing ecosystem of interoperable, decentralized social apps and the potential for scalable, privacy-respecting conversations.
items.summary_zh: Colibri 构建了一个基于 AT Protocol 的聊天平台，面向大小不同的社区实现去中心化的跨实例对话。该项目凸显了可互操作的分布式社交应用生态，以及在隐私保护与跨机构协作中的潜力。

items.title_en: Hong Kong police can now demand phone passwords under new security rules
items.title_zh: 香港警方在新安全规则下可强制索取手机密码
items.summary_en: New security rules expand police powers to request phone passwords, often with minimal safeguard requirements. Civil-liberties advocates warn this could erode privacy protections and set a precedent for broader surveillance. The change will influence how individuals defend their devices and how tech platforms design access controls.
items.summary_zh: 新安全规则扩大了警方对手机密码的索取权，通常几乎不设太多防护措施。公民自由倡导者警告这可能侵蚀隐私保护并为更广泛的监控定下先例。此举将影响个人如何捍卫设备、安全工具与平台的访问控制设计。

items.title_en: Android’s new sideload settings will carry over to new devices
items.title_zh: Android 新的侧载设置将随设备迁移
items.summary_en: Android is rolling over sideload allowances across devices, so users enabling unknown sources won't have to re-enable on every new device. The convenience comes with higher security risk, potentially broadening attack surfaces if devices are compromised or when switching accounts. It also signals a shift toward service- or account-level preferences rather than device-level toggles.
items.summary_zh: Android 将把侧载设置跨设备携带，用户在换设备时不再需要重新开启未知来源。此举提高了使用便利性，但也提升了安全风险，若设备被攻破或账户切换时可能增加攻击面。体现了将偏好与设置从单一设备迁移到账户/服务级别的趋势。

items.title_en: Show HN: ProofShot – Give AI coding agents eyes to verify the UI they build
items.title_zh: Show HN: ProofShot – 让 AI 编码代理具备验证 UI 的能力
items.summary_en: ProofShot enables AI coding agents to inspect and verify the UI they generate, acting as a visual verifier for automated UI construction. This reduces misalignment between intended design and rendered output, accelerating trusted AI-driven UI workflows. It showcases a practical approach to injecting human-in-the-loop feedback into automated UI pipelines.
items.summary_zh: ProofShot 让 AI 编码代理能够检查并验证它们生成的 UI，作为对自动化 UI 构建的可视化校验工具。它减少了设计意图与最终呈现之间的错配，加速了 AI 驱动的 UI 工作流程中的信任建立。展示了将人类在环反馈引入自动化 UI 流程的实际方法。

items.title_en: An unstoppable mushroom is tearing through North American forests
items.title_zh: 一种不可阻挡的蘑菇正在横扫北美森林
items.summary_en: A remarkable outbreak of a mushroom species is spreading through North American forests, threatening ecosystems and native trees. Researchers are racing to understand its spread mechanisms and mitigation options, as climate change and altered forest dynamics enable rapid expansion.
items.summary_zh: 一种不可阻挡的蘑菇正在北美森林扩散，威胁生态系统和本地树种。科学家正加紧研究其扩散机制与治理策略，气候变化和森林生态的变化让其蔓延速度加快。

items.title_en: Treason in the Futures Markets
items.title_zh: 期货市场中的背叛行为
items.summary_en: Paul Krugman argues that incentives and structural flaws in futures markets threaten price discovery and market integrity. He points to regulatory gaps and opaque practices that reward short-term bets over transparent risk pricing, calling for reforms to restore trust and stability. The piece blends economics with policy implications for investors and regulators.
items.summary_zh: 保罗·克鲁格曼指出，期货市场的激励结构与制度缺陷正在损害价格发现与市场诚信。某些不透明的做法让短期投机优先于透明的风险定价，暴露监管空白，他呼吁改革以重建信任与稳定。该文将经济学观点与监管对策结合起来，为投资者与监管机构提供洞见。

items.title_en: Show HN: A plain-text cognitive architecture for Claude Code
items.title_zh: Show HN：用于 Claude Code 的纯文本认知架构
items.summary_en: Presents a lightweight, plain-text cognitive architecture designed to orchestrate Claude Code's reasoning and coding tasks. The approach favors human-readable prompts and modular planning over heavy tooling, lowering the barrier to experimenting with AI-assisted coding.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一个轻量级的纯文本认知架构，用于编排 Claude Code 的推理和编码任务。该方法强调可读的提示与模块化计划，而非依赖复杂工具，降低 AI 辅助编码的试验门槛。

items.title_en: What came after the 486?
items.title_zh: 486 之后发生了什么？
items.summary_en: An exploration of what came after the 486 era, tracing CPU and PC architecture evolution and the forces shaping modern hardware. It connects historical milestones to current design choices.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 486 处理器时代之后的发展，梳理 CPU 与 PC 架构的演化及背后的推动力量。将历史里程碑与当前设计取向联系起来。

items.title_en: LLMs predict my coffee
items.title_zh: 大型语言模型预测我的咖啡
items.summary_en: A playful experiment where an LLM tries to predict your coffee order from context, highlighting both AI's approachable utility and its limits in day-to-day decisions. The exercise illustrates how language models can augment personal assistant tasks, but privacy and accuracy concerns remain.
items.summary_zh: 一个有趣的实验：大型语言模型试图根据上下文预测你的咖啡订单，展示了 AI 在日常助理任务中的潜力与局限。该练习突显了语言模型在生活场景中的应用价值，同时也引发关于隐私和准确性的讨论。

items.title_en: Coding Agents Could Make Free Software Matter Again
items.title_zh: 编码代理可能让自由软件再次有意义
items.summary_en: AI coding agents could lower barriers to contributions in free software, automating routine tasks and enabling more people to participate. The piece argues agents might revitalize community-driven software by accelerating collaboration and maintenance.
items.summary_zh: 人工智能编码代理有望降低贡献自由软件的门槛，自动化常规任务，让更多人参与其中。文章认为代理能通过加速协作与维护来重振以社区为驱动的软件生态。

items.title_en: My home network observes bedtime with OpenBSD and pf
items.title_zh: 我的家庭网络用 OpenBSD 与 pf 实现就寝时间表
items.summary_en: A home network project uses OpenBSD and pf to enforce a bedtime schedule, blocking or throttling traffic after designated hours. It demonstrates practical, privacy-conscious network management at home.
items.summary_zh: 一个家庭网络项目通过 OpenBSD 与 pf 实现就寝时间表，在指定时间段阻断或限制网络流量。展示了在家中进行实用且注重隐私的网络管理方法。

items.title_en: Philly courts will ban all smart eyeglasses starting next week
items.title_zh: 费城法院下周起全面禁止智能眼镜
items.summary_en: Philadelphia courts will ban all smart glasses starting next week due to privacy and security concerns in courtrooms. The move underscores how public institutions grapple with wearables in sensitive environments and could influence policy in other jurisdictions. Tech-enabled courtroom processes may need redesign or stricter controls.
items.summary_zh: 费城法院将于下周起全面禁止智能眼镜，原因在于法庭场所的隐私与安保考量。这一举措凸显公共机构在敏感场景中对可穿戴设备的挑战，可能影响其他地区的相关政策。使用科技的法庭流程或需重新设计并加强管控。

items.title_en: Building FireStriker: Making Civic Tech Free
items.title_zh: Building FireStriker：让公民科技免费开放
items.summary_en: Explains why FireStriker is making its civic tech tools freely available, arguing that open access accelerates public innovation and reduces vendor lock-in.
items.summary_zh: 阐述 FireStriker 将公民科技工具免费开放的原因，认为免费获取能加速公共创新、减少对厂商的依赖；文中讨论了可持续性、治理以及非营利模式如何放大影响。

items.title_en: The IBM scientist who rewrote the rules of information just won a Turing Award
items.title_zh: 改写信息规则的 IBM 科学家荣获图灵奖
items.summary_en: Celebrates Charles Bennett, an IBM scientist whose work on the physics of information earned him a Turing Award, underscoring foundational contributions to information theory.
items.summary_zh: 庆祝 IBM 科学家 Charles Bennett 因信息物理的贡献荣获图灵奖，强调他在信息理论方面的奠基性贡献。

items.title_en: You can run a DNS server (2025)
items.title_zh: 到 2025 年你也可以运行 DNS 服务器
items.summary_en: A practical look at running your own DNS server in 2025, covering recursive vs authoritative roles, privacy-first options like DoH/DoT, and deployment tips. Self-hosted DNS remains valuable for control, privacy, and reliability as public resolvers evolve.
items.summary_zh: 2025 年自建 DNS 服务器的实用指南，涵盖递归与权威 DNS 的区分、隐私优先的 DoH/DoT 方案，以及部署要点。自建 DNS 仍然在可控性、隐私和可靠性方面具备价值，尤其在公共解析服务不断演进之时。

items.title_en: Colorado House passes bill to limit surveillance pricing and wage setting
items.title_zh: 科罗拉多州众议院通过法案，限制基于监控数据的定价与工资设定
items.summary_en: Colorado's bill targets how data gathered through surveillance affects pricing and pay decisions. It would restrict dynamic pricing practices and the use of real-time data for setting pay, with aims of reducing discrimination and increasing transparency. If enacted, it could push companies to redesign data pipelines towards fairness.
items.summary_zh: 科罗拉多州众议院通过法案，限制利用监控数据进行定价与工资决策的做法。法案拟约束基于数据的动态定价以及用实时数据设定薪酬的行为，旨在减少歧视并提高透明度。若成为法律，可能促使企业重构数据流程，以提升公正性。

items.title_en: Stripe Projects: Provision and manage services from the CLI
items.title_zh: Stripe Projects：通过 CLI 配置与管理服务
items.summary_en: Stripe Projects lets developers provision and manage services from the CLI, enabling versioned infrastructure, GitOps workflows, and faster experimentation. It streamlines infrastructure provisioning and aligns Stripe tooling with modern DevOps practices.
items.summary_zh: Stripe Projects 让开发者能够通过 CLI 配置与管理服务，支持版本化基础设施、GitOps 工作流以及更快的实验循环。它将基础设施管理与 Stripe 的服务生态整合，提升开发效率。

items.title_en: The RISE RISC-V Runners: free, native RISC-V CI on GitHub
items.title_zh: RISE RISC-V 运行者：在 GitHub 上的免费原生 RISC-V CI
items.summary_en: RISE announces free, native RISC-V CI runners on GitHub, lowering barriers to building and testing software for RISC-V hardware. This empowers open-source projects to validate builds without relying on x86 infrastructure, accelerating ecosystem innovation. It signals broader industry support for RISC-V viability.
items.summary_zh: RISE 在 GitHub 上推出免费、原生的 RISC-V CI 运行器，降低了为 RISC-V 硬件构建和测试的门槛。开源项目可以不依赖 x86 基础设施即可验证构建，推动生态创新，体现业界对 RISC-V 可行性的广泛支持。

items.title_en: Should QA exist?
items.title_zh: QA 应该存在吗？
items.summary_en: Questions the traditional QA role and suggests rethinking how quality assurance fits in modern, fast-moving development with automation and integrated testing.
items.summary_zh: 质疑传统 QA 的角色，并提出在现代、快速迭代和自动化与集成测试环境中重新思考质量保证的定位。

items.title_en: Whistler: Live eBPF Programming from the Common Lisp REPL
items.title_zh: Whistler：在 Common Lisp REPL 中进行实时的 eBPF 编程
items.summary_en: Whistler enables live eBPF programming directly from a Common Lisp REPL, lowering the barrier to kernel-level experimentation and rapid prototyping.
items.summary_zh: Whistler 让在 Common Lisp REPL 中直接进行实时 eBPF 编程成为可能，降低了内核级实验的门槛并促进快速原型开发。

items.title_en: The way CTRL-C in Postgres CLI cancels queries is incredibly hack-y
items.title_zh: PostgreSQL CLI 的 Ctrl-C 取消查询实现极其 hacky
items.summary_en: Postgres' psql uses an unusually hacky method to cancel running queries via Ctrl-C, which can leave transactions in limbo and occasionally trigger inconsistent client-server state.
items.summary_zh: psql 在按 Ctrl-C 取消正在执行的查询时采用一种相当 hacky 的实现，可能让事务进入悬而未决的状态，甚至引发客户端与服务器之间的不一致。文章强调取消机制的脆弱性，以及为开发者和运维人员带来更清晰、无竞争条件的协议的必要性。

items.title_en: Telnyx package compromised on PyPI
items.title_zh: Telnyx Python SDK 的 PyPI 包遭遇供应链安全事件
items.summary_en: Telnyx warns that one of its Python packages on PyPI was compromised, prompting a security advisory and remediation steps. The incident underscores the ongoing risk of supply-chain attacks in the Python ecosystem and the need for provenance checks, code signing, and rapid response.
items.summary_zh: Telnyx 发出警告，PyPI 上的一个 Python 包遭到入侵，发布了安全公告并给出修复步骤。这一事件凸显了 Python 生态中供应链攻击的持续风险，以及对代码签名、来源可追溯性和快速响应的需求。

items.title_en: A retro terminal music player inspired by Winamp
items.title_zh: 一款受 Winamp 启发的复古终端音乐播放器
items.summary_en: A retro terminal music player inspired by Winamp demonstrates a nostalgic UI in a command-line app. It highlights how simple interfaces can deliver enjoyable media experiences without desktop GUI.
items.summary_zh: 一款受 Winamp 启发的复古终端音乐播放器，展示了命令行界面也能提供怀旧且愉悦的媒体体验。

items.title_en: I am leaving the AI party after one drink
items.title_zh: 我喝了一口就离开 AI 派对
items.summary_en: After a measured taste of AI's capabilities, the author decides to step away from the AI hype. The piece argues for disciplined governance, clear use-cases, and attention to long-term societal risks rather than chasing every new AI fad.
items.summary_zh: 在短暂接触 AI 能力后，作者决定离开 AI 热潮。文章主张制定克制的治理框架、明确的使用场景，以及对长期社会风险的关注，而不是盲目追逐新兴的 AI 热潮。

items.title_en: A laser-based process that enables adhesive-free paper packaging
items.title_zh: 一种激光工艺实现无粘合纸包装
items.summary_en: A laser-based process enables adhesive-free paper packaging, offering a sustainable alternative to traditional glues. The method promises strong seals and potential manufacturing efficiency, though it may require new equipment and process tuning. It highlights a move toward greener packaging technologies.
items.summary_zh: 一种基于激光的工艺实现纸包装的无粘合封口，提供比传统粘合剂更环保的替代方案。该方法可能实现强封口与潜在的制造效率提升，但需要新设备和工艺调试。体现了向更环保包装技术的转变。

items.title_en: Two studies in compiler optimisations
items.title_zh: 编译器优化领域的两项研究
items.summary_en: Two independent studies shed light on modern compiler optimisations, revealing how different strategies affect performance, binary size, and compile time. The findings suggest that optimization heuristics can have non-obvious trade-offs, informing developers about when and how to rely on aggressive optimizations.
items.summary_zh: 两项独立研究揭示了现代编译器优化的效果，展示了不同优化策略对性能、二进制大小和编译时间的影响。研究表明优化启发式可能存在非直观的权衡，帮助开发者判断在何时、如何使用积极的优化。

items.title_en: Agent-to-agent pair programming
items.title_zh: 代理对代理的结对编程
items.summary_en: Two AI agents collaborate to write and refine code, simulating a pair-programming workflow that can accelerate iteration and surface mistakes early. It covers collaboration strategies, potential gains in code quality, and the need for guardrails and human oversight to avoid drift or hallucinations.
items.summary_zh: 介绍两名 AI 代理协同进行结对编程，以加速编码迭代、早期暴露问题。讨论协作策略、潜在收益，以及避免偏离与幻觉等风险所需的 guardrails。

items.title_en: Data Manipulation in Clojure Compared to R and Python
items.title_zh: Clojure 数据处理：与 R 与 Python 的对比
items.summary_en: The article compares data manipulation ecosystems, highlighting Clojure's approach with functional pipelines versus R's data frames and Python's pandas/polars. It discusses expressiveness, composability, and performance trade-offs when doing data wrangling at scale, plus considerations for team skill sets and ecosystem maturity.
items.summary_zh: 文章比较了数据处理生态：Clojure 的函数式流水线方法与 R 的数据框和 Python 的 pandas/polars 的差异。讨论了表达力、组合性、以及大规模数据清洗的性能权衡，并就团队技能与生态成熟度给出思考。

items.title_en: Gzip decompression in 250 lines of Rust
items.title_zh: 用 Rust 仅 250 行实现 Gzip 解压
items.summary_en: A compact gzip decompressor implemented in 250 lines of Rust demonstrates how readable, dependency-free code can handle real-world compression. The post walks through the design choices for headers, blocks, and streaming decompression, with performance notes. It's a compact showcase of robust systems programming in Rust.
items.summary_zh: 展示了用 Rust 在仅 250 行代码下实现 gzip 解压的可能性，强调代码简洁性与无依赖实现的可读性。文中解析了头部、数据块及流式解压的设计要点，并附带性能评估。这是一个对 Rust 系统编程风格的简洁展示。

items.title_en: The European AllSky7 fireball network
items.title_zh: 欧洲 AllSky7 火球观测网
items.summary_en: Europe-wide AllSky7 coordinates autonomous cameras to detect and track fireballs and meteors across the night sky. The network enables large-scale data collection on asteroid and atmospheric events, contributing to research and public engagement in astronomy. Real-time alerts and archival data deepen understanding of near-Earth space.
items.summary_zh: 欧洲 AllSky7 全域性利用星空摄像头网络，统一协调观测火球与流星的轨迹与亮度数据。该网络扩展了天文观测覆盖范围，推动相关研究与公众参与，既有实时警报也有海量归档数据。

items.title_en: Bets on US-Iran ceasefire show signs of insider knowledge, say experts
items.title_zh: 美伊停火赌注或受内部消息影响，专家称迹象明显
items.summary_en: Experts warn that betting markets around a US-Iran ceasefire show signs of insider information shaping prices. The signals raise concerns about manipulation, information leakage, and the reliability of prediction markets for geopolitics.
items.summary_zh: 专家警告围绕美伊停火的博彩市场价格似乎受内部信息影响。此现象引发对操纵、信息泄露及地缘政治预测市场可靠性的担忧。

items.title_en: A Compiler Writing Journey
items.title_zh: A Compiler Writing Journey
items.summary_en: A personal look at building a compiler from first principles, sharing challenges, design decisions, and practical tips for hobbyists and professionals alike.
items.summary_zh: 这是一段关于从头开始构建编译器的个人经历，分享了遇到的挑战、设计取舍以及给开发者的实用建议。

items.title_en: Using FireWire on a Raspberry Pi
items.title_zh: 在树莓派上使用 FireWire
items.summary_en: A guide or project showing how to enable FireWire on a Raspberry Pi, expanding support for legacy peripherals and high-speed data interfaces. It covers practical wiring, drivers, and caveats.
items.summary_zh: 展示如何在树莓派上启用 FireWire，拓展对传统外设和高速数据接口的支持。包括实际连线、驱动与潜在注意事项。

items.title_en: They’re vibe-coding spam now
items.title_zh: 垃圾邮件现在在做氛围编码
items.summary_en: Spam is increasingly using vibe-coded signals to tailor messages to recipients' identities and contexts, aiming to bypass filters and boost engagement. The trend shows attackers exploiting cultural cues and sentiment to improve deliverability.
items.summary_zh: 垃圾邮件正越来越多地使用氛围编码来针对收件人进行个性化定制，以绕过过滤器并提升投递成功率。此趋势揭示攻击者在提升可达性时利用文化线索和情感共鸣的手段。

items.title_en: Cyber.mil serving file downloads using TLS certificate which expired 3 days ago
items.title_zh: Cyber.mil 使用已过期的 TLS 证书提供下载
items.summary_en: An official Cyber.mil download service was served over TLS with a certificate that expired three days earlier. The lapse risks trust and introduces MITM exposure, highlighting gaps in certificate lifecycle management for critical infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: Cyber.mil 的下载服务在 TLS 加密中使用了三天前就到期的证书，暴露了信任与中间人攻击的风险。此事凸显关键基础设施的证书生命周期管理薄弱，需要改进。

items.title_en: Hacking old hardware by renaming to .zip [video]
items.title_zh: 通过把固件改名为 .zip 来破解旧硬件（视频）
items.summary_en: A demonstration shows that renaming firmware packages to .zip can reveal internal files, enabling quick analysis or modification of older hardware. The clip underscores how simple packaging tricks expose security and maintenance gaps in legacy devices.
items.summary_zh: 演示显示将固件包改名为 .zip 即可解压出内部文件，便于对旧硬件进行快速分析或修改。视频凸显了简单的打包技巧可能暴露遗留设备的安全与维护漏洞。

items.title_en: LLM Neuroanatomy II: Modern LLM Hacking and Hints of a Universal Language?
items.title_zh: LLM 神经解剖学 II：现代 LLM 黑箱与普遍语言的线索？
items.summary_en: A sequel examining how LLMs map to internal structures, discussing modern hacking techniques and whether model representations hint at a universal language across tasks.
items.summary_zh: 续篇探讨 LLM 的内部结构与表征，讨论现代黑箱入侵技巧，以及模型表示是否暗示在多任务间存在普遍语言的线索。

items.title_en: Anthropic Subprocessor Changes
items.title_zh: Anthropic 子处理方变更
items.summary_en: Anthropic updated its list of subprocessors, affecting data handling and privacy commitments. The update may influence customers' trust and compliance posture.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 更新了子处理方名单，涉及数据处理与隐私承诺。此变更可能影响客户信任度与合规态势。

items.title_en: Netscape News Feed Straight Out of the Late 00s
items.title_zh: Netscape 新闻订阅源，重现千禧年末风格
items.summary_en: Netscape revives a news feed experience reminiscent of the late 2000s, leveraging modern delivery while nodding to early web-era interfaces. It illustrates how legacy brand aesthetics can influence contemporary content discovery experiences.
items.summary_zh: Netscape 重现了近十年前的新闻订阅体验，结合现代传递方式，同时致敬早期网页界面。这个案例显示了传统品牌美学如何影响当代内容发现体验。

items.title_en: Musketeer d'Artagnan's remains believed found under Dutch church
items.title_zh: 据称在荷兰教堂地下发现著名火枪手达塔尼昂的遗骸
items.summary_en: Archaeologists believe they may have found the remains of the famed musketeer d'Artagnan beneath a Dutch church. If verified, the find could offer fresh historical context for a figure immortalized in literature.
items.summary_zh: 考古学家称可能在荷兰一座教堂地下发现了著名火枪手达塔尼昂的遗骸。若证实，这一发现将为这位文学偶像化身的历史提供新的线索。

items.title_en: Gaza toddler returned with alleged torture wounds after Israeli detention
items.title_zh: 加沙幼童在以色列拘留后归还，疑似遭遇酷刑伤痕
items.summary_en: Reports claim a Gaza toddler, after detention by Israeli authorities, returned with injuries suggesting torture. This incident fuels ongoing debates about civilian protection and accountability in a volatile conflict, with investigations and medical assessments critical to verify claims.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，一名加沙地区幼童在以色列拘留后返回，身上疑似遭遇酷刑伤痕。这一事件再度引发关于平民保护与问责的辩论，需通过独立调查与医疗评估来核实指控。

items.title_en: Teaching Claude to QA a mobile app
items.title_zh: 教 Claude 对移动应用进行 QA
items.summary_en: Teaching Claude to QA a mobile app demonstrates how chat-based models can contribute to test planning, scenario generation, and bug triage. It shows practical approaches to injecting AI into QA workflows without sacrificing rigor.
items.summary_zh: 让 Claude 执行移动应用 QA 的尝试，展示了对话模型在测试计划、场景生成和缺陷分拣等环节的潜在作用。演示了将 AI 融入 QA 流程时可用的具体方法，同时强调需保持严格的质控。

items.title_en: Ju Ci: The Art of Repairing Porcelain
items.title_zh: Ju Ci：瓷器修复的艺术
items.summary_en: Ju Ci: The Art of Repairing Porcelain explores the craft of porcelain restoration, likely touching on traditional techniques and the philosophy of mending as an expressive art form.
items.summary_zh: Ju Ci：瓷器修复的艺术，探索修复的技巧与观念，将修复视为对历史的保留与美学表达。

items.title_en: How the world’s first electric grid was built
items.title_zh: 世界上第一座电网是如何建成的
items.summary_en: This piece traces the birth of the world’s first electric grid, from isolated generators to a interconnected network. It explains early engineering trade-offs around generation methods, reliability, and business models that shaped the nascent electrical industry—and why those early decisions still influence grid modernization today.
items.summary_zh: 本文讲述世界上第一座电网的建立过程，揭示了从单一发电厂到城市级网络的技术与制度挑战。早期在发电方式、网路可靠性和商业模式等方面的权衡，至今仍影响着现代电网的改造与升级。

items.title_en: Apple says no one using Lockdown Mode has been hacked with spyware
items.title_zh: 苹果称使用锁定模式的用户尚未被间谍软件入侵
items.summary_en: Apple says there have been no verified hacks of Lockdown Mode users, reinforcing the feature as a high-security option against targeted spyware. While encouraging, it also highlights the continuous adversarial arms race and that Lockdown Mode remains a best-effort safeguard for the most exposed users.
items.summary_zh: 苹果表示正在使用锁定模式的用户尚未被间谍软件入侵，强调该功能对高风险目标具有防护效力。尽管这是一项积极信号，但也凸显攻击方的持续攻防博弈——锁定模式并非全能，且仅对最暴露的用户有显著帮助。

items.title_en: Arm releases first in-house chip, with Meta as debut customer
items.title_zh: Arm 推出自研芯片，Meta 成为首任客户
items.summary_en: Arm announces its first in-house processor, with Meta as the debut customer, marking a notable shift as Arm moves toward more vertically integrated silicon. The move could influence licensing dynamics and signal growing demand for custom silicon in data-heavy workloads.
items.summary_zh: Arm 发布首款自研处理器，Meta 成为首批客户，标志着 Arm 在向垂直整合芯片迈出重要一步。此举可能影响授权格局，并体现对面向数据密集型工作负载的自定义芯片需求上升。

items.title_en: IRIX 3dfx Voodoo driver and glide2x IRIX port
items.title_zh: IRIX 系统上对 3dfx Voodoo 的 Glide 驱动与 Glide2x 的 IRIX 端口
items.summary_en: A port brings the Glide driver and Glide2x support to IRIX for the Voodoo graphics setup. The project demonstrates retro-graphics nostalgia and the persistence of open-source efforts to preserve legacy hardware.
items.summary_zh: IRIX 系统将承载 3dfx Voodoo 的 Glide 驱动与 Glide2x 的 IRIX 端口，重现经典显卡在旧系统上的运行。此举体现了对遗留硬件的热情与开源社区的保留工作。

items.title_en: The Resolv hack: How one compromised key printed $23M
items.title_zh: Resolv 黑客：单一被妥协的密钥如何打印出2300万美元
items.summary_en: The Resolv hack shows how a single compromised signing key enabled the attacker to move 23 million dollars in crypto, underscoring the critical importance of key management and secure signing in crypto ecosystems. The post outlines breach vectors and lessons for custodial and multi-sig setups.
items.summary_zh: Resolv 黑客事件显示，一把被妥协的签名密钥让攻击者获得了2300万美元的加密资产，凸显密钥管理和托管方案的关键性。文中梳理了入侵过程与对多签/托管体系的教训。

items.title_en: Embracing Bayesian methods in clinical trials
items.title_zh: 在临床试验中采用贝叶斯方法
items.summary_en: Advocates Bayesian methods for clinical trials as a way to use prior information and run adaptive designs, potentially speeding insights and reducing patient exposure. It also covers challenges like priors choice, computation, and regulatory acceptance.
items.summary_zh: 提倡在临床试验中采用贝叶斯方法，以利用先验信息并实现自适应设计，从而加速洞察并减少患者暴露；同时讨论先验选择、计算复杂性和监管接受度等挑战。

items.title_en: Sony V. Cox Decision Reversed
items.title_zh: Sony v. Cox 判决被推翻
items.summary_en: The Supreme Court reversed the Sony v. Cox decision, overturning the prior ruling.
items.summary_zh: 最高法院推翻了 Sony v. Cox 的判决。

items.title_en: Niche Museums
items.title_zh: 小众博物馆
items.summary_en: A look at niche museums highlights small, specialized collections and the communities they serve. It explores why preserving obscure artifacts matters and how these museums engage local audiences.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦小众博物馆，展示了小型、专业化馆藏及其服务的社区。文章探讨保护鲜见文物的意义，以及这些博物馆如何吸引本地观众。

items.title_en: ARM AGI CPU: Specs and SKUs
items.title_zh: ARM AGI CPU：规格与型号
items.summary_en: New details reveal SKUs and specifications for the ARM AGI CPU, outlining core counts, cache structure, memory bandwidth, and possible ISA extensions tailored for AI workloads. The lineup signals how Arm plans to balance performance, power, and software compatibility as AGI tasks scale across devices. For developers and OEMs, the specs map to anticipated optimization opportunities and ecosystem tooling.
items.summary_zh: ARM AGI CPU 的规格与型号清单曝光，涵盖核心数量、缓存结构、内存带宽，以及面向 AI 工作负载的 ISA 扩展等要点。该系列展示了 Arm 如何在 AI 任务大规模化时平衡性能、功耗与软件兼容性，便于开发者和原始设备制造商把握优化机会与生态工具链。

items.title_en: JavaScript Is Enough
items.title_zh: JavaScript 就够用
items.summary_en: JavaScript Is Enough argues that JS remains a remarkably capable platform for most web tasks and beyond, thanks to its ecosystem, tooling, and ubiquity. The piece challenges language-purity anxieties and invites readers to lean into pragmatic, monolingual development.
items.summary_zh: 主张 JavaScript 已足以应对大多数 Web 任务，得益于丰富的生态、工具链与广泛应用范围。文章挑战对语言纯粹性的执着，提倡以务实为先的开发思路。

items.title_en: Brute-forcing my algorithmic ignorance
items.title_zh: 用 LLM 在 7 天内暴力弥补我的算法无知
items.summary_en: Chronicles a personal experiment using a large language model to fill gaps in algorithm knowledge over a week, with insights on effective prompting and learning strategies. Highlights both potential and limits of AI-assisted self-education.
items.summary_zh: 记录在七天内利用大语言模型弥补算法盲点的个人实验，分享有效提示与学习策略。揭示 AI 辅助自学的潜力与局限。

items.title_en: Chicago artist creates tourism posters for city's neighborhoods
items.title_zh: 芝加哥艺术家为城市社区设计旅游海报
items.summary_en: A local art project turns neighborhood maps into vibrant tourism posters, highlighting community identities and drawing visitors.
items.summary_zh: 当地艺术项目以社区地图为灵感创作活力十足的旅游海报，突出社区身份并吸引游客。

items.title_en: What if AI doesn't need more RAM but better math?
items.title_zh: 如果 AI 不需要更多 RAM，而是需要更好的数学？
items.summary_en: The piece argues that AI efficiency could come from better math, models, and data representations rather than simply more memory. It discusses how clever mathematical reformulations and algorithmic improvements can yield higher performance with similar or even reduced RAM. The take is a reminder to focus on core abstractions and data structures.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为 AI 的提升并非单纯增加内存，而是来自更好的数学、模型和数据表达。讨论通过更聪明的数学重新表达与算法改进，在 RAM 相近或减少的条件下获得更高性能。提醒我们专注于核心抽象和数据结构。

items.title_en: NanoClaw Adopts OneCLI Agent Vault
items.title_zh: NanoClaw 采用 OneCLI Agent Vault
items.summary_en: NanoClaw integrates OneCLI Agent Vault to manage secrets for CLI agents, boosting security and ease of rotation across workflows. Signals growing emphasis on centralized secret management for developer tools.
items.summary_zh: NanoClaw 将 OneCLI Agent Vault 集成到工作流中，以安全地管理 CLI 代理凭证并简化轮换，体现对集中化凭证管理的重视。

items.title_en: Go Naming Conventions: A Practical Guide
items.title_zh: Go 命名约定：实用指南
items.summary_en: A practical guide to naming in Go, covering exported vs local identifiers, package naming, and API surface, with emphasis on consistency and readability. It helps teams avoid common anti-patterns and improve code quality.
items.summary_zh: Go 命名约定：实用指南，聚焦导出与内部标识、包名和 API 公开边界，强调一致性与可读性，帮助团队避免常见错误并提升代码质量。

items.title_en: Dataframe 1.0.0.0
items.title_zh: Dataframe 1.0.0.0 发布
items.summary_en: Haskell's Dataframe project reaches 1.0.0.0, signaling a stable API for tabular data manipulation in Haskell with a focus on type-safety and performance. The release highlights milestone features, documentation, and ecosystem maturity, inviting adoption in data-heavy Haskell projects.
items.summary_zh: Haskell 的 Dataframe 项目发布 1.0.0.0，标志着用于处理表格数据的 API 达到稳定阶段，强调类型安全与性能。该版本展示了里程碑特性、完善的文档与生态成熟度，鼓励在数据密集型的 Haskell 项目中使用。

items.title_en: A case against currying
items.title_zh: 对柯里化的反对意见
items.summary_en: Argues that currying can harm readability and debugging in real-world code, especially as function chains grow. The piece advocates pragmatic function design and cautions against overusing point-free styles.
items.summary_zh: 指出在实际代码中，柯里化可能降低可读性和调试性，尤其当函数链日益复杂时。提倡更务实的函数设计，警惕过度使用点-free 风格。

items.title_en: General Motors is assisting with the restoration of a rare EV1
items.title_zh: 通用汽车正在协助修复稀有的 EV1
items.summary_en: General Motors is helping restore the iconic 1990s EV1, highlighting renewed interest in historic electric vehicle tech. The collaboration underscores industry reverence for early EVs and potential lessons for modern electrification and preservation of automotive heritage.
items.summary_zh: 通用汽车正在协助修复标志性的1990年代 EV1，凸显业界对早期电动汽车技术的重新关注。该合作体现了对电动出行历史的尊重，也为现代电气化和汽车遗产保护带来启示。

items.title_en: My MacBook Keyboard Is Broken and It's Insanely Expensive to Fix
items.title_zh: 我的 MacBook 键盘坏了，修理竟然如此昂贵
items.summary_en: A personal lament on the high cost of MacBook keyboard repairs, reflecting broader concerns about repairability, hardware longevity, and consumer rights.
items.summary_zh: 作者记录了 MacBook 键盘故障的高昂维修成本，折射出对可修复性、硬件耐用性与消费者权益的担忧。

items.title_en: TSA lines are so out of control that travelers are hiring line-sitters
items.title_zh: TSA 排队混乱到旅客雇佣排队员
items.summary_en: TSA wait times have grown so long that travelers are hiring line-sitters to wait in lines for them. The trend highlights the strain on security throughput and the gig-economy responses to peak travel. It also prompts discussion about efficiency, pricing, and service design in public infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 由于 TSA 排队时间过长，旅客开始雇佣排队员代为排队。这反映出安检通行能力的压力以及高峰期的临时性服务市场，同时引发对公共基础设施效率、定价与服务设计的讨论。

items.title_en: Pompeii's battle scars linked to an ancient 'machine gun'
items.title_zh: Pompeii 的战斗伤痕与古代“机枪”相关
items.summary_en: Archaeologists link Pompeii's battle scars to an ancient rapid-fire weapon, a claim that is provocative but uncertain. If validated, it would rewrite what we know about Roman siege technology and the risks faced by the city.
items.summary_zh: 考古学家将庞贝城的战斗痕迹与古代快速发射武器相关联——尽管说法仍具争议。若相关结论成立，将改变人们对罗马战争技术的认识以及庞贝城在古代战争中的风险。

items.title_en: "Disregard That" Attacks
items.title_zh: “Disregard That” 攻击
items.summary_en: Explores a class of inputs named 'Disregard That' attacks that attempt to undermine model defenses or prompt-injection safeguards. The write-up highlights how such tactics test the resilience of AI systems and suggests practical mitigations.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一种名为“Disregard That”的攻击手法，旨在绕过模型的防护或提示注入防御。文章强调这类策略对 AI 系统鲁棒性的挑战，并提出可行的缓解思路。

items.title_en: The Future of SCIP
items.title_zh: SCIP 的未来
items.summary_en: SCIP's future outlines how the Software Component Identity Protocol will evolve to standardize component identities, improve SBOM usefulness, and streamline tooling across ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: SCIP 的未来展望软件组件身份协议如何演进，以提升软件供应链安全、互操作性和可溯源性。文章探讨治理、采用挑战，以及这对开发者、厂商和安全团队的影响。

items.title_en: Wikipedia bans AI-generated content in its online encyclopedia
items.title_zh: 维基百科禁止 AI 生成的内容
items.summary_en: Wikipedia bans AI-generated content to preserve verifiability and human-centric editing. The move pushes contributors to rely on transparent, citable sources and may accelerate tooling to verify provenance.
items.summary_zh: 维基百科宣布禁止 AI 生成内容，以维护可验证性和由人编辑的标准。此举促使编辑者坚持使用可追溯的来源，并可能推动对内容出自与出处的工具化验证。

items.title_en: Adults Lose Skills to AI. Children Never Build Them
items.title_zh: 成年人因 AI 失去技能，孩子们却从不培养这些技能
items.summary_en: AI-assisted workflows are eroding certain adult skills, from memory to basic calculation, while children may not develop those skills due to overreliance on automation. The piece warns about long-term cognitive and educational impacts and urges balanced use and targeted skill-building.
items.summary_zh: AI 辅助的工作流程正在侵蚀成年人部分技能，如记忆与基本计算，而儿童也可能因过度依赖自动化而未能培养相应能力。文章警示长期的认知与教育影响，并呼吁实现平衡使用与有针对性的技能培养。

items.title_en: Why are executives enamored with AI, but ICs aren't?
items.title_zh: 为何高管迷恋 AI，但一线工程师并不热衷？
items.summary_en: Executives chase AI for strategic leverage and measurable impact, but ICs worry about rising toil, opaque ROI, and skill erosion. The note argues for aligning incentives, reducing friction in workflows, and delivering tooling that genuinely eases engineers’ workloads.
items.summary_zh: 高管热衷于 AI，追求战略性杠杆和可衡量的影响；而一线工程师则担心工作负担增加、收益不透明和技能被边缘化。文章呼吁对齐激励、简化工作流程，并提供真正能减轻工程师负担的工具。

items.title_en: French e, è, é, ê, ë – what's the difference?
items.title_zh: 法语字母 e、è、é、ê、ë 的区别
items.summary_en: The differences among e, è, é, ê, and ë in French—how each diacritic alters pronunciation and spelling, with practical tips for learners and encoding considerations for software.
items.summary_zh: 讲解法语中 e、è、é、ê、ë 的发音与拼写差异，提供学习与编码时的实用要点，帮助学习者正确使用与输入。

items.title_en: AyaFlow: A high-performance, eBPF-based network traffic analyzer written in Rust
items.title_zh: AyaFlow：用 Rust 编写的高性能基于 eBPF 的网络流量分析器
items.summary_en: AyaFlow is a high-performance, Rust-based network traffic analyzer built on eBPF, enabling fast, safe, kernel-level visibility. It emphasizes memory safety and throughput for large-scale observability tasks. The project showcases Rust’s role in safe, efficient infrastructure tooling.
items.summary_zh: AyaFlow 是一个用 Rust 编写、基于 eBPF 的高性能网络流量分析器，提供快速且安全的内核级可观测性。该工具强调内存安全与高吞吐，适合大规模观测任务，体现了 Rust 在基础设施工具中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: No-build, no-NPM, SSR-first JavaScript framework if you hate React, love HTML
items.title_zh: 不构建、无 NPM、SSR 优先的 JavaScript 框架
items.summary_en: A new JavaScript framework markets itself as SSR-first, no-build, and no-NPM, aiming at HTML-first development and simple CDN-based deployments. It challenges conventional toolchains and promises lean, fast apps.
items.summary_zh: 一个新 JavaScript 框架以 SSR 为先、无需构建和 NPM 为卖点，面向 HTML 优先的开发场景与通过 CDN 部署的简化模式。对传统工具链构成挑战，承诺提供更轻量的应用体验。

items.title_en: Improving Composer through real-time RL
items.title_zh: 通过实时强化学习提升 Composer
items.summary_en: Real-time reinforcement learning is used to optimize a 'Composer' system, adapting its behavior on the fly to improve outcomes. The approach demonstrates how RL can tune tools in real time, potentially accelerating creative or automation workflows.
items.summary_zh: 通过实时强化学习对一个名为 Composer 的系统进行优化，系统能够在使用过程中实时自我调整以提升结果。该方法展示了 RL 在实时优化工具方面的潜力，或将加速创作与自动化流程。

items.title_en: Detecting file changes on macOS with kqueue
items.title_zh: 在 macOS 上用 kqueue 检测文件变更
items.summary_en: A guide to using kqueue on macOS to detect file changes, offering low-level primitives for building efficient file watchers and synchronization tools.
items.summary_zh: 介绍在 macOS 上使用 kqueue 监测文件变化，提供构建高效文件监听和同步工具的底层方法。

items.title_en: 21,864 Yugoslavian .yu domains
items.title_zh: 21864 个前南斯拉夫域名 .yu
items.summary_en: Documents 21,864 Yugoslav-era .yu domain names that linger online, tracing their history and persistence. It reflects on web-era heritage, DNS governance, and data preservation.
items.summary_zh: 记录并梳理仍在网上存在的 21,864 个前南斯拉夫时代的 .yu 域名，追溯其历史和持续性。折射出网络时代的遗产、DNS治理与数据保存的问题。

items.title_en: Show HN: Fio: 3D World editor/game engine – inspired by Radiant and Hammer
items.title_zh: Show HN：Fio：3D 世界编辑器/游戏引擎——受 Radiant 与 Hammer 启发
items.summary_en: Fio is a 3D world editor and game engine inspired by Radiant and Hammer, offering a modern open-source alternative for level design and tooling.
items.summary_zh: Fio 是一个受 Radiant 与 Hammer 启发的 3D 世界编辑器/游戏引擎，提供现代开源的关卡设计与工具链替代方案。

items.title_en: Show HN: QuickBEAM – run JavaScript as supervised Erlang/OTP processes
items.title_zh: Show HN：QuickBEAM——在监督的 Erlang/OTP 进程中运行 JavaScript
items.summary_en: QuickBEAM enables running JavaScript inside supervised Erlang/OTP processes, bridging the ergonomics of JS with the reliability of Erlang. It demonstrates cross-language orchestration within a fault-tolerant runtime. A glimpse into practical multi-language concurrency patterns.
items.summary_zh: QuickBEAM 使 JavaScript 可以在受监督的 Erlang/OTP 进程中运行，将 JS 的易用性与 Erlang 的可靠性结合起来，展示了在容错运行时内的跨语言协作模式。提供了一种实用的多语言并发实现思路。

items.title_en: Secure Domain Name System (DNS) Deployment 2026 Guide [pdf]
items.title_zh: 安全 DNS 部署 2026 指南（PDF）
items.summary_en: A comprehensive guide from NIST on deploying secure DNS technologies (DNSSEC, DoT/DoH) and operational practices for resilience. It serves as a practical reference for enterprises and public networks.
items.summary_zh: NIST 发布的 2026 年 DNS 部署指南涵盖 DNSSEC、DoT/DoH 及运维最佳实践，面向企业与公共网络提供可操作的韧性参考。

items.title_en: I quit editing photos
items.title_zh: 我不再编辑照片
items.summary_en: A personal essay about stepping back from manual photo editing, exploring how automation and AI tools affect creative control and time management.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享放弃手动图片编辑的决定，探讨自动化与 AI 工具对创作控制与时间管理的影响。

items.title_en: ICAO issued new power bank restriction on flight
items.title_zh: ICAO 发布飞行用充电宝的新限制
items.summary_en: ICAO tightened restrictions on carrying power banks on flights to reduce fire risk from lithium-ion batteries, affecting passengers and airline procedures. The policy pushes manufacturers and carriers toward safer design and handling.
items.summary_zh: 国际民航组织对随身携带充电宝的规定进一步收紧，限制容量并规范运输要求，以降低锂离子电池引发火灾的风险。新规将影响旅客、航空公司流程与厂商的安全设计。

items.title_en: Building a coding agent in Swift from scratch
items.title_zh: 从零开始用 Swift 构建编码代理
items.summary_en: A hands-on exploration of building a coding agent in Swift from scratch, covering architecture choices, tooling, and how to wire an LLM-powered assistant into a coding workflow.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇关于用 Swift 从零开始构建一个编码代理的实操文章，涵盖架构设计、工具链以及将 AI 能力整合到代码助手中的做法。

items.title_en: American Aviation Is Near Collapse
items.title_zh: 美国航空业近乎崩溃
items.summary_en: A sobering analysis of structural fragilities in American aviation, highlighting TSA, DHS, and operational failures that threaten reliability and resilience, with policy and market implications.
items.summary_zh: 对美国航空业的结构性脆弱性进行警示性审视，聚焦机场安检、政府监管和运营失败对可靠性与韧性的影响，以及对政策与市场的潜在含义。

items.title_en: Building a Blog with Elixir and Phoenix
items.title_zh: 用 Elixir 与 Phoenix 构建博客
items.summary_en: A practical guide to building a blog with Elixir and Phoenix, covering routing, templating, and live features to showcase the framework’s performance and real-time capabilities for a small CMS-style project.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇用 Elixir 与 Phoenix 构建博客的实操指南，涵盖路由、模板和实时特性，展示该框架在小型内容管理型项目中的性能与实时能力。

items.title_en: Optimizing a lock-free ring buffer
items.title_zh: 无锁环形缓冲区的优化
items.summary_en: An exploration of optimizing a lock-free ring buffer, focusing on reducing contention and improving throughput in concurrent data structures. Practical techniques and trade-offs are discussed.
items.summary_zh: 对无锁环形缓冲区的优化进行探讨，聚焦降低竞争、提升并发吞吐量的实用技巧和权衡。

items.title_en: Show HN: Create a full language server in Go with 3.17 spec support
items.title_zh: Show HN：用 Go 语言实现的完整语言服务器，支持 3.17 版规范
items.summary_en: A Show HN project presents a full Language Server Protocol implementation in Go with support for the 3.17 spec. It demonstrates Go's suitability for building editors' code-analysis backends and diagnostics engines. For developers, it lowers the barrier to adding language features to editors and IDEs.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了一个用 Go 实现、支持 3.17 规范的完整语言服务器协议实现。该项目证明了 Go 在构建编辑器的代码分析后端与诊断引擎方面的适用性，并为在编辑器/IDE 中加入语言特性提供了更低的门槛。

items.title_en: Show HN: DuckDB community extension for prefiltered HNSW using ACORN-1
items.title_zh: Show HN：DuckDB 社区扩展，基于 ACORN-1 的预筛选 HNSW
items.summary_en: DuckDB gains a community extension that prefilters HNSW with ACORN-1 to speed up vector search inside analytics workloads. This keeps vectorized analytics fast without relying on external search services, benefiting ML and embedding-heavy workflows.
items.summary_zh: DuckDB 获得一个社区扩展，将 ACORN-1 的预筛选 HNSW 引入以加速分析工作负载中的向量检索。无需外部搜索服务即可实现更快的向量分析，利于嵌入和机器学习密集型的工作流。

items.title_en: WolfGuard: WireGuard with FIPS 140-3 cryptography
items.title_zh: WolfGuard：带 FIPS 140‑3 加密的 WireGuard
items.summary_en: WolfGuard is a WireGuard-focused project that implements FIPS 140-3 cryptography, aligning VPN tech with government-grade security standards. This makes it appealing for regulated industries or sensitive deployments, though it may come with certification overhead and potential compatibility considerations with standard WireGuard deployments.
items.summary_zh: WolfGuard 是一个聚焦于 WireGuard 的项目，实现了 FIPS 140-3 加密，确保 VPN 技术符合政府等级的安全标准。对合规行业或敏感部署具有吸引力，但可能伴随认证成本和与常规 WireGuard 部署的兼容性挑战。

items.title_en: Undroidwish – A single-file, batteries-included Tcl/Tk binary for many platforms
items.title_zh: Undroidwish — 一个跨平台的单文件 Tcl/Tk 二进制包
items.summary_en: Undroidwish ships a self-contained Tcl/Tk binary in a single file, enabling running Tcl/Tk apps across platforms without extra dependencies.
items.summary_zh: Undroidwish 提供单文件自包含的 Tcl/Tk 二进制，在多平台上无需额外依赖即可运行 Tcl/Tk 应用。

items.title_en: MSA: Memory Sparse Attention
items.title_zh: MSA：记忆稀疏注意力
items.summary_en: MSA introduces memory-sparse attention to reduce memory and compute for long-context models, enabling scalable attention with less quadratic cost. This can impact how we design and train larger sequences.
items.summary_zh: MSA 提出记忆稀疏注意力，降低长上下文模型的内存与计算需求，使注意力计算更具可扩展性，或促使更大上下文的训练与推理。

items.title_en: Migrating the American express payment network, twice
items.title_zh: 两次迁移美国运通支付网络
items.summary_en: The post chronicles American Express's payment network migration, detailing the challenges of moving high-availability financial rails and lessons for fintech teams migrating mission-critical services. It underscores careful API design, data migration, and risk management when changing payment networks.
items.summary_zh: 文中回顾美国运通支付网络的两次迁移，分析在迁移高可用金融系统时的挑战、架构取舍与对开发者和商家的影响。强调在支付网络迁移中需关注 API 设计、数据迁移和风控等关键要点。

items.title_en: 15 Years of Forking
items.title_zh: 十五年的分叉历史
items.summary_en: Waterfox marks 15 years as a Firefox fork, highlighting the enduring appeal and trade-offs of open-source forks. The retrospective examines how forks influence innovation, governance, and user choice, shaping a broader ecosystem beyond the original project. It also reflects on community dynamics and maintainership over time.
items.summary_zh: Waterfox 作为 Firefox 的分叉走过15年，凸显开源分叉的持续魅力与取舍。回顾探讨了分叉如何影响创新、治理与用户选择，并塑造原项目之外的生态系统，同时反映社区动态与维护者长期演变。

items.title_en: BIO – The Bao I/O Co-Processor
items.title_zh: BIO：Bao I/O 协处理器
items.summary_en: Crowd Supply updates introduce BIO, a dedicated I/O co-processor for Bao hardware that handles GPIO and peripheral interfacing, offloading work from the main microcontroller. The design aims to boost performance, simplify firmware, and enable more deterministic timing for embedded projects, with potential power and responsiveness benefits.
items.summary_zh: Crowd Supply 的更新介绍了 BIO（Bao I/O 协处理器），它作为 Bao 硬件的专用 I/O 协处理器，承担 GPIO 及外设接口的处理，减轻主控芯片的负担。此设计旨在提升性能、简化固件并实现更确定性的时序，对嵌入式项目有潜在的功耗和响应优势。

items.title_en: The rise and fall of IBM's 4 Pi aerospace computers: an illustrated history
items.title_zh: IBM 的 4 Pi 航空航天计算机的兴衰：图解历史
items.summary_en: An illustrated history tracing IBM’s 4 Pi aerospace computers, charting their rise, use in aviation systems, and eventual decline. It offers a nostalgic yet informative tech lineage.
items.summary_zh: 通过图解历史追溯 IBM 的 4 Pi 航空航天计算机，描绘其兴起、在航空系统中的应用以及最终衰落。文章揭示早期航天计算如何影响嵌入式、实时系统的工作流与后续硬件设计决策，提供既怀旧又具教育意义的技术脉络。

items.title_en: 1929: Inside the Greatest Crash in Wall Street History
items.title_zh: 1929：华尔街历史上最大的崩盘内幕
items.summary_en: The article dissects the 1929 crash, showing how speculation, margin debt, and information gaps precipitated a rapid collapse. It traces how the crisis spurred landmark reforms and shaped market structure, offering a reminder of how fragile financial systems remain under stress.
items.summary_zh: 本文剖析 1929 年崩盘的成因：投机热、杠杆与信息不对称叠加，导致市场快速崩溃。它追踪了危机如何推动里程碑式的金融改革和市场结构调整，提醒人们在压力之下金融体系的脆弱性。

items.title_en: The AI Industry Is Lying to You
items.title_zh: AI 行业在欺骗你
items.summary_en: An opinion piece argues that hype around AI overstates capabilities and obscures risks, urging skepticism and demand for transparency, governance, and responsible deployment. It questions the marketing of AGI as imminent and calls for nuance in interpreting model performance and limitations.
items.summary_zh: 一篇观点文章认为对 AI 的宣传过于夸大能力、掩盖风险，呼吁保持怀疑态度、提升透明度、加强治理，并在部署时负责任地权衡。文章质疑将通用人工智能的实现过度渲染为近在眼前，并强调对模型性能与局限性的审慎解读。

items.title_en: There is No Spoon. A software engineers primer for demystified ML
items.title_zh: 没有勺子：软件工程师的去神秘化机器学习入门
items.summary_en: A primer aimed at software engineers to demystify machine learning, clarifying capabilities, limits, and practical integration patterns. It pushes back on hype and offers actionable guidance for engineering teams adopting ML in production. The piece emphasizes pragmatic, real-world ML applications over magic.
items.summary_zh: 面向软件工程师的 ML 入门，去除神秘感，澄清能力、边界与實践落地的整合模式。文章抵制噱头，给出在生产环境中采用 ML 的可执行建议，强调务实的、真实世界的应用而非幻想。

items.title_en: When do we become adults, really?
items.title_zh: 我们到底什么时候真正成年？
items.summary_en: The essay blends psychology and culture to challenge fixed age thresholds for adulthood, exploring how responsibility and identity mature across life stages. It prompts reflection on how society defines and supports coming of age.
items.summary_zh: 本文结合心理学与文化，质疑对成年的固定年龄门槛，探讨责任与身份如何在不同阶段成熟。引发对社会如何界定与支持成年过程的反思。

items.title_en: Show HN: Gridland: make terminal apps that also run in the browser
items.title_zh: Show HN：Gridland——让终端应用也能在浏览器运行
items.summary_en: Gridland lets terminal apps run in the browser, offering a seamless CLI experience across local and cloud environments. By unifying terminal interactions, it can simplify demos, remote development, and portable workflows for developers.
items.summary_zh: Show HN: Gridland 让终端应用也能在浏览器中运行，打通本地 CLI 和网页界面的体验。该工具有望 Simplify 演示、远程协作和跨环境开发的工作流。

items.title_en: Show HN: AI Roundtable – Let 200 models debate your question
items.title_zh: Show HN：AI 圆桌—让 200 个模型就一个问题辩论
items.summary_en: Show HN demonstrates AI Roundtable, coordinating 200 models to debate a single question to surface diverse viewpoints and reduce single-model bias. The approach promises richer reasoning but raises concerns about cost, coordination, and result reliability.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了 AI 圆桌，协调 200 个模型就同一问题展开辩论，以汇聚多样观点并降低单一模型偏见。本方法在提升推理丰富度方面具有潜力，但也带来成本、协作与结果可信度等担忧。

items.title_en: Study: 'Security Fatigue' May Weaken Digital Defenses
items.title_zh: 研究称“安全疲劳”可能削弱数字防御
items.summary_en: A study finds that security fatigue may erode digital defenses as users tire of strict practices. The findings argue for better UX, stronger defaults, and more practical security messaging.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现安全疲劳可能削弱数字防御，因为用户对严格的安全做法感到疲惫。研究建议通过更友好的用户体验、更强的默认设置和更实用的安全信息来改善。

items.title_en: More precise elevation data for GraphHopper routing engine
items.title_zh: GraphHopper 路由引擎的更精确海拔数据
items.summary_en: Higher-precision elevation data enhances gradient calculations, yielding more reliable routes for cyclists and electric vehicles. The update improves elevation profiles and reduces routing errors, enabling terrain-aware planning and better energy estimates.
items.summary_zh: 更新引入更高精度的海拔数据，使坡度计算更准确，骑行和电动车等场景的路线规划更可靠。提升海拔剖面并降低路由误差，支持地形感知的路径优化和更准确的能耗估算。

items.title_en: A 6502 disassembler with a TUI: A modern take on Regenerator
items.title_zh: 带 TUI 的 6502 反汇编器：Regenerator 的现代版本
items.summary_en: A modern Regenerator-inspired 6502 disassembler with a terminal UI, making retro reverse engineering approachable for hobbyists and researchers.
items.summary_zh: 受 Regenerator 启发的带有终端 UI 的 6502 反汇编器，为爱好者与研究者提供更易上手的复古逆向工程工具。

items.title_en: Country that put backdoors in Cisco routers to spy on world bans foreign routers
items.title_zh: 某国在思科路由器中植入后门以实施全球监视，现禁止进口外国路由器
items.summary_en: A country reportedly embedded backdoors in Cisco routers to facilitate surveillance and has banned foreign-made routers.
