The incident highlights geopolitical risk in critical infrastructure supply chains and underscores the need for hardened, trusted hardware and diversified sourcing.
items.summary_zh: 有报道称某国在思科路由器中植入后门以便进行监控，现禁止进口外国路由器。这一事件凸显关键基础设施供应链的地缘政治风险，并强调对更可信任的硬件与多元采购的需求。

items.title_en: An Aural Companion for Decades, CBS News Radio Crackles to a Close
items.title_zh: 几十年的听觉陪伴，CBS 新闻广播走向终章
items.summary_en: After decades as a staple in US news radio, CBS News Radio is entering a new phase as its app winds down, reflecting a broader shift in how audiences consume audio news. The shift underscores the fragility of long-running radio platforms in the streaming era.
items.summary_zh: CBS 新闻广播作为长期的新闻收听渠道，即将进入新阶段，相关应用逐步下线，凸显观众获取音频新闻方式在流媒体时代的转变。

items.title_en: rpg.actor Game Jam
items.title_zh: rpg.actor 游戏创作马拉松
items.summary_en: The RPG.Actor Game Jam invites developers to build RPG systems using their toolkit, emphasizing rapid prototyping, modular architecture, and creative tooling. It highlights how community-led jams can accelerate tooling and game design ideas.
items.summary_zh: RPG.Actor 社区举办的游戏创作马拉松，鼓励开发者使用其工具包快速原型化 RPG 系统，强调模块化设计与创意工具的协同。

items.title_en: The Legibility of Serif and Sans Serif Typefaces (2022)
items.title_zh: 衬线体与无衬线体的易读性（2022）
items.summary_en: A 2022 study quantifies how serif and sans-serif typefaces fare in legibility on screens, with nuanced findings across reading tasks and sizes. The results inform typography choices for UI and accessibility, suggesting practical trade-offs between aesthetics and readability. Designers can tailor typography to context, audience, and device.
items.summary_zh: 2022 年的研究比较了衬线体与无衬线体在屏幕上的可读性，结果揭示不同任务和字号下的差异。对 UI 字体选择与无障碍设计具有指导意义，强调在美观与易读之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Ordered dithering with arbitrary or irregular colour palettes (2023)
items.title_zh: 使用任意或不规则调色板的有序抖动（2023）
items.summary_en: Technical: discusses ordered dithering algorithms for arbitrary color palettes, perhaps improvements on Floyd-Sloyd illusions; 2-3 sentences about method and practical uses in image processing or art software, color quantization.
items.summary_zh: 介绍在任意或不规则调色板上实现有序抖动的技术方法，涵盖颜色映射和误差扩散的要点，以及在图像处理与数字艺术中的实际应用。

items.title_en: Show HN: Sheet Ninja – Google Sheets as a CRUD Back End for Vibe Coders
items.title_zh: Show HN：Sheet Ninja——将 Google 表格作为 Vibe Coders 的 CRUD 后端
items.summary_en: Sheet Ninja turns Google Sheets into a CRUD backend for Vibe Coders, enabling quick prototyping and lightweight data-backed apps without a separate database. It lowers barriers for small teams to ship functional data-driven tools. The approach invites exploration of data tooling that leverages familiar spreadsheet workflows.
items.summary_zh: Sheet Ninja 将 Google 表格转换为 Vibe Coders 的 CRUD 后端，使团队能够在无需独立数据库的情况下快速原型化和构建数据驱动的应用。为小团队提供了更低的门槛来发布具备数据支持的工具，同时引发对利用熟悉的表格工作流来构建数据工具的思考。

items.title_en: Designing AI for Disruptive Science
items.title_zh: 为颠覆性科学设计 AI
items.summary_en: Designing AI for Disruptive Science outlines how AI can accelerate scientific discovery, with design principles for AI agents operating in research contexts.
items.summary_zh: Designing AI for Disruptive Science 概述 AI 如何加速科学发现，并给出研究场景中 AI 代理的设计原则。

items.title_en: Trust signals as sparklines for Hacker News
items.title_zh: 将信任信号做成 Hacker News 的迷你曲线图
items.summary_en: A project visualizes trust signals on Hacker News as sparklines, giving readers a quick glance at the quality or reliability of stories beyond upvotes. It explores augmenting signals in social news to combat noise.
items.summary_zh: 一个项目把 Hacker News 的信任信号以 Sparklines 的形式可视化，供读者快速判断故事的质量与可靠性。它探讨在社交新闻中通过信号增强来降低噪声。

items.title_en: The Last Testaments of Richard II and Henry IV
items.title_zh: 理查二世与亨利四世的最后遗嘱
items.summary_en: An historical feature examining the last testaments of Richard II and Henry IV, shedding light on monarchy, succession, and political culture in late medieval England.
items.summary_zh: 通过对理查二世与亨利四世最后遗嘱的分析，揭示中世纪英格兰君主制、继承权与政治文化的线索与影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Optio – Orchestrate AI coding agents in K8s to go from ticket to PR
items.title_zh: Show HN：Optio——在 Kubernetes 中编排 AI 编码代理，从工单到 PR
items.summary_en: Optio demonstrates orchestrating AI coding agents inside Kubernetes to transform a software ticket into a pull request. It showcases scalable AI-assisted development workflows and the practical challenges of containerized automation.
items.summary_zh: Optio 展示了在 Kubernetes 里编排 AI 编码代理，把一个工单推进成代码改动的 Pull Request。该项目体现了可扩展的 AI 辅助开发工作流及在容器化环境中实施自动化的实际挑战。

items.title_en: From 0% to 36% on Day 1 of ARC-AGI-3
items.title_zh: ARC-AGI-3 首日实现从 0% 到 36% 的跃进
items.summary_en: ARC-AGI-3 shows rapid early progress, jumping from 0% to 36% on day one. The result hints at aggressive development and potential near-term capability gains, albeit early and with uncertainties about sustainment.
items.summary_zh: ARC-AGI-3 首日实现从 0% 到 36% 的跃进，显示出快速的初期提升。尽管尚在初期阶段且持续性未可知，但暗示着在短期内可能出现能力提升。

items.title_en: Show HN: Veil – Dark mode PDFs without destroying images, runs in the browser
items.title_zh: Show HN：Veil——在浏览器中实现暗模式 PDF 而不破坏图片
items.summary_en: Veil enables browser-based dark-mode PDFs without degrading embedded images, improving readability while preserving media.
items.summary_zh: Veil 使浏览器中的 PDF 支持暗模式，同时不损坏图片，提升可读性并保留媒体质量。

items.title_en: I'll buy your electronics to feed our robot
items.title_zh: 我会买下你的电子产品来喂养我们的机器人
items.summary_en: A platform concept proposing to buy used electronics to repurpose for robotics, highlighting circular economy implications and the challenges of hardware sourcing for automation projects. It signals a market opportunity for refurbishment and reuse.
items.summary_zh: 一个提出回收旧电子设备并转用于机器人领域的平台设想，凸显循环经济及自动化项目在硬件采购上的挑战，同时指向翻新与再利用的市场机会。

items.title_en: I created my first AI-assisted pull request
items.title_zh: 我创建了我的第一份 AI 辅助的拉取请求
items.summary_en: I created my first AI-assisted pull request, sharing practical experience with AI-assisted coding workflows.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享了自己的第一份 AI 辅助的拉取请求，讨论 AI 助力下的编码工作流的效率与潜在的质量控制问题。

items.title_en: I wrote a 750-page guide to self-hosting production apps
items.title_zh: 我写了一本750页的自托管生产应用指南
items.summary_en: A 750-page guide to self-hosting production apps lays out architecture, security, backups, and operational workflows for running services on self-hosted infrastructure. The work underscores ongoing interest in guardrails and autonomy in deployment.
items.summary_zh: 一份 750 页的自托管生产应用指南，系统讲述了在自托管基础设施上运行服务的架构、安保、备份和部署工作流，体现对自主部署的持续追求。

items.title_en: Cloudflare's Gen 13 servers: trading cache for cores for 2x performance
items.title_zh: Cloudflare 第13代服务器：以核心换缓存 实现 2 倍性能
items.summary_en: Cloudflare unveils Gen 13 servers, trading cache capacity for more CPU cores. The shift yields roughly 2x performance on compute-heavy edge tasks, reflecting how edge infrastructure is prioritizing parallelism over cache for certain workloads.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 发布 Gen 13 服务器，牺牲部分缓存以换取更多 CPU 核心。在计算密集的边缘任务上，性能提升约为 2 倍，体现边缘基础设施在某些工作负载上更强调并行性。

items.title_en: Cat Itecture: Better Cat Window Boxes (2023)
items.title_zh: Cat Itecture：更好的猫咪窗台盒设计
items.summary_en: Cat Itecture explores design-forward window boxes tailored for cats, balancing safety, accessibility, and aesthetic appeal. The piece blends practical engineering with playful architecture, offering ideas that pet owners and makers can borrow to improve indoor cat habitats.
items.summary_zh: Cat Itecture 讨论面向猫咪的窗台盒设计，兼顾安全、可达性与美观性。将实用工程与趣味建筑结合，给宠物主人和创客提供提升室内猫咪栖息空间的灵感。

items.title_en: EMachines never obsolete PCs: More than a meme
items.title_zh: eMachines 永不过时的 PC：不只是梗
items.summary_en: Argues that eMachines PCs remain useful and relevant beyond memes, especially for budget-friendly, basic tasks or as repurposed hardware for niche projects. The piece revisits the durability and value of legacy hardware.
items.summary_zh: 认为 eMachines 的 PC 仍然实用且具有现实价值，尤其是用于预算友好、基础任务，或作为旧硬件在特定项目中的再利用。回顾了老旧硬件的耐用性与价值。

items.title_en: I Reverse-Engineered the TiinyAI Pocket Lab from Marketing Photos
items.title_zh: 我从营销照片逆向分析了 TiinyAI Pocket Lab
items.summary_en: The author reverse-engineers TiinyAI Pocket Lab by analyzing marketing photos, revealing internal components and performance limits; demonstrates how product marketing can hint at specs and prompts discussion about transparency in consumer hardware.
items.summary_zh: 作者据市场宣传照对 TiinyAI Pocket Lab 进行反向工程，揭示内部构造、关键部件及性能约束。文章还讨论如何通过宣传图推断产品规格，以及这类做法对消费者透明度的影响。

items.title_en: What happened to GEM?
items.title_zh: GEM 到底发生了什么？
items.summary_en: GEM, once a notable project/tool, faded from prominence; the piece investigates its rise and decline, drawing lessons on sustainability, community support, and tooling market dynamics.
items.summary_zh: GEM 曾是备受关注的项目/工具，现已不再流行。文章分析其兴衰，提出在社区支持、商业模式与市场需求方面的教训。

items.title_en: Meta ordered to pay $375M in New Mexico trial over child exploitation
items.title_zh: Meta 因新墨西哥州儿童性剥削案被判赔 3.75 亿美元
items.summary_en: Jury verdict in New Mexico finds Meta liable for failing to prevent child exploitation content, ordering $375 million in damages. The decision adds to ongoing debates about platform responsibility, safety, and regulatory risk for social networks.
items.summary_zh: 新墨西哥州陪审团裁定 Meta 对未能阻止儿童性剥削内容负责，判罚 3.75 亿美元。此案进一步推动关于平台责任、内容安全与社交网络监管风险的讨论。

items.title_en: Pentagon Adopts New Limits for Journalists After Court Loss
items.title_zh: 五角大楼在法院判决后对记者设定新限制
items.summary_en: Pentagon imposes new limits on journalists after court loss, intensifying access controls around defense operations. The development spotlights tensions between security, transparency, and press freedom.
items.summary_zh: 五角大楼在法院判决后对记者设定新限制，收紧对军事行动报道的现场访问。这凸显安全、透明度与新闻自由之间的张力。

items.title_en: Sky Wins Irish Court Order to Unmask 300 Pirate IPTV Users via Revolut Bank
items.title_zh: Sky 获得爱尔兰法院命令，通过 Revolut 银行揭露 300 名盗版 IPTV 用户
items.summary_en: Sky secures an Irish court order to reveal identities of 300 suspected pirate IPTV users via Revolut bank records. The case underscores evolving litigation strategies leveraging fintech data for rights enforcement.
items.summary_zh: Sky 获得爱尔兰法院命令，借助 Revolut 银行记录揭露 300 名疑似盗版 IPTV 用户，体现了在版权执法中对金融数据的利用。

items.title_en: Kyushu Railway Company Train Varieties
items.title_zh: 九州旅客铁道的列车品种
items.summary_en: A catalog of Kyushu Railway's train classes and varieties, reflecting Japan's regional rail diversity and service strategies. Highlights design, accessibility, and operational differences across routes.
items.summary_zh: 介绍九州旅客铁道的各类列车与品种，体现日本区域铁路的多样性与运作策略，涉及设计、无障碍和线路差异。

items.title_en: The ANSI art "telecomics" of the 1992 election
items.title_zh: 1992 年选举中的 ANSI 艺术‘电信漫画’
items.summary_en: This retrospective revisits the ANSI art 'telecomics' from the 1992 US presidential election, showing how text-mode graphics enabled political storytelling before modern web memes. It spotlights artists and online communities who used simple characters to convey satire under bandwidth limits, foreshadowing later internet culture.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 1992 年美国总统大选中的 ANSI 艺术作品“电信漫画”，展示文本模式图形如何在宽带受限时代讲述政治故事。文章聚焦创作者与网络社区如何以简单字符进行讽刺，预示后来的互联网文化演变。

items.title_en: Show HN: Revise – An AI Editor for Documents
items.title_zh: Revise：文档的 AI 编辑器
items.summary_en: Introduces Revise, an AI-powered editor for documents focused on streamlining drafting, consistency, and practical writing aid rather than flashy AI theatrics.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Revise，一款面向文档的 AI 编辑器，聚焦提升起草效率与一致性，强调务实的写作辅助。

items.title_en: The road signs that teach travellers about France
items.title_zh: 教旅客了解法国的路牌
items.summary_en: It highlights design choices that blend practicality with storytelling on the road.
items.summary_zh: 文章展示法国路牌如何向旅客传递文化线索与语言暗示，将导航工具变成文化导读。强调设计在实用性与叙事性之间的取舍与巧妙平衡。

items.title_en: Automatically generate all 3D print files for organizing a drawer
items.title_zh: 自动生成用于整理抽屉的全部3D打印文件
items.summary_en: GenieCrate automates generating all 3D-printable files to organize a drawer, using parametric designs to tailor organizers to fit different spaces. The idea simplifies DIY organization by turning ideas into printable hardware.
items.summary_zh: GenieCrate 提供自动生成用于整理抽屉的全部3D打印文件的工具，利用参数化设计根据不同空间定制整理件，使 DIY 整理变得更简单。

items.title_en: A Copy-Paste Bug That Broke PSpice AES-256 Encryption
items.title_zh: 拷贝粘贴错误导致 PSpice AES-256 加密失效
items.summary_en: A small copy-paste bug in PSpice's AES-256 encryption routine breaks expected cryptographic behavior, potentially causing incorrect ciphertext or decryption failure. The write-up underscores how tiny, human errors can undermine crypto modules and stresses the need for better input handling and automated testing in crypto libraries.
items.summary_zh: 在 PSpice 的 AES-256 加密实现中出现的一个拷贝粘贴错误打乱了原本的加密行为，可能导致密文错误或解密失败。文中强调微小的人为错误就能破坏加密模块的鲁棒性，并呼吁在加密库中加强输入处理和自动化测试。

items.title_en: More on Version Control
items.title_zh: 关于版本控制的更多思考
items.summary_en: A thoughtful take on version control design, arguing for simpler semantics and robust histories over feature-bloat. It offers practical ideas for building better tooling around collaboration and change tracking.
items.summary_zh: 对版本控制设计提出深入见解，主张以简化语义和稳健的历史记录为目标，避免功能臃肿。给出在协作与变更追踪方面改进工具的实用建议。

items.title_en: March, 19-21: God is a comedian
items.title_zh: 三月十九至二十一日：上帝是个喜剧演员
items.summary_en: A Substack essay blending humor and philosophy, using the idea that 'God is a comedian' to frame observations about life in tech and society.
items.summary_zh: 一篇 Substack 随笔，融合幽默与哲思，以“上帝是个喜剧演员”为线索，撷取科技与社会生活的观察。

items.title_en: Sunsetting the Techempower Framework Benchmarks
items.title_zh: 停用 Techempower 框架基准
items.summary_en: The Techempower Framework Benchmarks project is being sunset, ending active maintenance and updates. The move reflects the ongoing maintenance burden and evolving ecosystems, nudging developers to rely on maintained benchmarks or run their own tests while retaining historical performance insights.
items.summary_zh: Techempower 框架基准项目将进入停止维护阶段，正式结束主动更新。此举反映出维护负担与生态变化的压力，促使开发者改为使用受维护的基准集或自行执行性能测试，同时保留历史性能快照作为参考。

items.title_en: C++26: A User-Friednly assert() macro
items.title_zh: C++26：一个用户友好的 assert() 宏
items.summary_en: C++26 proposes a user-friendly assert macro to improve diagnostics and customize assertion failure handling without sacrificing performance. The change aims to reduce boilerplate and aid debugging.
items.summary_zh: C++26 提议引入更友好的 assert 宏，以改进诊断信息并在断言失败时提供更丰富的自定义选项，同时保持性能。

items.title_en: Chat GPT 5.2 cannot explain the German word "geschniegelt"
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 5.2 无法解释德语单词 geschniegelt
items.summary_en: The thread notes that GPT-5.2 struggles to explain geschniegelt, highlighting limits in nuanced lexical explanations and the occasional gaps in even advanced models.
items.summary_zh: 帖子指出 GPT-5.2 无法清晰解释德语单词 geschniegelt，凸显高级模型在细微词义上的局限性与偶发缺口。

items.title_en: Dobase – Your workspace, your server
items.title_zh: Dobase：你的工作区，你的服务器
items.summary_en: Dobase markets a self-contained workspace that runs on your own server, aiming to combine development environments with centralized control. It emphasizes privacy and reproducibility by keeping code, data, and tooling within your infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: Dobase 提供一个自托管的工作区，允许在自有服务器上运行，强调通过本地基础设施实现隐私与可重复性，将代码、数据和工具集中在一个环境中。

items.title_en: Fun with CSF firmware (RK3588 GPU firmware)
items.title_zh: 玩转 CSF 固件：基于 RK3588 的 GPU 固件探索
items.summary_en: A hands-on look at CSF firmware for the RK3588 GPU, detailing firmware workflows, debugging tips, and potential optimizations. It resonates with embedded developers and hobbyists pursuing open GPU firmware ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 对 RK3588 GPU 的 CSF 固件进行实操探索，揭示固件工作流程、调试要点以及潜在的优化方向。对嵌入式开发者和热衷于开放 GPU 固件生态的人士尤具价值。

items.title_en: Show HN: Robust LLM Extractor for Websites in TypeScript
items.title_zh: Show HN：用 TypeScript 构建的稳健网页提取器
items.summary_en: A TypeScript tool that uses LLMs to extract structured content from arbitrary websites, handling noisy layouts and dynamic content. It enables building resilient data pipelines with less brittle parsers.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个用 TypeScript 编写的网页提取工具，利用大模型从任意网站提取结构化内容，能应对混乱布局与动态页面。它为构建鲁棒的数据管线提供了更稳妥的解析能力。

items.title_en: Chroma Context-1: Training a Self-Editing Search Agent
items.title_zh: Chroma Context-1：训练一个自我编辑的搜索代理
items.summary_en: Context-1 describes training a retrieval-augmented search agent that can edit its own outputs, using feedback loops and self-refinement to improve accuracy. The approach aims to reduce hallucinations and build more trustworthy search behavior, with implications for enterprise AI tooling.
items.summary_zh: Context-1 讲述训练一个能自我编辑输出的检索代理，通过反馈回路和自我修正来提升准确性，减少错误信息。该方法对企业级 AI 工具中的可依赖性和可信度具有启发。

items.title_en: Generators in Lone Lisp
items.title_zh: Lone Lisp 中的生成器
items.summary_en: Explores implementing or using generators (lazy sequences) in Lone Lisp, enabling streaming data processing and memory-efficient pipelines in a Lisp environment.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在 Lone Lisp 中实现生成器（惰性序列）的设计与应用，支持流式数据处理与内存高效的流水线。内容涵盖常用模式与示例代码。

items.title_en: Tony Hoare and His Imprint on Computer Science
items.title_zh: 托尼·霍尔对计算机科学的影响
items.summary_en: The piece surveys Tony Hoare's lasting impact on CS, from formal methods like Hoare logic to concurrent programming via CSP and algorithms such as quicksort. It connects his ideas to modern software correctness, verification, and language design, illustrating how foundational theories shape practical systems.
items.summary_zh: 文章梳理了托尼·霍尔对计算机科学的深远影响，包括霍尔逻辑、并发编程的 CSP 以及快速排序等算法。将他的思想与现代软件正确性、验证和语言设计联系起来，展示基础理论如何塑造实际系统。

items.title_en: Capability-Based Security for Redox: Namespace and CWD as Capabilities
items.title_zh: Redox 的基于能力的安全：命名空间与当前工作目录作为能力
items.summary_en: Redox OS explores capability-based security by treating namespace and current working directory as explicit capabilities. This approach aims to limit permissions to what is granted and improve isolation between processes.
items.summary_zh: Redox OS 通过将命名空间与当前工作目录视为显式的能力来实现基于能力的安全，旨在把权限局限于被授予的范围，并提升进程之间的隔离性。

items.title_en: Fets and Crosses: Tic-Tac-Toe built from 2458 discrete transistors
items.title_zh: 2458个离散晶体管构成的井字棋
items.summary_en: Fets and Crosses documents a hardware Tic-Tac-Toe built from 2458 discrete transistors, showcasing early digital logic design and the tactile limits of hardware gaming. It's a nostalgic tour of how brute hardware could implement simple AI-like gameplay.
items.summary_zh: 《Fets and Crosses》记录了用2458个离散晶体管搭建的井字棋，展示早期数字逻辑设计以及硬件实现简单对战的局限性，带来对怀旧硬件的回顾。

items.title_en: Show HN: Threadprocs – executables sharing one address space (0-copy pointers)
items.title_zh: Show HN：Threadprocs — 在同一地址空间共享可执行文件（零拷贝指针）
items.summary_en: Threadprocs enables multiple executables to share a single address space, enabling zero-copy data sharing and fast IPC. The approach challenges traditional process isolation and could influence future runtime and OS design.
items.summary_zh: Threadprocs 允许多个可执行文件共用一个地址空间，实现零拷贝的数据共享与快速进程间通信。这一思路挑战传统进程隔离，可能影响未来的运行时与操作系统设计。

items.title_en: Show HN: BreezePDF – Free, in-browser PDF editor
items.title_zh: Show HN：BreezePDF——免费的浏览器内 PDF 编辑器
items.summary_en: BreezePDF offers free, in-browser PDF editing, enabling quick edits without downloading software. It emphasizes convenience and lightweight collaboration directly in the browser.
items.summary_zh: BreezePDF 提供免费且在浏览器中完成的 PDF 编辑功能，用户无需下载安装即可快速修改文档，便捷且便于浏览器内协作。

items.title_en: Meta Partners with Arm to Develop New Class of Data Center Silicon
items.title_zh: Meta 与 Arm 合作开发新一代数据中心芯片
items.summary_en: Meta and Arm will co-design a new class of data-center silicon optimized for AI workloads, signaling a shift toward specialized hardware in large-scale deployments. The collaboration could influence chip ecosystems and cloud hardware strategies.
items.summary_zh: Meta 将与 Arm 联合设计新一代面向 AI 工作负载的数据中心芯片，标志着在大规模部署中对定制化硬件的需求增加。此举可能影响芯片生态与云端硬件策略。

items.title_en: Hubble Snaps a New Dazzling Photo of the Crab Nebula
items.title_zh: 哈勃拍摄到蟹状星云的全新炫丽照片
items.summary_en: The Hubble Space Telescope captures a fresh, dazzling view of the Crab Nebula, revealing intricate filaments and dynamic gas flows. The image exemplifies how long-running telescopes continue to yield science and wonder.
items.summary_zh: 哈勃太空望远镜拍摄到蟹状星云的全新炫丽影像，展现出错综复杂的丝状结构与动态气体流动。这类长期运作的望远镜仍在持续产出科学发现与惊奇。

items.title_en: Twice this week, I have come across embarassingly bad data
items.title_zh: 本周我两次遇到令人尴尬的数据
items.summary_en: The author highlights repeated experiences with low-quality data, urging better data hygiene, validation, and governance to avoid misleading conclusions. A call for more careful data practices across projects.
items.summary_zh: 作者反复遇到低质量数据，敦促改进数据清洁、验证和治理，避免误导性结论。对各项目提出更谨慎的数据实践的呼吁。

items.title_en: OpenYak – An open-source Cowork that runs any model and owns your filesystem
items.title_zh: OpenYak：一个开源的协作工具，能运行任意模型并掌控你的文件系统
items.summary_en: OpenYak is an open-source coworking platform that can run any machine learning model and store data on the user's own filesystem. Its architecture highlights data ownership and local experimentation, avoiding vendor lock-in.
items.summary_zh: OpenYak 是一个开源的协作平台，能够在本地运行任意模型并将数据存放在用户自有的文件系统中。此设计强调数据所有权和本地试验，避免对单一厂商的依赖。

items.title_en: DoorDash Tasks
items.title_zh: DoorDash 推出任务功能
items.summary_en: DoorDash launches a new 'Tasks' platform to orchestrate and track work across operations. The feature aims to streamline workflows, improve reliability, and enable teams to automate routine tasks. It hints at a broader move toward programmable operations inside consumer platforms.
items.summary_zh: DoorDash 推出名为 Tasks 的任务平台，用于编排和跟踪运营工作，提升流程自动化和可靠性。此举暗示平台运营将向可编程化和自动化方向发展，供团队使用的 API/界面将增多。

items.title_en: Optimization lessons from a Minecraft structure locator
items.title_zh: 来自 Minecraft 结构定位器的优化教训
items.summary_en: Optimization lessons from a Minecraft structure locator show how to replace brute force with smarter heuristics, caching, and data layout. The takeaways apply broadly to systems design beyond gaming.
items.summary_zh: 来自 Minecraft 结构定位器的优化教训，展示如何以更聪明的启发式、缓存和数据布局取代蛮力枚举。要点具有普遍性，适用于更广泛的系统设计。

items.title_en: Creating West Coast Buddhism (2024)
items.title_zh: 创造西海岸佛教（2024）
items.summary_en: Analyzes how Buddhist communities on the West Coast are adapting in 2024, blending tech culture, digital platforms, and contemplative practice. It examines communities, institutions, and the role of media in spreading mindfulness.
items.summary_zh: 分析西海岸佛教社群在 2024 年的演变，探索科技文化、数字平台与禅修实践的融合，关注社群、机构以及新媒体在传播正念中的作用。

items.title_en: Claude loses its >99% uptime in Q1 2026
items.title_zh: Claude 在 2026 年第一季度的可用性跌破 99%
items.summary_en: Claude's uptime dropped below 99% in Q1 2026, marking a reliability setback for an AI service used by businesses and developers. The outage underscores the fragility of large-scale AI platforms and the need for robust incident response.
items.summary_zh: Claude 在 2026 年第一季度的可用性跌破 99%，对企业与开发者使用的 AI 服务构成可靠性挑战。这次故障凸显了大规模 AI 平台的脆弱性以及对鲁棒应急响应的需求。

items.title_en: Show HN: The King Wen Permutation: [52, 10, 2]
items.title_zh: Show HN：王文卦置换：[52, 10, 2]
items.summary_en: Show HN presents a mathematical exploration of the King Wen permutation, using a simple triple [52, 10, 2] to illustrate a particular permutation in the I Ching framework. The project combines number theory with symbolic harmony, inviting readers to experiment with small seeds and observe emergent structure.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了王文卦置换的数学探讨，以简单的三元组 [52, 10, 2] 为例来揭示在易经框架下的特定排列。该项目把数论与象征意涵相结合，鼓励读者用小的种子进行实验，观察其中的结构与规律。

items.title_en: Gerd Faltings, who proved the Mordell conjecture, wins the Abel Prize
items.title_zh: 格尔德·法尔汀斯因证明莫德尔猜想荣获 Abel 奖
items.summary_en: Gerd Faltings solved the Mordell conjecture (Faltings' theorem), a milestone in number theory. The Abel Prize honors this landmark contribution, underscoring its lasting impact on arithmetic geometry and our understanding of rational points on curves.
items.summary_zh: 格尔德·法尔汀斯因证明莫德尔猜想而获得 Abel 奖，这是数论领域的里程碑。法尔汀斯的定理对理解有理点在高阶代数曲线上的分布具有深远影响，被公认为算术几何的重要里程碑。

items.title_en: TI-89 Height-Mapped Raycaster
items.title_zh: TI-89 高度映射光线投射器
items.summary_en: TI-89 Height-Mapped Raycaster documents a homebrew project that runs a height mapped raycaster on a vintage calculator. It showcases clever optimization and the enduring appeal of retro 3D rendering.
items.summary_zh: TI-89 高度映射光线投射器，展示在老式计算器上实现伪3D 渲染的自制项目。体现了对复古计算及边缘设备演示的持续兴趣。

items.title_en: Maxell MXCP-P100 – wireless cassette player
items.title_zh: Maxell MXCP-P100 无线卡带播放器
items.summary_en: Maxell's MXCP-P100 wireless cassette player brings retro audio gear into the modern era, illustrating ongoing interest in portable analog formats. The post likely covers specs, usability, and nostalgia-driven appeal.
items.summary_zh: Maxell 的 MXCP-P100 无线卡带播放器把复古音频设备带入现代，体现对便携式模拟格式持续的热情。文章可能介绍规格、使用体验及怀旧吸引力。

items.title_en: Lat.md: Agent Lattice: a knowledge graph for your codebase, written in Markdown
items.title_zh: Lat.md：Agent Lattice——用 Markdown 编写的代码库知识图谱
items.summary_en: Lat.md introduces Agent Lattice, a knowledge graph for your codebase expressed in Markdown. It links concepts, APIs, and architecture in a human-friendly format, potentially aiding cross-team understanding and documentation automation. The approach favors approachable, readable knowledge graphs over heavy tooling.
items.summary_zh: Lat.md 推出 Agent Lattice——用 Markdown 表达的代码库知识图谱，连接概念、 API 与架构，便于团队协作与文档自动化。该方法以可读性为优先，提供一种更易被团队采纳的知识图谱形式。

items.title_en: io_uring, libaio performance across Linux kernels and an unexpected IOMMU trap
items.title_zh: io_uring、libaio 在不同 Linux 内核的性能对比与意外的 IOMMU 陷阱
items.summary_en: The post analyzes performance of io_uring vs libaio across Linux kernel versions, noting improvements and a surprising IOMMU trap that affects certain workloads. It underscores evolving I/O APIs trade-offs and the importance of kernel version choice for latency-sensitive apps, storage stacks, and virtualization.
items.summary_zh: 文章比较了 io_uring 与 libaio 在不同 Linux 内核版本中的性能，指出性能改进同时暴露出某些工作负载会遇到的意外 IOMMU 陷阱。强调了 I/O API 的演变及对延迟敏感应用、存储栈和虚拟化的内核版本选择的重要性。

items.title_en: Testing the Swift C compatibility with Raylib (+WASM)
items.title_zh: 用 Raylib 测试 Swift 与 C 的兼容性（含 WASM）
items.summary_en: It likely demonstrates building and running C/Raylib code from Swift, revealing practical tricks for cross-language game development and WASM deployment. A takeaway: cross-language bindings are feasible but require careful ABI attention.
items.summary_zh: 博文探讨了通过 Raylib 实现 Swift 与 C 的互操作性，并考虑 WebAssembly 的支持。它展示了从 Swift 构建/运行 Raylib 的 C 代码的实践技巧，凸显跨语言游戏开发和 WASM 部署的可行性，同时提醒在 ABI 级别需要留意。

items.title_en: Microsoft Set for Worst Quarter Since 2008
items.title_zh: 微软将迎来自 2008 年以来最差的季度
items.summary_en: Microsoft is forecasting a quarter that could be its worst since 2008, signaling pressure across cloud, ads, and devices. The result could reshape investor outlook and the company's strategic bets on AI and cloud services.
items.summary_zh: 微软正预期将迎来自 2008 年以来最差的一个季度，云服务、广告收入和设备市场的压力可能共同作用，影响投资者前景与公司在 AI 与云服务上的战略布局。

items.title_en: The 667MHz Machine
items.title_zh: 667MHz 机器的回顾
items.summary_en: The post revisits a machine running at 667 MHz, using it as a lens to discuss design tradeoffs in early personal computers and the limits of simplicity vs. performance. It ties historical hardware constraints to modern lessons about efficiency and reliability, offering practical takeaways for retrocomputing enthusiasts and builders of low-power systems.
items.summary_zh: 这篇回顾聚焦于一台 667MHz 的机器，借此讨论早期个人电脑的设计取舍与性能极限。文章把历史硬件约束与当下的高效、可靠性需求联系起来，为复古计算爱好者和低功耗系统的构建者提供实用启示。

items.title_en: Netflix raises prices for every subscription tier by up to 12.5 percent
items.title_zh: Netflix 全线涨价，最高幅度达 12.5%
items.summary_en: Netflix hikes all plans by up to 12.5%, expanding price pressure on subscribers as content costs and competition mount. The move signals a continued shift in streaming economics and consumer tolerance for price increases.
items.summary_zh: Netflix 所有套餐上涨，最高幅度达 12.5%；在内容成本与竞争压力叠加的背景下，继续推动流媒体经济学与用户承受能力的变化。

items.title_en: Digs: iOS app that syncs your Discogs collection and lets you browse it offline
items.title_zh: Digs：离线浏览 Discogs 收藏的 iOS 应用
items.summary_en: Digs provides offline access to your Discogs collection by syncing to an iOS app, enabling fast, private catalog browsing without a network.
items.summary_zh: Digs 是一款 iOS 应用，能将 Discogs 收藏同步并离线浏览，便于本地快速、私密地管理音乐藏品。

items.title_en: Matadisco – Decentralized Data Discovery
items.title_zh: Matadisco：去中心化数据发现
items.summary_en: Matadisco proposes decentralized data discovery, enabling discovery and indexing across distributed datasets without relying on centralized catalogs. It hints at scalable, privacy-conscious data ecosystems and could impact data governance and search.
items.summary_zh: Matadisco 提出去中心化的数据发现方案，实现跨分布式数据集的发现与索引，而不依赖中心化目录。该思路有望推动可扩展且更注重隐私的数据生态与数据治理。

items.title_en: Jazz CRJ9 at New York on Mar 22nd 2026, collision with fire truck on runway
items.title_zh: Show HN：纽约跑道上的 Jazz CRJ9 与消防车相撞
items.summary_en: A Jazz CRJ9 collided with a fire truck on a New York runway, disrupting schedules and prompting an investigation into runway safety protocol and emergency response. The incident underscores the ongoing importance of ground vehicle coordination and incident recovery in aviation operations.
items.summary_zh: 一架 Jazz CRJ9 在纽约某跑道上与一辆救火车相撞，致使航班时刻受到影响并启动调查以评估跑道安全与应急响应。此事故凸显地面车辆协同和航空运营中的事故处置重要性。

items.title_en: Welcome to FastMCP
items.title_zh: 欢迎来到 FastMCP
items.summary_en: FastMCP marks the onboarding flow for a new platform. The getting-started guide highlights essential concepts, setup steps, and how to start leveraging the service quickly.
items.summary_zh: FastMCP 的文章提供了上手指南，帮助新用户快速了解平台的核心概念和使用步骤。通过逐步教程，读者能够快速建立起对这项服务的认知与应用。

items.title_en: A single-file C allocator with explicit heaps and tuning knobs
items.title_zh: 单文件 C 分配器：显式堆和调优参数
items.summary_en: A compact, single-file C memory allocator exposing explicit heaps and tunable knobs for fine-grained control. It serves as a practical reference for understanding allocator design, benchmarking, and embedding custom allocators without pulling in external libraries.
items.summary_zh: 一个紧凑的单文件 C 内存分配器，提供显式堆和可调控的参数，允许对分配策略进行细粒度控制。是理解分配器设计、基准测试与在项目中嵌入自定义分配器的实用参考。

items.title_en: Open source isn't a tip jar – it's time to charge for access
items.title_zh: 开源不是打赏箱——是时候对访问收费了
items.summary_en: Argues that open source can't be funded by tips alone and advocates charging for access to sustain maintenance and security; discusses viable monetization models and the trade-offs involved.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为开源项目不应只靠打赏维持，应通过对访问收费等方式实现可持续发展，文中讨论了可行的商业模型及对维护者和用户的取舍。

items.title_en: Microbenchmarking Chipsets for Giggles
items.title_zh: 为乐趣而做的芯片组微基准测试
items.summary_en: A playful microbenchmarking piece that compares several chipsets to tease out performance quirks; the piece cautions that microbenchmark results can be misleading if taken out of context and stresses looking at real-world workloads.
items.summary_zh: 这篇轻松的芯片组微基准测试文章对若干芯片组进行测评，揭示微基准的趣味性与局限性。作者提醒读者要理性解读结果，将其与实际工作负载联系起来。

items.title_en: Show HN: Crazierl – An Erlang Operating System
items.title_zh: Show HN: Crazierl — 一个 Erlang 操作系统
items.summary_en: A demonstration of an Erlang-based operating system called Crazierl, showcasing concurrency and fault-tolerance fundamentals typical of Erlang ecosystems. The project invites community feedback and iteration.
items.summary_zh: 展示一个用 Erlang 编写的操作系统，名为 Crazierl，展现 Erlang 生态中并发与容错的基础能力。项目现向社区征求反馈并计划迭代。

items.title_en: Cuts in publishing and book reviewing imperil the future of narrative nonfiction
items.title_zh: 出版与书评的削减将危及叙事性非虚构作品的未来
items.summary_en: Publishing and review cuts threaten the vitality of narrative nonfiction, risking fewer voices, delayed discoveries, and narrower public discourse. The piece argues for sustaining literature ecosystems to foster diverse, impactful storytelling.
items.summary_zh: 出版与书评的削减威胁叙事性非虚构作品的活力，可能导致声音减少、发现延迟及公共话语的狭窄。文章呼吁维持文学生态，以促进多元且有影响力的叙事。

items.title_en: Scott Hanselman says he's working on Windows local accounts
items.title_zh: Scott Hanselman 表示正在研究 Windows 本地账户
items.summary_en: Scott Hanselman teased work on Windows local accounts, hinting at reducing dependence on Microsoft accounts for sign-in and personalization. The exploration could enable offline or privacy-preserving user management and influence both consumer and enterprise workflows.
items.summary_zh: Scott Hanselman 表示正在研究改进 Windows 本地账户的方案，凸显减少对微软账户依赖、提升隐私与离线使用的探索。这一方向或将带来本地化的登录与个性化管理选项，并影响企业及普通用户的使用场景。

items.title_en: Circuit-level PDP-11/34 emulator
items.title_zh: 电路级 PDP-11/34 仿真器
items.summary_en: A circuit-level emulator replicates the PDP-11/34 at silicon-level detail, enabling hardware-aware debugging and exploration of vintage architecture. It serves as a hands-on tool for educators and researchers.
items.summary_zh: 一个 PDP-11/34 的电路级仿真器，以硅级细节复现该处理器，便于进行硬件级调试与复古体系结构的学习研究。

items.title_en: First and Lego Education Partnership Update
items.title_zh: FIRST 与乐高教育合作伙伴关系更新
items.summary_en: The update outlines ongoing collaboration between FIRST Robotics and LEGO Education, highlighting new curricula, kits, and opportunities for students; shows how the partnership scales hands-on STEM learning.
items.summary_zh: 更新概述 FIRST Robotics 与 LEGO Education 的合作进展，介绍新课程、教育套件，以及为学生提供的动手STEM学习机会，显示合作对普及青少年教育的影响。

items.title_en: How much precision can you squeeze out of a table?
items.title_zh: 表格中的精度到底能保留多少？
items.summary_en: The article dives into how much numeric precision can be preserved in tabular data, exploring data types, rounding, and representation limits. It offers practical guidance for DB design and data pipelines to avoid subtle numerical bugs.
items.summary_zh: 文章深入探讨表格数据能保留多少数值精度，涵盖数据类型选择、舍入误差与表示范围等问题，并为数据库设计与数据处理流程提供实用建议，避免细微的数值错误。

items.title_en: The road to electric in charts and data
items.title_zh: 电动之路：图表与数据
items.summary_en: A data-driven tour through the road to electric mobility, examining how policy, charging infrastructure, and consumer adoption shape the transition. The charts illuminate progress and remaining hurdles for electrification.
items.summary_zh: 以数据驱动的方式，梳理电动出行之路，分析政策、充电基础设施与消费者采用如何共同推动转型。图表揭示了进展与仍待克服的挑战。

items.title_en: Observations from carbon dioxide monitoring
items.title_zh: 来自二氧化碳监测的若干观察
items.summary_en: Nine observations from CO2 monitoring offer practical clues about occupancy patterns, ventilation, and indoor air quality. The notes help inform building design and health guidelines.
items.summary_zh: 来自二氧化碳监测的九条观察，为占用模式、通风与室内空气质量提供实用线索，助力建筑设计与健康指引。

items.title_en: Siclair Microvision (1977)
items.title_zh: Siclair Microvision（1977）
items.summary_en: A retro-tech feature revisits Siclair Microvision from 1977, an early effort in microdisplay technology. It places the device in the lineage of portable visual tech, illustrating the engineering challenges of miniaturized displays that foreshadow modern wearable and AR tech.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 1977 年的 Siclair Microvision，早期微型显示技术的一次尝试。通过梳理该设备在便携显示技术谱系中的地位，揭示了微型显示在走向现代可穿戴与增强现实技术过程中的工程挑战。

items.title_en: My heuristics are wrong. What now?
items.title_zh: 我的启发式判断错了。我该怎么办？
items.summary_en: A leadership reflection on realizing personal heuristics may mislead decision making, with steps to recalibrate: seek diverse input, test assumptions, and adapt processes. It offers practical guidance for ICs moving into leadership and tech leads.
items.summary_zh: 作者反思个人启发式判断的不足，给出重新校准的方法，如扩展输入、验证假设、调整工作流程。为从技术岗位晋升为领导角色的人提供实用建议。

items.title_en: Intuitions for Tranformer Circuits
items.title_zh: Transformer 电路的直觉
items.summary_en: Offers intuitive takes on how transformer circuits operate in AI interpretability, focusing on recurring circuit motifs across layers and how attention, residuals, and MLPs combine to form representations. It highlights practical insights for diagnosing failures and building more robust transformers.
items.summary_zh: 本文给出对 Transformer 电路的直觉性解读，聚焦跨层的可重复电路模组以及注意力、残差和 MLP 如何共同构成表征。提供诊断故障与提升模型鲁棒性的实用洞见，帮助读者在设计和分析 Transformer 时更有把握。

items.title_en: Show HN: Codala, a social network built on scanning barcodes
items.title_zh: Show HN：Codala，一个通过扫描条码构建的社交网络
items.summary_en: Show HN: Codala is a social network built around barcode scanning, a playful concept that links people through codes and tags. It sparks curiosity about novel connection methods while raising questions about scalability, privacy, and usability.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Codala 是一个围绕条码扫描构建的社交网络，概念新颖而有趣。它既能激发好奇心，也引发关于隐私、扩展性与可用性的质疑。

items.title_en: The loneliness of A Room of One’s Own
items.title_zh: 《自己的房间》中的孤独感
items.summary_en: An analysis of Virginia Woolf’s A Room of One’s Own, focusing on loneliness as a driver of creativity and feminist critique. It situates solitary work within broader cultural and literary contexts.
items.summary_zh: 解读弗吉尼亚·伍尔夫的《自己的房间》，聚焦孤独如何推动创造力与女权批评。将孤独创作置于更广泛的文化与文学背景中。

items.title_en: Oil at $150 will trigger global recession, says boss of financial BlackRock
items.title_zh: 黑石集团高层：油价达 150 美元将引发全球衰退
items.summary_en: The BlackRock CEO warns that oil at $150 triggers a global recession, highlighting the macro risk of energy shocks to growth, inflation, and monetary policy. The comment adds to a chorus of voices stressing energy price sensitivity and resilience planning for investors.
items.summary_zh: 黑石集团首席执行官警告称，油价若升至150美元可能引发全球衰退，凸显能源冲击对增长、通胀和货币政策的宏观风险。此言论加剧了对能源价格敏感性及投资者韧性规划的讨论。

items.title_en: No one is happy with NASA's new idea for private space stations
items.title_zh: 没有人对 NASA 新的私有空间站方案感到满意
items.summary_en: NASA's plan to move away from the International Space Station with private space stations faces broad discomfort over cost, governance, and safety concerns. The next steps could reshape who builds and operates orbital assets.
items.summary_zh: NASA 推动以私有空间站替代国际空间站的计划引发广泛担忧，涉及成本、治理和安全等问题。未来走向可能重塑太空资产的建设和运营模式。

items.title_en: Can It Resolve DOOM? Game Engine in 2k DNS Records
items.title_zh: 用 2000 条 DNS 记录实现 Doom 的游戏引擎吗？
items.summary_en: Shares a provocative concept: building a Doom engine using about 2,000 DNS records. The piece uses this as a lens to discuss the boundaries between DNS data, computation, and unconventional system design.
items.summary_zh: 提出一个有趣的设想：用大约 2000 条 DNS 记录来实现 Doom 的游戏引擎。通过这一例子，探讨 DNS 数据、计算与非常规系统设计之间的边界。

items.title_en: StationeryObject
items.title_zh: StationeryObject
items.summary_en: StationeryObject appears to be a project archive focused on stationery-related content, curating resources from its archive.
items.summary_zh: StationeryObject 似乎是一个文具相关内容的项目档案，汇集了收藏的资源。

items.title_en: AI boom risks widening wealth divide, says BlackRock's Larry Fink
items.title_zh: AI 蓬勃发展或扩大财富差距，黑石董事长警告
items.summary_en: BlackRock's Larry Fink warns that the AI boom could widen the wealth divide unless policy, investment, and education keep pace.
items.summary_zh: BlackRock 的 Larry Fink 警告称，人工智能热潮若缺乏配套的政策、投资和教育，可能扩大财富差距。文章分析分配风险与生产力提升的关系。

items.title_en: QRV Operating System: QNX on RISC-V
items.title_zh: QRV 操作系统：QNX 在 RISC-V 上首次公开发布
items.summary_en: QNX, a real-time OS, has a public release showing it running on RISC-V, underscoring portability to open hardware. The port demonstrates realtime performance and expands options for embedded developers using modern ISA.
items.summary_zh: 公开发布显示 QNX（实时操作系统）已在 RISC-V 上运行，凸显其对开源硬件的可移植性。该移植展示了实时性能，并为使用现代指令集架构的嵌入式开发者带来更多选择。

items.title_en: The Failure of the Thermodynamics of Computation (2010)
items.title_zh: 计算热力学的失败（2010）
items.summary_en: Norton’s exploration critiques the thermodynamics of computation framework, questioning energy and information cost assumptions in computation theory. It invites reconsideration of fundamental limits used to analyze information processing systems.
items.summary_zh: 诺顿对“计算热力学”框架提出批评，质疑在计算理论中对能量与信息成本的假设。该讨论促使人们重新审视分析信息处理系统时使用的基本极限。

items.title_en: The Epistemology of Microphysics
items.title_zh: 微物理学的认识论
items.summary_en: Edward Feser’s exploration of microphysics epistemology examines how we know microphysical realities through experiments and models, touching on realism and theory-ladenness. The piece invites readers to reflect on how foundational assumptions shape scientific inference in physics and computation.
items.summary_zh: 爱德华·费塞尔对微物理学认识论的探讨，考察我们如何通过实验与模型认识微观现实，涉及真实论与理论负载性等议题。该文促使读者反思在物理与计算等领域中，基础假设如何影响科学推断。

items.title_en: Meta and Google found liable in social media addiction trial
items.title_zh: Meta 与 Google 在社媒成瘾案中被认定负有法律责任
items.summary_en: A court found Meta and Google liable in a social media addiction trial, citing addictive design and its impact on users. The ruling could accelerate regulatory scrutiny and future litigation over platform ethics.
items.summary_zh: 法院认定 Meta 与 Google 在社媒成瘾诉讼中负有法律责任，指控其成瘾性设计及对用户的影响。此判决可能推动监管审查加剧，并影响未来关于平台伦理的诉讼走向。

items.title_en: Midnight train from GA: A view of America from the tracks as airports struggle
items.title_zh: 从 GA 的深夜列车看美国：在机场陷入困境时的铁路视角
items.summary_en: As airports struggle with delays, rail travel offers a different lens on U.S. mobility from Georgia. The piece contrasts air infrastructure fragility with a slower, people-centered rail narrative.
items.summary_zh: 在机场延误普遍时，佐治亚州的深夜铁路提供了美国出行 otra 的不同视角。文中对比了航空系统的脆弱性与铁路的缓慢、以人为本的出行叙事。

items.title_en: Ohm's Peg-to-WASM Compiler
items.title_zh: Ohm 的 Peg→WASM 编译器
items.summary_en: Ohm's Peg-to-WASM compiler translates PEG grammars into WebAssembly, enabling fast, in-browser parsers without host language overhead. It signals progress in bringing language tooling to the edge.
items.summary_zh: Ohm 的 Peg-to-WASM 编译器将 PEG 语法转译为 WebAssembly，使浏览器端解析器实现更高性能，降低宿主语言开销，推动边缘计算的语言工具发展。

items.title_en: UK total wind generation record beaten today
items.title_zh: 英国今日实现风能总发电量纪录新高
items.summary_en: Britain set a new daily wind-generation record, signaling the growing maturity of renewables in power grids. The milestone underscores the role of wind in decarbonizing electricity supplies and shaping energy policy.
items.summary_zh: 英国今日实现风力发电日纪录新高，标志着可再生能源在电网中的日益成熟。此里程碑凸显风能在电力去碳化和能源政策中的作用。

items.title_en: Light on Glass: Why do you start making a game engine?
items.title_zh: 玻璃上的光线：为何要开始做游戏引擎？
items.summary_en: Light on Glass examines the motivation to build a game engine, including ownership, learning curves, and creative control, offering practical reflections for indie developers on sustainable engine development.
items.summary_zh: 《玻璃上的光线》探讨了为何要自建游戏引擎，分析对所有权、学习曲线与创作控制的追求，并为独立开发者提供关于可持续引擎开发的现实考量。

items.title_en: Local Bernstein theory, and lower bounds for Lebesgue constants
items.title_zh: 局部伯恩斯坦理论与 Lebesgue 常数下界
items.summary_en: Tao surveys local Bernstein theory and derives lower bounds for Lebesgue constants, tying into interpolation stability and convergence rates. The discussion sheds light on how local structures influence global approximation error. The takeaway is a deeper intuition for why certain interpolation schemes behave poorly as degree grows.
items.summary_zh: 泰勒探讨了局部伯恩斯坦理论，并给出 Lebesgue 常数的下界，与插值稳定性和收敛速率相关。讨论揭示了局部结构如何影响全局近似误差，帮助理解某些插值方案在次数增大时为何表现不佳。

items.title_en: The Little Book of C
items.title_zh: C 语言小书
items.summary_en: The Little Book of C offers a compact, approachable primer on C fundamentals, with practical examples and idioms that suit both beginners and seasoned programmers revisiting core concepts.
items.summary_zh: 《C 语言小书》提供简明、易上手的 C 语言入门知识，配以实用示例和常用法，适合初学者和想要回顾核心概念的开发者。

items.title_en: Zero Days: Electric Motorcycles Are a Security Nightmare
items.title_zh: 零日漏洞：电动摩托车是一个安全隐患
items.summary_en: Zero Days argues electric motorcycles pose security risks in software, connectivity, and OTA updates. It emphasizes the need for secure software supply chains and robust security practices in connected vehicles.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出电动摩托车在软件、连接性和 OTA 更新方面存在安全隐患，强调在互联汽车领域建立安全的软件供应链和严格的安全实践。

items.title_en: Power consumption of Game Boy flash cartridges (2021)
items.title_zh: Game Boy 闪存卡耗电量（2021）
items.summary_en: Measured power draw of Game Boy flash cartridges across use cases shows notable variation between models, affecting handheld battery life. The findings help retro-gaming enthusiasts choose energy-efficient peripherals and inform designers of tradeoffs between speed, compatibility, and power use.
items.summary_zh: 对多款 Game Boy 闪存卡在运行与待机等场景的耗电量进行了对比测量，结果显示不同设计存在显著功耗差异。对于追求续航的复古玩家以及设计者来说，这些数据有助于在性能、兼容性和能效之间做出权衡。

items.title_en: Sylve – Proxmox Alternative by FreeBSD
items.title_zh: Sylve：基于 FreeBSD 的 Proxmox 替代方案
items.summary_en: Sylve is a FreeBSD-based virtualization platform offering Proxmox-like management and features, potentially with bhyve-based virtualization, ZFS support, and containers. It presents an alternative for users seeking a BSD-centric stack.
items.summary_zh: Sylve 是一个基于 FreeBSD 的虚拟化平台，提供类似 Proxmox 的管理与功能，可能使用 bhyve、ZFS 等技术，面向偏好 BSD 堆栈的用户。

items.title_en: Show HN: Minimalist library to generate SVG views of scientific data
items.title_zh: Show HN：用于生成科学数据 SVG 视图的极简库
items.summary_en: Introduces a tiny library that renders scientific data as SVG visuals, prioritizing simplicity and reproducibility over feature creep. It suits quick plots for docs, dashboards, or educational demos, with easy integration into static pages.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一个极简库，用于把科学数据渲染成 SVG 图表，强调简单、可重复的可视化。适合快速文档、仪表盘或教学演示的静态页面集成。

items.title_en: Show HN: Open-Source Animal Crossing–Style UI for Claude Code Agents
items.title_zh: Show HN：面向 Claude 代码代理的动物之森风格开源 UI
items.summary_en: Show HN featuring an open-source Animal Crossing–style UI for Claude-based code agents, focused on improving developer experience with playful visuals while preserving AI capabilities. The release (v0.3.0) includes enhancements.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了一个面向 Claude 代码代理的开源动物之森风格界面，旨在通过趣味化视觉提升开发者体验，同时保留 AI 功能。最新版本 v0.3.0 增强了功能与界面。

items.title_en: OpenAI shutting down Sora app
items.title_zh: OpenAI 将关闭 Sora 视频生成应用
items.summary_en: OpenAI is shutting down Sora, its video-generation app, as part of a broader shift away from consumer-facing tools. The move illustrates how AI companies prune products to focus on core platforms and APIs that support a broader developer ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 将关闭 Sora 视频生成应用，体现出对产品组合的聚焦与资源再分配的策略取向。此举对依赖 Sora 构建应用的开发者意味着调整和替代方案的需要。

items.title_en: Microservices and the First Law of Distributed Objects (2014)
items.title_zh: 微服务与分布式对象的第一定律（2014）
items.summary_en: Martin Fowler revisits the relationship between microservices and distributed objects, stressing explicit boundaries and asynchronous communication over naive remote method calls.
items.summary_zh: Martin Fowler 将分布式对象的思想与微服务联系起来，强调应以明确边界和异步通信来避免远程方法调用的陷阱。文章指出延迟、部分失败等问题，以及在规模化系统中维持清晰契约的重要性。

items.title_en: Memory That Collaborates
items.title_zh: 协作记忆
items.summary_en: The piece introduces the concept of memory architectures designed to coordinate across services with minimal infrastructure, enabling collaborative workflows. It argues for lightweight, provenance-friendly memory management that scales in distributed systems.
items.summary_zh: 文章提出一种“协作记忆”的概念，强调在跨服务协作中以最小化基础设施的方式管理内存，以支持分布式系统中的轻量化协同工作与可溯源性。

items.title_en: Intel Device Modeling Language for virtual platforms
items.title_zh: 英特尔用于虚拟平台的设备建模语言
items.summary_en: Intel's Device Modeling Language targets virtual platforms, enabling precise hardware behavior modeling for faster simulations and co-design. It accelerates virtual prototyping of chips and software-hardware integration.
items.summary_zh: 英特尔的设备建模语言面向虚拟平台，旨在实现更精准的硬件行为建模，从而加速仿真、原型设计和软硬件协同开发。

items.title_en: Fast regex search: indexing text for agent tools
items.title_zh: 快速正则搜索：为代理工具对文本建立索引
items.summary_en: The post outlines fast regex search by indexing text for agent tools, describing pre-processing, inverted indexes, and caching techniques. It includes practical benchmarks and guidance for building responsive text-enabled assistants.
items.summary_zh: 文中介绍了为代理工具进行文本快速正则搜索的索引化方案，涵盖预处理、倒排索引与缓存等技术，并给出基准和实用建议，帮助构建更快的文本驱动助手。

items.title_en: About the Atmosphere
items.title_zh: 关于大气
items.summary_en: A concise meditation on the concept of atmosphere and its relevance to the topic at hand, offering a focused lens on why ‘atmosphere’ matters in this context.
items.summary_zh: 对“气氛/大气”这一概念的简要思考，聚焦于在当前语境下为何‘大气’重要以及其带来的影响。

items.title_en: Byte Interviews Chuck Peddle, Father of the MOS 6502 and Commodore PET (1982)
items.title_zh: Byte：采访 MOS 6502 与 Commodore PET 之父 Chuck Peddle（1982）
items.summary_en: A 1982 Byte interview with Chuck Peddle, co-creator of the MOS 6502 and father of the Commodore PET, offering firsthand insights into early microprocessor design and the nascent personal computer boom.
items.summary_zh: 1982 年《Byte》对 MOS 6502 与 Commodore PET 的奠基人 Chuck Peddle 的访谈，提供了对早期微处理器设计与个人电脑热潮的第一手见解。

items.title_en: Ubuntu wants to strip some of GRUB features in 26.10 for security purposes
items.title_zh: Ubuntu 将在 26.10 版本中精简 GRUB 部分功能以提升安全性
items.summary_en: Ubuntu plans to streamline GRUB features in 26.10 to bolster security and simplify Secure Boot, reducing attack surfaces and maintenance friction for users and vendors.
items.summary_zh: Ubuntu 将在 26.10 版本中精简 GRUB 功能，以提升安全性并简化 Secure Boot 的实现，降低攻击面并减轻用户和厂商的维护负担。

items.title_en: Stop picking my Go version for me
items.title_zh: 别再替我挑 Go 版本了
items.summary_en: The post argues for clearer, explicit control over the Go toolchain version in projects, criticizing automation that picks a version without user intent. It advocates reproducible builds and better module/version hygiene for developers.
items.summary_zh: 文章呼吁在项目中对 Go 工具链版本保持更明确的控制，批评会自动选择版本的做法。倡导可复现的构建与更好的模块/版本治理。

items.title_en: Delta Air Lines Says It Will Suspend Special Services for Congress Members
items.title_zh: Delta 将暂停为国会议员提供的特殊服务
items.summary_en: Delta Air Lines plans to suspend special travel services for members of Congress, reflecting scrutiny over government perks in corporate travel. The move signals shifts in policy or cost-cutting while weighing public expectations.
items.summary_zh: 达美航空表示将停止为国会议员提供的特殊旅行服务，折射出对企业旅行中政府特权的关注。此举或反映政策调整或成本控制的考虑，同时回应公众期望。

items.title_en: The LCA problem revisited [pdf]
items.title_zh: 最小公共祖先问题再探：回顾与新解
items.summary_en: A revisitation of the Lowest Common Ancestor problem, presenting new insights or a survey of algorithms, with implications for tree data structures and graph queries. The document may cover efficient preprocessing, query times, and practical trade-offs.
items.summary_zh: 对最小公共祖先问题进行了再研究，给出新的见解或算法综述，影响树结构与图查询的实现。文中讨论了高效预处理、查询时间和实际权衡。

items.title_en: Theodosian Land Walls of Constantinople (2025)
items.title_zh: 君士坦丁堡忒奥多西城墙（2025 更新）
items.summary_en: Theodosian Land Walls of Constantinople (2025).
items.summary_zh: 最新考古与研究对君士坦丁堡忒奥多西城墙的范围、工程构造有新的认识，揭示防务史与城市考古的新证据。

items.title_en: Sports Betting Is Everywhere, Especially on Credit Reports
items.title_zh: 体育博彩无处不在，尤其体现在信用报告中
items.summary_en: The NYFed piece shows sports betting leaking into credit-report data, influencing lenders' risk signals and consumer credit dynamics. It highlights how betting activity and related debt can appear in financial records, with implications for underwriting and policy.
items.summary_zh: 研究显示体育博彩正越来越多地出现在信用报告中，影响贷方的风险信号与个人信贷格局，暴露博彩相关债务在金融记录中的影子效应及其对信用准入的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Unlocking 25 Gigabit/S on 10 GbE Direct Attach Copper
items.title_zh: 在 10 GbE 直连铜缆上解锁 25Gbps 速率
items.summary_en: Describes achieving 25 Gbps over standard 10 GbE Direct Attach Copper by optimizing PHY, cabling, and perhaps signaling techniques. The result could improve data-center density and cost efficiency, but it depends on copper limits and compatibility with existing interfaces.
items.summary_zh: 介绍在标准的 10 GbE 直连铜缆上通过优化物理层、线缆和编码等手段实现 25 Gbps 的传输速率。此举有望提升数据中心的带宽密度和单位成本效益，但需要权衡铜缆的物理极限和现有接口的向后兼容性。

items.title_en: Side-Effectful Expressions in C (2023)
items.title_zh: C 语言中的副作用表达式（2023）
items.summary_en: A technical exploration of side-effectful expressions in C, examining how side effects impact compiler optimizations and reasoning about code behavior. It highlights the non-obvious implications for correctness and performance.
items.summary_zh: 对 C 语言中副作用表达式的技术探讨，分析副作用如何影响编译器优化与代码行为推理，对正确性与性能具有不容忽视的影响。

items.title_en: Mazda may have found the apex in ICE design with the Skyactiv-Z
items.title_zh: 马自达的 Skyactiv-Z 引人关注的内燃机设计巅峰论
items.summary_en: Mazda's Skyactiv-Z may represent a pinnacle in internal-combustion engine design, highlighting efficiency and driver-focused engineering amid a broader transition to electrification. The piece situates Skyactiv-Z in the context of modern powertrains.
items.summary_zh: 马自达的 Skyactiv-Z 引人关注的内燃机设计，被视为内燃机领域的巅峰之一，强调高效与以驾驶者为中心的工程，在向电动化的大趋势中具有独特意义。

items.title_en: Canadian man says U.S. border officers made him give DNA sample
items.title_zh: 加拿大男子称美方边检要求他交 DNA 样本
items.summary_en: A Canadian man says U.S. border officers forced him to give a DNA sample, prompting questions about biometrics, consent, and border security practices.
items.summary_zh: 加拿大男子称美方边检强制他提供 DNA 样本，引发关于生物识别、同意与边境安全做法的讨论。

items.title_en: Gerard of Cremona
items.title_zh: 杰拉德·德雷蒙
items.summary_en: A profile of Gerard of Cremona, the medieval translator who translated many Arabic scientific works into Latin, enabling Europe to access classical knowledge.
items.summary_zh: 介绍中世纪翻译家杰拉德·德雷蒙，他将大量阿拉伯科学文献翻译为拉丁文，使欧洲得以接触经典知识。

items.title_en: Laws Suppressing Boycotts of Israel Violate Civil Liberties
items.title_zh: 禁止抵制以色列的法律侵犯公民自由
items.summary_en: Arguments that anti-boycott laws restricting political boycotts of Israel infringe on civil liberties and free speech. It discusses constitutional rights and the balance between political expression and policy enforcement.
items.summary_zh: 论点认为禁止对以色列进行抵制的法律侵犯公民自由与言论自由，涉及宪法权利与政治表达的边界及法律执行的权衡。

items.title_en: The Last Contract: William T. Vollmann's Battle to Publish an Epic (2025)
items.title_zh: 《最后的合约》：威廉·沃尔曼出版史诗的斗争
items.summary_en: The Last Contract profiles William T. Vollmann's strenuous effort to publish an epic, examining the endurance, negotiations, and friction within literary publishing. It offers a window into the challenges long-form fiction faces in the modern era. The piece blends literary critique with publishing industry observer insights.
items.summary_zh: 《最后的合约》描绘威廉·沃尔曼为出版史诗所经历的艰苦斗争，探讨写作耐心、谈判与出版环节的摩擦。文章揭示了当代长篇小说在现代出版环境中所面临的挑战，并结合文学批评与出版行业观察提供洞见。

items.title_en: Militarized snowflakes: The accidental beauty of Renaissance star forts
items.title_zh: 军事化雪花：文艺复兴星形要塞的意外之美
items.summary_en: Explores Renaissance star forts, geometric fortifications designed for artillery that resemble snowflakes, highlighting the aesthetics and engineering behind militarized architecture.
items.summary_zh: 解读文艺复兴时期的星形要塞，作为对抗炮兵的几何防御工事，其多边轮廓如雪花般美丽，兼具工程与美学价值。

items.title_en: Desperately Seeking Space Friends
items.title_zh: 急切寻找太空朋友
items.summary_en: A review piece examines the social and collaborative dimensions of space exploration, using a data-centric lens to discuss cooperation, loneliness in isolation, and the role of data in scientific discovery.
items.summary_zh: 这篇评论以数据驱动视角审视太空探索中的人际协作、孤独感与科学发现过程，讨论跨机构合作与沟通在未来任务中的重要性。

items.title_en: Scientific audio equipment analysis with analyzer shows no difference in quality
items.title_zh: 使用分析仪对科学音频设备分析，显示质量无显著差异
items.summary_en: An analyzer-based comparison of audio gear shows no meaningful difference in sound quality between boutique and basic cables. The result challenges common audiophile assumptions and advocates for rigorous, reproducible testing.
items.summary_zh: 通过分析仪对音频设备的对比显示，精品线与普通线之间在音质上无显著差异。这一结果挑战了常见的发烧友假设，提倡进行更为严格、可重复的测试。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built a site that maps the web from a bounty hunter's perspective
items.title_zh: Show HN：从赏金猎人视角映射网络的网站
items.summary_en: A show-and-tell project maps the web through a bounty hunter’s lens, offering an unusual security research perspective on vulnerability discovery, disclosure economics, and the hacker ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 该 Show HN 项目以赏金猎人视角映射网络，提供关于漏洞发现、披露经济学以及安全研究生态的独特洞察。

items.title_en: Vectorization of Verilog Designs and its Effects on Verification and Synthesis
items.title_zh: Verilog 设计向量化及其对验证和综合的影响
items.summary_en: ArXiv paper explores how vectorizing Verilog designs affects verification and synthesis, showing how bit-vector representations can impact equivalence checking and hardware synthesis results. The findings matter for hardware designers seeking better verification performance and predictable synthesis outcomes.
items.summary_zh: 论文探讨 Verilog 设计向量化对验证和综合的影响，提示位向量表示可能改变等价性检查与硬件综合结果。对硬件设计者而言，这些发现有助于提升验证性能和预测综合行为。

items.title_en: Show HN: I made a "programming language" looking for feedback
items.title_zh: Show HN: 我做了一个“看起来像编程语言”的东西，征求反馈
items.summary_en: A project that visually resembles a programming language but isn't released as a conventional language. The author asks for feedback to validate ideas and potential use cases.
items.summary_zh: 一个外观像编程语言的原型项目，尚未作为正式语言发布。作者寻求社区反馈以验证思路和潜在的应用场景。

items.title_en: Show HN: Public transit systems as data – lines, stations, railcars, and history
items.title_zh: Show HN：公共交通系统数据化——线路、站点、车厢与历史
items.summary_en: Show HN presents a dataset that catalogs public transit systems—lines, stations, railcars, and historical context—into an accessible data resource. This enables researchers and developers to build analytics, visualizations, and tools that illuminate urban mobility. The project lowers barriers for transit data experimentation.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 提供了一个聚合公共交通系统数据的数据集，涵盖线路、站点、车厢及历史背景，成为可访问的研究与开发资源。该数据使研究人员和开发者能够开展分析、可视化与工具开发，降低了进入城市交通数据分析的门槛。

items.title_en: Byte Magazine Archive 1975 to 1995
items.title_zh: Byte Magazine 档案：1975–1995
items.summary_en: A digital archive of Byte Magazine spanning 1975 to 1995, offering historical articles on early computing, hardware, and software culture. It provides a window into the evolution of tech publishing and foundational ideas that influenced today's software landscape.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个涵盖 1975–1995 年的 Byte Magazine 数字档案，收录早期计算、硬件与软件文化的历史文章，帮助读者洞察科技出版的发展与奠定今日软件格局的基础思想。

items.title_en: Will the AI data centre boom become a $9T bust?
items.title_zh: AI 数据中心热潮会否演变为9万亿美元的泡沫？
items.summary_en: The FT piece weighs whether the AI data center investment boom will overbuild, exposing risks from energy costs, power consumption, and silicon supply constraints. It frames the debate around long-term demand, efficiency gains, and potential market correction for hyperscale infra.
items.summary_zh: FT 分析称 AI 数据中心投资热潮是否会过度扩张，暴露能源成本、用电量和芯片供给约束等风险。讨论长期需求、效率提升与超大规模基础设施的潜在回调。

items.title_en: The Strait of Hormuz Oil Shock Is Now Heading West
items.title_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡油价冲击正向西方蔓延
items.summary_en: Oil-market disruption tied to the Hormuz Strait is spilling over to Western markets, raising price volatility and supply concerns. The geopolitical risk translates into broader energy tech and policy implications for global supply chains.
items.summary_zh: 因霍尔木兹海峡引发的油市冲击正在波及西方市场，推高价格波动与供应担忧。这一地缘政治风险对全球供应链的能源科技与政策层面产生广泛影响。

items.title_en: Figma's MCP Update Reflects a Larger Industry Shift
items.title_zh: Figma 的 MCP 更新反映了更广泛的行业转变
items.summary_en: A modest Figma MCP update signals a broader shift toward deeper integration between design tooling and developer workflows, emphasizing design tokens and cross-team collaboration. It hints at a trend toward unified design systems and tighter ecosystem coherence.
items.summary_zh: Figma 的 MCP 更新虽小，但揭示设计工具与开发者工作流更深度整合的行业趋势，强调设计 tokens 与跨团队协作，暗示向统一设计系统与生态协同发展的方向。

items.title_en: The case for becoming a manager
items.title_zh: 成为管理者的理由
items.summary_en: The piece argues that moving into management can amplify your impact beyond individual contributions, shaping product strategy, hiring, and culture. It discusses the trade-offs, such as reduced hands-on coding time, and offers guidance on when and how to prepare for a transition. For engineers who want broader influence, management can be a deliberate, high-leverage career path.
items.summary_zh: 本文认为走向管理岗位可以把个人影响力放大到产品方向、团队培养和文化建设等领域，超越单打独斗的贡献。文中权衡了对编码实践的减少等取舍，并给出何时及如何为这一转型做准备的建议。对寻求更大影响力的工程师来说，管理是一个有意且高杠杆的职业路径。

items.title_en: HandyMKV for MakeMKV and HandBrake Automation
items.title_zh: HandyMKV：面向 MakeMKV 与 HandBrake 自动化的实用工具
items.summary_en: HandyMKV scripts automate ripping with MakeMKV and transcoding with HandBrake, enabling repeatable, batch-ready media workflows. It highlights command-line automation and options for metadata handling, error recovery, and scaling up personal libraries.
items.summary_zh: HandyMKV：面向 MakeMKV 与 HandBrake 自动化的实用工具，支持批量处理与可重复工作流。强调命令行自动化、元数据处理与大规模图库管理。

items.title_en: Monado became the foundation for OpenXR runtimes
items.title_zh: Monado 成为 OpenXR 运行时的基础
items.summary_en: Monado, an open-source XR runtime, has become foundational for OpenXR runtimes. The piece explains how its architecture and tooling enabled broader interoperability across platforms, influencing the development of VR/AR ecosystems. The result is more cohesive cross-platform experiences for developers and users.
items.summary_zh: 开源 XR 运行时 Monado 已成为 OpenXR 运行时的基石。文章阐述其架构与工具如何推动跨平台互操作性，影响了 VR/AR 生态系统的演进，使开发者和用户能够获得更一致的跨平台体验。

items.title_en: The State of Immutable Linux
items.title_zh: 不可变 Linux 的现状
items.summary_en: A survey of immutable Linux, focusing on security and reliability benefits, as well as the trade-offs for developers and operators. It highlights notable projects, tooling, and practical tips for adopting immutable distributions in production.
items.summary_zh: 对不可变 Linux 的现状进行回顾，聚焦其在安全性与可靠性方面的优点，以及对开发者与运维的取舍。重点介绍重要项目、工具链与在生产中落地不可变发行版的实用建议。

items.title_en: The Hackers Who Tracked My Sleep Cycle
items.title_zh: 追踪我的睡眠周期的黑客
items.summary_en: Hackers tracked the author's sleep cycle, illustrating how attackers can exploit IoT sleep trackers and wearables to infer sensitive personal routines. It serves as a cautionary tale for personal data hygiene in connected ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 黑客追踪了作者的睡眠周期，揭示攻击者如何利用物联网睡眠追踪设备推断个人作息。此文凸显了消费健康设备的隐私与安全风险，以及对设备级保护的需求，提醒人们在连接生态中关注个人数据安全。

items.title_en: Om Malik – 'Astound'ed. Google Flips Its Fiber to PE
items.title_zh: 惊呆了。谷歌把光纤业务卖给私募股权
items.summary_en: Om Malik notes Google's surprising move to flip its fiber assets to private equity, signaling a pivot in network infrastructure strategy. The deal could affect fiber deployment speed, service quality, and competitive dynamics in broadband.
items.summary_zh: Om Malik 指出谷歌将光纤资产转至私募股权的消息，标志着其网络基础设施策略的转变。这笔交易或影响光纤部署速度、服务质量及宽带竞争格局。

items.title_en: Browser-based SFX synthesizer using WASM/Zig
items.title_zh: 基于浏览器的 SFX 合成器：使用 WASM 与 Zig
items.summary_en: A browser-based SFX synthesizer built with WebAssembly and Zig, enabling high-performance audio generation directly in the browser. It showcases WASM’s viability for music tools and discusses portability and potential trade-offs in audio quality.
items.summary_zh: 一个基于浏览器的 SFX 合成器，使用 WebAssembly 与 Zig 构建，能够在浏览器中实现高性能音频生成。展示了 WASM 在音乐工具中的可行性，并讨论可移植性与音质方面的权衡。

items.title_en: Solving Semantle with the Wrong Embeddings
items.title_zh: 用错误嵌入破解 Semantle 的方法
items.summary_en: A deep dive into solving Semantle with intentionally misaligned embeddings, showing that robustness can come from exploiting the structure of the search space even when representations are imperfect. It exposes both strengths and potential weaknesses of embedding-based puzzle solving.
items.summary_zh: 深入探讨使用故意错位的嵌入来解决 Semantle，展示即使嵌入表示不完美，仍可通过抓住搜索空间结构来实现解题。揭示了基于嵌入的推断在鲁棒性方面的优点与潜在弱点。

items.title_en: Show HN: Foundry: a Markdown-first CMS written in Go
items.title_zh: Show HN：Foundry——用 Go 编写的 Markdown 为先的 CMS
items.summary_en: Show HN: Foundry is a Markdown-first CMS written in Go, aiming for simplicity and fast rendering. It emphasizes storing content as Markdown and delivering a lightweight, fast content workflow suitable for developers who want control and speed.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Foundry 是一款用 Go 编写、以 Markdown 为核心的内容管理系统，追求简洁与快速渲染。它将内容以 Markdown 存储，提供轻量、快速的内容工作流，适合追求可控性与高性能的开发者。

items.title_en: RSA and Python
items.title_zh: RSA 与 Python
items.summary_en: A practical look at implementing RSA with Python, covering key generation, encryption patterns, and signing practices, plus common pitfalls and library choices.
items.summary_zh: 实用讲解在 Python 中使用 RSA 的实现要点，涵盖密钥生成、加密与签名的常见实践，以及常见坑点与库的选择。

items.title_en: Show HN: Yoink – Spotify to lossless with full metadata, self-hostable, ad-free
items.title_zh: Show HN：Yoink——自托管的无损音乐方案，完整元数据、无广告
items.summary_en: Yoink appears to be a self-hosted pipeline turning Spotify music into lossless files with complete metadata, enabling ad-free playback locally. It highlights community-driven, privacy-conscious music workflows and the feasibility of local music ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Yoink 似乎是一个自托管的解决方案，将 Spotify 音乐转换为无损文件并保留完整元数据，提供本地离线无广告播放。此举体现了社区驱动的隐私友好型音乐工作流，以及本地化音乐生态系统的可行性。

items.title_en: Scientists Just Broke the Solar Power Limit Everyone Thought Was Absolute
items.title_zh: 科学家打破了被普遍认为是绝对的太阳能功率极限
items.summary_en: Researchers report surpassing a long-debated solar power efficiency limit, hinting at advances in materials or cell architecture. The claim, if verified, could accelerate improvements in photovoltaic technology and renewable energy deployment.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员声称突破长期受到关注的太阳能效率极限，可能涉及新材料或电池结构的进步。如经证实，或将推动光伏技术和可再生能源部署的加速。

items.title_en: Rendering complex scripts in terminal and OSC 66
items.title_zh: 在终端中渲染复杂脚本与 OSC 66
items.summary_en: Discusses approaches to rendering complex scripts (likely multilingual or Indic scripts) in terminal environments and related OSC 66 control sequences. It covers fonts, shaping, and terminal capabilities critical for robust multilingual support.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在终端环境中渲染复杂脚本（可能是多语言或印刷字形）以及相关的 OSC 66 控制序列。涵盖字体、字形排版与终端能力等关键点，以实现对多语言的稳健支持。

items.title_en: Airport wait times are longest in TSA history, agency says
items.title_zh: TSA 史上最长的机场安检等待时间
items.summary_en: TSA reports record-long airport security lines as travel rebounds, highlighting staffing, process efficiency, and queue management. The delay underscores challenges in scaling passenger throughput and prompts attention to technology-assisted screening and process optimization.
items.summary_zh: TSA 报告机场安检排队时间创历史新高，显示旅行需求回暖与安检能力之间的矛盾，同时推动对流程与技术的改进关注。
